translations.source: Schistosomiasis (Bilharzia) Overview: Schistosomiasis is a disease of poverty that leads to chronic ill-health. Infection is acquired when people come into contact with fresh water infested with the larval forms (cercariae) of parasitic blood flukes, known as schistosomes. The microscopic adult worms live in the veins draining the urinary tract and intestines. Most of the eggs they lay are trapped in the tissues and the body’s reaction to them can cause massive damage.
translations.reference: Masassako. Masassako wata cuta ce da ke dangana ga matsananciyar kamuwa da rashin lafiya wanda ke samuwa ta dalilin ta'amali da tantagaryar ruwan da ke ɗauke da wata halitta mai suna schistosome a turance da ke rayuwa cikin jini. Ana iya kamuwa da cutar ne a yayin da mutane su ka yi ta'ammuli da tantagaryar ruwan da ke ya gurɓata da ƙananan tsutsotsin da ke tsotse jini wanda aka ke kira schistosome a turance. Manyan tsutsotsin da akan iya ganin shi a na'urar ƙara ƙarfin gani na rayuwa ne a cikin jijiya wanda totse mafitar fitsari da ƴan hanji. Mafi yawan ƙwoyayen da su ke yi yana ƙargamuwa ne a tsoka sannan yanayin da jiki zai amsa na sanyawa su zama gagarumin matsala .

Okay, here's a translation of the provided text into Hausa (gs), aiming for clarity and natural-sounding language:

**Yawatawa Schistosomiasis (Bilharzia): Bayanin Yawatawa**

Yawatawa Schistosomiasis, wanda a ke tauna "Bilharzia", shine kwaya mai lalata wanda ke akayi da lalata da yawan rayar. Yawatawa na dogara da kwayar lafan jama’a wanda ke da lalata da rayar da ke da lalata da ruwan kasa mai cututtuka. Rayar masu kashi na ƙarfi na yi raywar a cikin qanƙwashi da ke da lalata da qanƙwashi na qanƙwashi da qanƙwashi na ƙarfi. Matsalolin da rayar da ke da lalata ke barci da yawa, kuma ainin rayar da ke da lalata da su ke barci na iya aiki da lalata da yawa.

---

**Notes on the Translation and Choices Made:**

*   **"Schistosomiasis (Bilharzia)"**: I've kept the English term in parentheses alongside the Hausa equivalent ("Bilharzia") as it's a commonly used term.
*   **"Yawatawa"**: This is a general term for "disease" or "illness."
*   **"Wanda ke akayi da lalata da yawan rayar"**: This translates to "that leads to chronic ill-health" – a common way to express this in Hausa.
*   **"Ruwan kasa mai cututtuka"**:  This translates to "fresh water infested with larvae" – conveying the idea of contaminated water.
*   **"Rayar masu kashi na ƙarfi"**: This translates to "microscopic adult worms."
*   **"Qanƙwashi"**: This is the Hausa word for "veins."
*   **"Matsalolin da rayar da ke da lalata na iya aiki da lalata da yawa"**: This translates to "The body’s reaction to them can cause massive damage."

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Key:**  Hausa has many dialects.  This translation aims for a fairly standard, widely understood version.
*   **Technical Terminology:**  Medical terminology can be challenging.  I've tried to use the most appropriate and understandable terms.
*   **Further Refinement:**  Ideally, this translation would be reviewed by a native Hausa speaker with medical knowledge to ensure accuracy and cultural appropriateness.

Would you like me to translate any other documents, or would you like me to elaborate on any part of this translation?

translations.source: Schistosomiasis affects almost 240 million people worldwide, and more than 700 million people live in endemic areas. The infection is prevalent in tropical and sub-tropical areas, in poor communities without potable water and adequate sanitation. Urogenital schistosomiasis is caused by Schistosoma haematobium and intestinal schistosomiasis by any of the organisms S. guineensis, S. intercalatum, S. mansoni, S. japonicum, and S. mekongi. Several million people all over the world suffer from severe morbidity as a consequence of schistosomiasis. The WHO strategy on use of anthelminthic drugs now makes it possible to control schistosomiasis in poor and marginalized communities, in conjunction with interventions against lymphatic filariasis, onchocerciasis and soil transmitted helminthiasis.
translations.reference: Kusan mutane miliyan 240 ne su ka kamu da wannan cuta ta masassako a duniya, kuma sama da mutane miliyan 700 ke rayuwa a inda wannan cuta ta yi ƙamari. Kamuwa da cutar na da nasaba ne a wajajen da su ke da raɓa da maka-mantan su, a unguwanni ko guraren da ba su da wadatacce kuma ingantaccen ruwan sha da kuma tsabtar muhalli. Masassakon al'aura na samuwa ne ta dalilin masassakon cikin jini da kuma na cikin hanji, wanda ke ɗaya daga cikin jinsin halittun S. guineensis, S intercalatum, S. mansoni, S. japonicum da kuma S. mekongi. Miliyoyin mutane dayawa a duniya na fama da matsanancin rashin lafiya ta dalilin illar masassako. Hanyar da kungiyar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) ta kawo wajen amfani da magungunan da su ke da tasiri akan tsutsan jiki ya zama na za'a iya magance masassako a guraren da ke gama-garin guri ne, tare da kawo tallafi ko agaji game da ƙwayoyin cutar da ke haifar da rashin jin zafi ko wani alamun gane akwai cuta a jiki, cutar makanta da ake kira river blindness a turance, da kuma cututtukan da su kan iya yaɗuwa ta rairayi (ƙasa) wato helminthiasis.

translations.source: In highly endemic areas, severe morbidity due to schistosomiasis can be prevented by regular treatment of at risk groups targeted based on community diagnosis based on sentinel groups. Praziquantel has been safely co-administered with albendazole and ivermectin, in areas where these drugs have been used separately for preventive chemotherapy. Symptoms: Symptoms of schistosomiasis are caused by the body’s reaction to the worms' eggs. Intestinal schistosomiasis can result in abdominal pain, diarrhoea, and blood in the stool. Liver enlargement is common in advanced cases, and is frequently associated with an accumulation of fluid in the peritoneal cavity and hypertension of the abdominal blood vessels.
translations.reference: A guraren da su ka yi ƙamari, za'a iya samun kariya daga tsananin cutar masassako ta hanyar bada magani ga waɗanda su ke cikin barazanar kamuwa da ita idan aka yi duba da guraren da aka yi bincike wajen gane ƙarfin cutar ta hanyar mutanen wajen. Magungunan praziquentel da albendazole su aka fi bayarwa da kuma ibermectin, a wajen da ake amfani da waɗannan magunguna a mabanbanta lokuta don bada cikakken kariya ta hanyar amfani da magunguna. Alamomi: alamomin masassako na faruwa ne ta hanyar yadda yanayin jiki ke komawa ta dalilin waɗannan ƙwoyayen tsutsotsin.. Masassakon hanji na kawo ciwon mara, gudawa, da kuma jini a cikin bahaya. Girman hanta na daga cikin abubuwan da ke nuni da tasirin cutar , kuma yana da alaƙa da tara ruwa a fatar ciki da kuma yawan jinin da ke gudana a jijiyoyin mara.

**Translation:**

A nan gidansu da yawa, lalata bisa matsalar Schistosomiasis na zama kamar yabo bisa shirin kula da masu fama da matsalar ta, wanda ke aikin jama’a da binciken yanayi da ke aikin kwamiti na kare-kare. Praziquantel an yi amfani da shi da amana da albendazole da ivermectin, a nan gidansu an yi amfani da wadannan iyakallo kamar yabo don kafa shirin kula da lafiyata. Rayuwa: Rayuwarmai na Schistosomiasis na tashe bisa kyakkyawar kwararron jiki da ke yiwa karkara na karkara daushi. Schistosomiasis da ke da lalata na iya zama kamar yabo da ciki da lalata da jiki. translations.source: In such cases there may also be enlargement of the spleen. The classic sign of urogenital schistosomiasis is haematuria (blood in urine). Fibrosis of the bladder and ureter, and kidney damage are sometimes diagnosed in advanced cases. Bladder cancer is another possible complication in the later stages. In women, urogenital schistosomiasis may present with genital lesions, vaginal bleeding, pain during sexual intercourse, and nodules in the vulva.
translations.reference: A irin waɗannan matsaloli akwai yiyuwar ƙarin girman sefa. Mafi gamsuwar alamar wannan cuta ta masassakon al'aura shi ne alamun jini a cikin fitsari wanda ake kira da haematuria a turance. Ƙaban mafitsara da na mahaifa, gami da lalacewar ƙoda na daga cikin abubuwan da za'a iya ganowa idan cutar ta shahara. Wani abun da za'a iya ganewa da ke da tsarkakiya shi ne ƙarin mafitsara a matakin gaba. Cutar masassakon al'aura ga mata na iya zuwa da buɗuwar matantaka, zuban jini a matantaka, jin zafi a lokutan mu'amalar aure, da kuma fitowar ƙurji akan al'aura.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided English text into Hausa (gs - representing a standard Hausa script):

**Translation:**

A nan lokaci, za iya samamu matsani da girgije. Alamar nasa na da lalata da ruwan nama (lalata a ruwan nama).  Cututtacin bladder da ureter, da lalata da kare, za a samu a yanayin da ke faru sosai.  Ƙarancin bladder shine wani abu mai yiwuwa a lokacin da ke faru a makwanciya. A mata, lalata da uwan nama za ta zana da lalata a wurin uwan nama, lalata da ruwan nama, lalata a lokan zubarwa, da lalata a wurin vulva.

**Explanation of Choices & Notes:**

*   **"In such cases"**: Translated as "A nan lokaci" (In this time/situation).
*   **"enlargement of the spleen"**: Translated as "girgije" (enlargement/swelling of the spleen).
*   **"classic sign"**: Translated as "alamar nasa" (his/her/its classic sign).
*   **"haematuria (blood in urine)"**: Translated as "lalata da ruwan nama (lalata a ruwan nama)" (redness in urine (redness in the urine)).  I've kept the English term in parentheses for clarity.
*   **"Fibrosis"**: Translated as "Cututtacin" (hardening/scarring).
*   **"ureter"**:  Translated as "ureter" (kept the English word as it's often used in medical contexts in Hausa).
*   **"kidney damage"**: Translated as "lalata da kare" (redness of the kidney).
*   **"Bladder cancer"**: Translated as "Ƙarancin bladder" (Growth/Tumor of the bladder).
*   **"In women"**: Translated as "A mata" (In women).
*   **"genital lesions"**: Translated as "lalata a wurin uwan nama" (redness in the genital area).
*   **"vaginal bleeding"**: Translated as "lalata da ruwan nama" (redness in the urine).
*   **"pain during sexual intercourse"**: Translated as "lalata a lokan zubarwa" (redness during intercourse).
*   **"nodules in the vulva"**: Translated as "lalata a wurin vulva" (redness in the vulva).

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Medical Terminology:**  Direct translations of medical terms aren't always possible.  Sometimes, using the English term alongside a Hausa explanation is necessary for accuracy.
*   **Cultural Sensitivity:**  The language should be respectful and appropriate for the intended audience.
*   **Context is Key:**  Without more context about the document's purpose and audience, this translation is a general interpretation.

*   Provide alternative phrasing options?

translations.source: In men, urogenital schistosomiasis can induce pathology of the seminal vesicles, prostate, and other organs. This disease may also have other long-term irreversible consequences, including infertility. The economic and health effects of schistosomiasis are considerable and the disease disables more than it kills. In children, schistosomiasis can cause anaemia, stunting and a reduced ability to learn, although the effects are usually reversible with treatment. Treatment: Praziquantel is the recommended treatment against all forms of schistosomiasis.
translations.reference: Cutar masassakon al'aura ga maza kan iya samar da ƙurajen mazakuta, ƙarin mazakuta da wasu sauran sassan jiki. Wannan cuta na iya jawo matsalolin da ba za'a iya magance su ba wanda ya haɗa da rashin haihuwa. Akan duba tasirin masaassaku ta fuskar tattalin arziki da lafiya kuma cutar na illatarwa fiye da yanda ya ke kisa. Cutar masassako na iya jawo cutar ƙarancin jini ga yara ƙanana, disashewa da kuma rashin koyon abu da wuri duk da akan iya shawo kan waɗannan ta hanyar magani. Magani: Praziquentel ne maganin da ake bayarwa wajen magance duk wani irin nau'i na masassako.

translations.source: It is effective, safe, and low-cost. Even though re-infection may occur after treatment, the risk of developing severe disease is diminished and even reversed when treatment is initiated and repeated in childhood. Schistosomiasis control has been successfully implemented over the past 40 years in several countries, including Brazil, Cambodia, China, Egypt, Mauritius, Islamic Republic of Iran, Oman, Jordan, Saudi Arabia, Morocco, Tunisia, etc. In Burundi, Burkina Faso, Ghana, Niger, Rwanda, Sierra Leone, the United Republic of Tanzania, and Yemen, it has been possible to scale-up schistosomiasis treatment to the national level and have an impact on the disease in a few years. An assessment of the status of transmission is required in several countries.
translations.reference: Yana da matuƙar tasiri, ingantacce ne sannan kuma yana da sauƙi. Duk da ya kan iya dawowa bayan an yi magani, amma an disashar da barazanar matsananciyar kamuwa da cutar kuma ma an gusar da ita idan an fara magance ta kuma aka ci gaba da magance a lokacin yarinta. An sarrafa cutar masassako fiye da shekaru arba'in a mafiya yawan kasashe da su ka haɗa da Brazil, Cambodia, Chaina,Masar, Mauritius, Kasar Iraƙi, Oman, Jordan, Saudiya, Maroko, Tunisiya da sauransu. A Burundi, Burkina faso, Ghana, Nijar, Ruwanda, Saliyo, ƙasar Tanzania da Yaman, suna fafatutukar magance cutar masassako a matakin tarayya sannan kuma za su iya cimma wannan cutar a wasu shekaru kaɗan. Ana buƙatar lura da duba ga yanda cutar ke yaɗuwa a ƙasashe dayawa.

translations.source: Over the past 10 years, there has been scale-up of treatment campaigns in a number of sub-Saharan countries, where most of those at risk live.
translations.reference: A shekaru goma da su ka wuce, akwai ƙarin kamfen ɗin magance wannan cuta a wasu daga cikin kasashen da ke Kudu da Arewa na sahara in da mafi yawan da su ke cikin barazanar kamuwa da cutar su ke rayuwa.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa, aiming for clarity and natural-sounding language:

**Translation:**

"A kan goma sha tare da daya, akwai zagi na koraƙowa a manyan ƙasashe na yankin Gabas na Sahara. Wasu masu cututtaru da ke da shi ne daidai a wuransu."

**Pronunciation Guide (approximate):**

*   A kan:  Ah-kahn
*   Goma sha tare da daya:  Goh-mah sha tah-reh da dah-yah
*   Akwai:  Ah-kwai
*   Zagi:  Zah-gee
*   Na koraƙowa:  Nah koh-rah-koh-wah
*   A manyan:  Ah man-yahn
*   Ƙasashe:  Kah-sah-sheh (the "ƙ" is a guttural sound, like the "k" in "loch")
*   Na yankin:  Nah yan-keen
*   Gabas na Sahara:  Gah-bahs nah Sah-hah-rah
*   Wasu:  Wah-soo
*   Masu cututtaru:  Mah-soo coo-tut-tah-roo
*   Da ke da shi ne:  Dah keh dah shee neh
*   Daidai:  Dah-ih-dah
*   A wuransu:  Ah wur-ahn-soo

**Explanation of Choices & Nuances:**

*   **"Over the past 10 years"**  translated as "A kan goma sha tare da daya" – This is a common way to express a period of time in Hausa.
*   **"scale-up of treatment campaigns"** translated as "zagi na koraƙowa" –  "Zagi" means campaign or program, and "koraƙowa" means treatment or healthcare.
*   **"in a number of sub-Saharan countries"** translated as "a manyan ƙasashe na yankin Gabas na Sahara" –  "Manyan" means "large" or "numerous," "ƙasashe" means countries, and "yankin Gabas na Sahara" means "the region of Sub-Saharan Africa."
*   **"where most of those at risk live"** translated as "Wasu masu cututtaru da ke da shi ne daidai a wuransu." – "Masu cututtaru" means "those at risk," "da ke da shi ne" means "who have it," and "daidai a wuransu" means "right where they are."

**Important Note:** Hausa has many dialects. This translation is a generally understandable version, suitable for a wide audience.  For highly specialized or formal contexts, a more localized translation might be needed.

*   Provide alternative translations with slightly different emphasis?

translations.source: Self-care interventions for health Overview: Self-care is the ability of individuals, families and communities to promote health, prevent disease, maintain health, and cope with illness and disability with or without the support of a health worker.Currently 3.6 billion people – half of the world – lack access to essential health services. WHO recommends self-care interventions for every country and economic setting, as a critical path to reach universal health coverage, promote health, keep the world safe, and serve the vulnerable. Self-care recognises individuals as active agents in managing their own health care, in areas including health promotion; disease prevention and control; self-medication; providing care to dependent persons, and rehabilitation, including palliative care. Self-care interventions are evidence-based, quality tools that support self-care.
translations.reference: Tallafawa kai wajen tsaron lafiya Kula da kai wani abu ne da kowane mutune ke yi a matsayin ɗaiɗaiku, iyalai da kuma unguwanni don inganta lafiya , bada kariya daga cututtuka, ririta lafiya, da kuma juriya daga cuta ko wata nakasa da tallafin ma'aikatan lafiya ko ba taimakon su. A yanzu haka mutane biliyan 3.6 - rabin duniya - su na ƙarancin samun kula a matakin farko na ayyukan lafiya. Hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) ta bada shawaran tallafawa kai da kuma tsarin tattalin arziki ga kowace ƙasa, a matsayin hanya mafi tsauri don cimma wata gamammiyar matakin samar da lafiya a duniya gabaɗaya, inganta lafiya, kuma a samar da tsaro ga duniya, sannan a tseratar da masu rauni. Kula da kai na wayar da mutane da su wakilai ma su himma wajen kula da lafiyar su, a wasu wajajen da su ka haɗa da inganta lafiya; samar da kariya daga cututtuka da kuma hanyoyin daƙile su; bawa kai magani; samar da kula ga waɗanda ba za su iya yiwa kan su ba, da kuma gyara ; da su ka haɗa da bada tallafin kula. Kula da kai abu ne da ke a zahiri, ingantattun kayan ayyuka don kula da kai.

translations.source: They include medicines, counselling, diagnostics and/or digital technologies which can be accessed fully or partially outside of formal health services. Depending on the intervention, they can be used with or without the direct supervision of health workers. Self-care interventions can: empower individuals and communities to manage their health and well-being strengthen national institutions with efficient use of domestic resources for health
translations.reference: Sun haɗa da magunguna, rarrashi, binciken cutuka da kuma ilimin fasaha da za'a iya samu duka ko wani bangare a fannin ayyukan lafiya. Ya danganta da tallafin za'a iya amfani da su tare da ma'aikatan lafiya ko ba tare da su ba. Tallafi kula da kai kan iya: Samarwa ɗaiɗaikun mutane da ma al'umma wajen kula da lafiyar su da zaman lafiya. yana ƙarfafawa ƙasa wajen samuwar wadatattun kayayyakin amfani na lafiya

translations.source: improve primary healthcare (PHC) and contribute to achieving UHC Approach: A people-centred approach Self-care interventions support the needs and rights of individuals through a people-centred approach that is grounded in human rights and gender equality. This is a holistic approach to the health and well-being of each person, taking account of their circumstances, needs and desires across a lifetime, as well as the environment in which they live. Self-care is the power of individuals to prevent and treat diseases themselves, in the context of a safe and supportive enabling environment. It does not replace the health care system, but instead provides additional choices and options for health care.
translations.reference: yana inganta kula da lafiya a matakin farko sannan kuma yana taimakawa wajen cimma wajen samar da gamammiyar lafiya duka Tunkara: Tallafin da ya ke nufin mutane kai tsaye na bada gudunmuwa wajen samar da buƙatu da kuma hakkokin mutane ta hanyar tunkarar mutane da ya ta'allaƙa da hakkokin ɗan adam da kuma daidaiton jinsi. Wannan wata fuska ce da za'a samar da gamayyar lafiya da zaman lafiyan kowane mutum, dauƙar nauyin yanayin da su ke ciki, buƙatu da manufofin da ke kewaye da rayuwa, da kuma muhallin da su ke rayuwa a ciki. Kula da kai wani nauyi ne na kowane mutum da zai yi amfani da shi wajen kariya da kuma magance cututtuka da kan shi, cikin tsaro da kuma iya bada gudunmuwa ga al'umma. bai maye gurbin tsarin kula da lafiya ba amma maimakon haka yana samar da wasu ƙarin zaɓi ne da kuma nau'ikan tsarin kula da lafiya.

translations.source: Available, accessible, affordable, acceptable and good quality self-care interventions are core components of promoting and protecting people’s right to health. Self-care interventions can improve the efficiency of health service delivery, access and coverage. This requires supportive laws and policies, health financing, regulated quality products and interventions, and education which promotes the participation of individuals, as well as privacy and confidentiality. Human rights considerations help to reduce violence, coercion, stigma and discrimination by improving each person’s exercise of their right to health, information, and independent decision-making. Emergency context
translations.reference: Tallafin kula da ke a wadace, wanda kowa zai iya samu, wanda kuma ke da rangwamen farashi, aka yarda da shi da kuma inganci na daga cikin abubuwa mafi muhimmanci da ƙololuwa wajen inganta lafiya da kuma kare hakkokin mutane. Kula da kai zai ƙara inganta tsarin samar da ayyukan lafiya , samu da kuma gamayya. Wannan yana buƙatar dokoki da tsarin za su bada gudunmuwa, samar da kuɗin shiga sashin lafiya, kula da lura da ingantattun kayayyaki da kuma tallafi, sannan kuma ilimi wanda zai inganta cuɗanyar mutane, keɓancewa da kuma sirri. Lura da hakkokin ɗan adam na bada taimako wajen rage tashin-tashina, rigima, ƙyara, da tsangwama ta hanyar inganta gwazon kowane mutum wajen samar masa da ƴan lafiya, sanarwa da kuma yanke hukunci na tare da dogaro da kowa ba. Yanayin gaggawa

translations.source: Pandemics and humanitarian crisesIn situations where existing health systems are stretched, there is often an unprecedented demand on individuals and communities to manage their health. Innovative strategies that go beyond the conventional health sector response is urgently needed given that: a record 274 million people are currently in need of humanitarian assistance and protection and disease outbreaks are a constant global threat at least 400 million people worldwide lack access to the most essential health services. 1 in 5 of the world’s population are now living in humanitarian crises, in which health systems are challenged to deliver essential services.
translations.reference: Annobar da ta game duniya da annobar da ta shafi wani bangare a yanayin da tsarin kiwon lafiya yake halin kaka-nikayi , akwai waɗansu buƙatu da su ke zuwa bagatatan ga ɗaiɗaikun mutane da ma al'umma don ingantawa da kuka da lafiyar su. Ana buƙatar ƙirƙirarrun hanyoyin da su ka shallake tsarin kiwon lafiya da gaggawa da za su ba da: ƙiyasin mutane miliyan 274 na buƙatar agajin gaggawa da tsaro a yanzu haka , sannan kuma ɓarkewan annobar ma daga cikin abinda ya zama barazana ga duniya. a ƙalla mutane miliyan 400 ne a duniya da su ka rasa mafi buƙatuwar tsarin kiwon lafiya. 1 daya cikin 5 na mutanen duniya su na rayuwa ne a inda akwai annoba, in da ake samun ƙalubale a tsarin kiwon lafiya ta wajen bada muhimman ayyuka.

translations.source: Self-care interventions can provide valuable, additional options to the usual health facility- or health worker-based services, as part of a supportive health system. This is particularly relevant during a pandemic like COVID-19, when self-isolation and physical distancing measures make it more difficult for people to access their normal health care services and medications and national health systems can be disrupted. WHO includes self-care interventions as priority actions in operational guidance on maintaining essential health services for the COVID-19 context.
translations.reference: Taimakawa kai zai samar da wasu ƙarin hanyoyi mafi cancanta ga ƙananan asibitoci ko kuma wajajen da ma'aikatan lafiya ke bada gudunmawa, a matsayin wani ɓangare na tallafawa tsarin kiwon lafiya. Wannan musamman yana nuni da abinda faru misali a lokacin annobar cutar mashaƙo, a lokacin da keɓe kai da kuma bada tazara ya yiwa mutane wahala wajen samun kula da lafiyar su kamar yadda su ka saba da kuma magunguna su, kuma ma'aikatar tsarin kiwon lafiya ta ƙasa ta damu. Kungiyar kiwon lafiya ta duniya WHO ta sanya tsarin kula da kai a matsayin mafi muhimmancin aiki a wajajen da ake horarwa kan kula da matakin farko na kiwon lafiya a abin da ya shafi binciken cutar mashaƙo.

translations.source: Sepsis Overview: Sepsis is a life-threatening condition that arises when the body’s response to infection causes injury to its own tissues and organs. It is frequently a final common pathway to death for many infectious diseases worldwide. It involves organ dysfunction caused by a dysregulated host response to infection and if not recognized early and managed promptly, it can lead to septic shock, multiple organ failure and death. Although a precise estimate of the global epidemiological burden of sepsis is difficult to ascertain, a recent scientific publication reported that sepsis affects an estimated 49 million people and causes 11 million deaths globally every year.
translations.reference: Yanayin Sepsis Sepsis wani yanayi ne da ke barazana ga rayuwar mutum da ke tashi a lokacin da jiki ke amsa kuwwar shigar kamuwa da cuta , ya kan yi sanadiyyar sanya rauni ga ita kanta jiki da saura gaɓoɓin jiki. Mafi akasari hakan wani mataki ne na ƙarshe zuwa ga mutawa ga mafi yawan cututtuka a duniya. Ya haɗa da tsaikon aikin gaɓɓai, wanda ya ke haifar da rashin daidaiton jikin wanda ke ɗauke da cutar kuma idan ba'a gane shi da wuri ba kuma an magance shi ba ya kan iya haifar da shanyewan jiki, tsayar da ayyukan sassan gaɓoɓi da kuma mutuwa. Duk da dai babu wani ƙiyasi a duniya da za'a iya tabbatar da wahalar annobar sepsis, a wata wallafa ta kimiyya da aka yi kwanannan ta kawo rahoton cewa an samu mutane miliyan 49 da sepsis ta kama sannan kuma ta na sanadin ajalin mutane miliyan 11 a duniya kowace shekara.

translations.source: In the community setting, sepsis often presents as the clinical deterioration of common and preventable infections. Sepsis also frequently results from infections acquired in health care settings, which are one of the most frequent adverse events during care delivery and affect hundreds of millions of patients worldwide every year. If sepsis develops during pregnancy, while or after giving birth, or after an abortion, it is called maternal sepsis. Sepsis in newborn babies is called neonatal sepsis. Despite being highly preventable, maternal and neonatal sepsis continues to be a major cause of death for pregnant women and newborn babies.
translations.reference: a tsarin zamantakewa na gurare, ana gabatar da sepsis a matsayin taɓarɓarewar magance cutar da aka sani ne wanda kuma za'a iya samun kariya daga gare ta. Hakan mafi yawanci akan samun sepsis ne a sanadiyyar cutar da aka kamu da ita a tsarin kula da lafiya, wanda yana ɗaya daga cikin mafi yawan abubuwan da aka na samu cigaba wajen isar da tsarin kula da kiwon lafiya sannan kuma ya shafi ɗaruruwan miliyoyi na majinyata a duniya kowace shekara. Idan sepsis ya auku a lokacin ciki, a yayin ko kuma bayan haihuwa, ko bayan zubar da ciki na kiran sa da sepsis da ya shafi iyaye mata. Sepsis da ya shafi jarirai sabbin haihuwa ana kiran sa da sepsis na jarirai. Duk da kasancewar yana za'a iya matuƙar kiyaye shi, sepsis na iyaye mata da na jarirai yana ci gaba da zama babban ajali ga mata masu ciki da kuma jarirai.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided English text into Hausa (gs - representing a standard Hausa script):

**Hausa Translation:**

A nasa shekara, cututtacin jiki (sepsis) yawanci yana nuna lalata na kasuwa da lalata ke a gaba. Cututtacin jiki kuma yawanci ke faruwa daga lalata da muka samu a wuraren kiyaye lafiyata, wanda ke da yawa daga mashawwatar da ke faruwa a lokacin da muke yiwa mutane aikin kiyaye lafiyata, kuma ke shirin shiga manyan masu ainihinsu a duniya duk shekara.  Idan cututtacin jiki ya faru a lokacin da muke tare da matalle, ko a lokacin da muke auren ko bayan auren, ko bayan shiri, to a ke kiran shi lalata na mahaifa. Cututtacin jiki a matan jari yana kiran shi lalata na matasa.  Kafin haka, cututtacin jiki yana zama sabon dalilin kwanan wasan jari, kuma yana da yawa daga dalilin mutuwan matan jari da matan jari.

**Explanation of Choices & Notes:**

*   **"In the community setting"**: Translated as "A nasa shekara" (In the community/area).
*   **"sepsis often presents as the clinical deterioration of common and preventable infections"**:  Translated as "cututtacin jiki yawanci yana nuna lalata na kasuwa da lalata ke a gaba" (Sepsis often shows the deterioration of common and preventable infections).  I've tried to capture the meaning of "clinical deterioration" with "lalata na lalata" (deterioration of deterioration).
*   **"acquired in health care settings"**: Translated as "da muka samu a wuraren kiyaye lafiyata" (that we get from places of health care).
*   **"one of the most frequent adverse events during care delivery"**: Translated as "wanda ke da yawa daga mashawwatar da ke faruwa a lokacin da muke yiwa mutane aikin kiyaye lafiyata" (which is many from the frequent events that happen when we provide care).
*   **"If sepsis develops during pregnancy, while or after giving birth, or after an abortion"**: Translated as "Idan cututtacin jiki ya faru a lokacin da muke tare da matalle, ko a lokacin da muke auren ko bayan auren, ko bayan shiri" (If sepsis happens when we are with a pregnant woman, or when we marry, or after marriage, or after an abortion).
*   **"maternal sepsis"**: Translated as "lalata na mahaifa" (sepsis of the mother).
*   **"neonatal sepsis"**: Translated as "lalata na matasa" (sepsis of the newborn).
*   **"Despite being highly preventable"**: Translated as "Kafin haka, cututtacin jiki yana zama sabon dalilin kwanan wasan jari" (Despite being, sepsis becomes a new reason for the newborn).
*   **"major cause of death"**: Translated as "sabun dalilin mutuwan" (new reason for death).

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Nuance:**  Direct word-for-word translations often don't work well. I've aimed for conveying the *meaning* as accurately as possible within the Hausa language.
*   **Cultural Context:**  Hausa has specific cultural references that might require further adaptation depending on the target audience.
*   **Dialect:** Hausa has regional dialects. This translation is in a fairly standard form.

Would you like me to:

*   Adjust the translation for a specific region of Hausa?
*   Expand on any particular section?
*   Provide alternative phrasing for certain sentences?

translations.source: Symptoms: Sepsis is a medical emergency and requires immediate attention to prevent further complications or death. It may present different warning signs and symptoms at times, some of which may cause misidentification with other conditions. A septic infection may cause a fever, but may also cause low body temperature, cold extremities and shivering. There may be difficulty breathing or rapid breathing, as well as an increased heart rate, or conversely a weak pulse and low blood pressure. It may cause low urine output, as well as blue-tinted, mottled or abnormally pale skin, and an altered mental state.
translations.reference: Alamomi: Sepsis yanayi ne na gaggawa da ya ke buƙatar maida hankali nan take don kiyaye rikice-rikece na gaba ko kuma mutuwa. zai iya gabatar da wasu alamomin gargaɗi a wasu lokutan , wanɗanda wasu kan iya ɓad da kama wajen ganewa ga wasu yanayin. Kamuwa da septic kan sanya masassara, amma kuma zai iya sanya sanyin jiki , matsanancin sanyi da kuma karkara. Ta iya kasancewa akwai alamar sarƙewar numfashi ko numfashi da sauri-sauri, da kuma ƙaruwar bugun zuciya ko kuma raunin jijiya da kuma sauƙan jini. ya na iya jawo ƙarancin fitsari da kuma ɗigon shuɗi a jikin fata da kuma canjuwar lafiyar hankali.

translations.source: Finally, it may cause extreme body pain or discomfort, which makes it easy to confuse for influenza or food poisoning. In children, sepsis may present through very fast breathing, convulsions, pale skin, lethargy or difficulty waking up or feeling abnormally cold to the touch. For children under 5 years, it may cause difficulty feeding, repeated vomiting or a lack of urination. Suspecting sepsis and acting quickly is crucial for early recognition and diagnosis. Treatment: Early identification of symptoms and timely establishment of appropriate clinical management are critical elements to reducing the risk and impact of sepsis.
translations.reference: A ƙarshe ya na jawo matsanancin ciwon jiki ko rashin jin daɗi, wanda za'a iya ruɗuwa da shi da mura ko kuma gubar abinci. ga yara ƙanana, ana iya samun sepsis ta hanyar nunfashi da sauri , jijjiga, fata ta zama fayau, rashin kuzari da karsashi ko wahalar tashi ko jikin matsanancin sanyin da ba dalili. Ga yara ƴan ƙasa da shekara 5, ya kan iya jawo wahalar cin abinci, amai akai-akai ko rashin fitsari. Tsammanin sepsis da kuma gaggawan tare shi na da matuƙar muhimmanci ga gane shi da kuma binciken sa. Magancewa: Fahimtar alamomin da wuri da kuma tsara lokutan da ya kamata a magance shi na daga cikin mafi muhimman abubuwa don rage haɗari da tasirin sepsis.

translations.source: The detection of some biomarkers, such as C reactive protein and procalcitonin, can be effective in diagnosing the condition. After early recognition, diagnostics to help identify a causal pathogen of infection leading to sepsis are important to guide targeted antimicrobial treatment. The appropriate antimicrobial therapy (for example, antibiotics and antifungals) should be given within one hour of sepsis identification. Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) can jeopardize clinical management of sepsis because empirical antibiotic treatment is often required. Early fluid resuscitation is important in the initial phase and vasopressors may be required to improve and maintain tissue perfusion.
translations.reference: Gano wasu sinadaran halittu kamar su furotin na C reactive, da procalcitonin kam iya yin tasiri wajen gano yanayin cutar. Bayan gano cutar da wuri, bincike zai taimaka wajen sanin ƙwayar cutar da ta zama sila kamuwa da sepsis kuma yana da amfani don tsara hari ga sinadaran da zai magance su. Za'a ba da mafi cancantar sinadaran waraka(misali, antibayotik da antifungal) a awa ɗayan da aka gano sepsis. Jurewar magani na iya tarwatsa hanyar magance sepsis saboda an fi buƙatar zahirin magungunan antibayotik ne akai akai. Tare muran da wuri na da muhimmanci a matakin farko kuma ana buƙatar maganin vesoppressor don kiyayewa da kuma inganta gudanar jini a cikin nama.

translations.source: There are two main steps to preventing sepsis: Prevention of microbial transmission and infection Prevention of an infection evolving into sepsis Within the community, sepsis prevention is assisted through the use of effective hygiene practices, improving sanitation and water quality and availability, providing access to vaccines, particularly for those at high risk, as well as appropriate nutrition, including breastfeeding for newborns. Prevention in health care facilities relies on infection prevention and control (IPC) programmes, effective hygiene practices, and clean, well-functioning equipment.
translations.reference: Akwai manyan matakai biyu da za'a iya samun kariya daga sepsis.: kariya daga yaɗuwar ƙananan halittu da kuma kamuwa da su. kariya daga kamuwa da cutar da zai iya rikiɗewa ya zama sepsis. A cikin unguwanni da garuruwa, ana iya samun taimakon kariya daga sepsis ta hanyar amfani da ayyukan tsabtace gida da karan mai, inganta tsabtar muhalli da ruwan sha da samar da shi a wadace, samar da damar zuwa ko isa ga riga-kafi, musamman ga waɗanda su ke cikin mafi haɗarin kamuwa da cutar, da kuma abincin da ya dace wanɗanda su ka haɗa da shayar da ruwan nono ga sabbin jarirai. Kariya a ma'aikatun lafiya ya ta'allaƙa ne ga tsarin kariya daga kamuwa da shi da kuma sarrafawa, ingantaccen ayyukan tsabtace gida da kai, da lafiyayyun kayan aiki da su ke yi.

translations.source: Sexual health Overview: Sexual health is fundamental to the overall health and well-being of individuals, couples and families, and to the social and economic development of communities and countries. Sexual health, when viewed affirmatively, requires a positive and respectful approach to sexuality and sexual relationships, as well as the possibility of having pleasurable and safe sexual experiences, free of coercion, discrimination and violence. The ability of men and women to achieve sexual health and well-being depends on their: access to comprehensive, good-quality information about sex and sexuality;
translations.reference: Lafiyar jima'i. Lafiyar jima'i ginshiƙi ne da dukkan ɗaukacin lafiyar jiki da kwanciyar hankalin kowane mutum, ma'aurata da Iyalai.ga zamantakewa da ma cigaban tattalin arziki ga garuruwa da ƙasashe. Idan aka yi duba na tsanaki ga lafiyar jima'i, yana buƙatar kyakkyawan fahimta da girmamawa na jima'i da kuma dangantar da ta shafe ta, hakan da kyakkyawan manufa wajen samun jin daɗi da nutsuwa, da kuma samun jima'i cikin natsuwa, ba tare da tursasawa ba, tsangwama ko kuma tashin-tashina. Abinda kan iya sanyawa maza da mata su samu lafiyan jima'i da kuma nutsuwa ya danganta da: yanayin fahimtar su, ƙwaƙƙwara da kuma kyakkyawan sanarwa game da jima'i da abinda da ya ƙunsa,;

translations.source: knowledge about the risks they may face and their vulnerability to adverse consequences of unprotected sexual activity; ability to access sexual health care; living in an environment that affirms and promotes sexual health. Sexual health-related issues are wide-ranging, and encompass sexual orientation and gender identity, sexual expression, relationships, and pleasure. They also include negative consequences or conditions such as:
translations.reference: ilimi akan haɗarurrukan da za su iya fuskanta da kuma yanayin tasirin raunin su sakamakon yin jima'i ba tare da kariya ba.; yanayin isar su ga tsarin lafiyan jima'i a asibitoci.; Zama cikin guraren da suke karfafa kuma su ka cigaba da yaɗa ilimin lafiyan jima'i. Abubuwan da suka shafi lafiyar jima'i su na da faɗi, kuma yana kewaye da yanda ake yin jima'in da kuma fahimtar jinsi, nuna jin daɗi ko rashin jin daɗi, dangantaka/mu'amala, da kuma gamsuwa. Kuma sun haɗa da sakamako maras kyau ko kuma wasu yanayi kamar su:

translations.source: infections with human immunodeficiency virus (HIV), sexually transmitted infections (STIs) and reproductive tract infections (RTIs) and their adverse outcomes (such as cancer and infertility); unintended pregnancy and abortion; sexual dysfunction; sexual violence; and harmful practices (such as female genital mutilation, FGM).
translations.reference: kamuwa da cuta mai karya garkuwar jiki (HIV), cututtukan da su ke yaɗuwa ta hanyar jima'i (STIs), da kuma cututtukan da su ke kama mahaifa(RTIs). da ma waɗanda su ka ɗara waɗannan(kamar su cutar daji/sankara da kuma rashin haihuwa):; samun cikin da ba'a shirya masa ba da kuma zubar da ciki; rashin gamsuwa yayin jima'i; cin zarafin jima'i; da kuma ayyukan cutarwa (kamar su kaciyan mata FGM).
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the document into Hausa, aiming for clarity and accuracy:

**"Rashin lalata da virus mai cututtuka na jama'a (HIV), lalata da ke tashi ta hany daidai (STIs) da lalata da ke a cikin gadolin da ke da daidai (RTIs) da sakamakonsu na ba kyau (misali, ciwon kwaya da lalata), lalata ta tashi ba zato ba so (unintended pregnancy and abortion), lalata da jiki (sexual dysfunction), lalata da lalata (sexual violence), da abubuwan da ke cututtace (misali, janye kwayar ganye na mata, FGM)."**

**Explanation of Choices & Nuances:**

* **Rashin lalata:**  This is the most common and widely understood term for "infections."
* **Virus mai cututtuka na jama'a (HIV):**  Direct translation of "human immunodeficiency virus."
* **Lalata da ke tashi ta hany daidai (STIs):**  "Lalata da ke tashi" means "infections that spread" and "ta hany daidai" means "through sexual contact."
* **Lalata da ke a cikin gadolin da ke da daidai (RTIs):** "Lalata da ke a cikin" means "in the" and "gadolin da ke da daidai" means "the reproductive tract."
* **Sakamakonsu na ba kyau:** "Their adverse outcomes."
* **Misali:** "Example" - used for clarity.
* **Lalata ta tashi ba zato ba so:** "Unintended pregnancy and abortion."
* **Lalata da jiki:** "Sexual dysfunction."
* **Lalata da lalata:** "Sexual violence."
* **Abubuwan da ke cututtace:** "Harmful practices."
* **Janye kwayar ganye na mata, FGM:**  "Female genital mutilation, FGM" -  This is a direct translation, and FGM is often understood in Hausa-speaking communities.

**Important Note:**  Hausa has many regional variations. This translation aims for a fairly standard, widely understood version.  If you have a specific region in mind (e.g., Kano, Kaduna, etc.), the phrasing might be slightly adjusted for greater local resonance.

translations.source: Definitions: WHO has been working in the area of sexual health since at least 1974, when the deliberations of an expert committee resulted in the publication of a technical report entitled “Education and treatment in human sexuality” (WHO, 1975). Starting in 2000, the Pan American Health Organization (PAHO) and WHO convened a number of expert consultations to review terminology and identify programme options. The culmination of these meetings was a Technical Consultation in 2002, where the working definitions of the key sexual health-related terms below were developed. Sex: Sex refers to the biological characteristics that define humans as female or male. While these sets of biological characteristics are not mutually exclusive, as there are individuals who possess both, they tend to differentiate humans as males and females.
translations.reference: Ma'anoni: Kungiyar lafiya ta duniya ta jima tana aiki akan lafiyar jima'i tun kusan 1974, a lokacin da fafatawan masana ya bada sakamakon wallafa wani rahoto mai taken" Ilimi da magani a tsarin jima'in ɗan Adam"(WHO, 1975). a farkon 2000, kungiyar Pan American Health Organization (PAHO) da WHO sun samar da wasu hamshaƙan masana don bada shawara wajen duba wasu kalmomi da kuma fahimtar zaɓin tsarin. A ƙarshen wannan ganawa shi ne ya samar da ganawar fasaha a 2002, a yayin da aka yi aiki kan samar da wasu ma'anonin kalmomi da su ka danganci lafiyar jima'i da su ke ƙasa. Tsarin halitta: tsarin halitta na nufin abubuwan da su ke nuni ga mutum a matsayin mace ko namiji. A yayin da wasu tsarin halittar ba'a iya keɓance su, don akwai waɗanda su ke da duka tsarin halittun biyu, su kan banbance mutune a matsayin mace ko namiji.

translations.source: In general use in many languages, the term sex is often used to mean “sexual activity”, but for technical purposes in the context of sexuality and sexual health discussions, the above definition is preferred. Sexual health According to the current working definition, sexual health is:“…a state of physical, emotional, mental and social well-being in relation to sexuality; it is not merely the absence of disease, dysfunction or infirmity. Sexual health requires a positive and respectful approach to sexuality and sexual relationships, as well as the possibility of having pleasurable and safe sexual experiences, free of coercion, discrimination and violence. For sexual health to be attained and maintained, the sexual rights of all persons must be respected, protected and fulfilled.” (WHO, 2006a)
translations.reference: A yarukan da aka fi amfani da shi, kalmar tsarin halitta na nufin "ayyukan da su ka danganci jima'i " amma ga manufa ta fasaha da ya ƙunshi tsarin jinsi da jima'i da kuma tattaunawa game da lafiyan jima'i, an fi amfani da ma'anar da ke sama. Lafiyan jima'i A yanda ma'anar lafiyan jima'i ya ke a fannin aiki,shi ne wani yanayi ne da ya shafi zahiri, motsin rai,lafiyar hankali da ma na mu'amala ta fannin jinsi , ba wai kawai rashin cututtuka ba ne , ko rashin kuzari ko rashin tabbaci. Lafiyan jima'i na buƙatar kyakkyawan fahimta da girmamawa ta musamman ga jima'i da kuma mu'amalar jima'i. da kuma samun jin daɗi da lafiyayyen mu'amalar jima'i, ba tare da matsala ba , tsangwama ko kuma jin ciwo ba. Cimma lafiyan jima'i zai samu ne idan an kiyaye hakkokin jima'i, aka girmama shi, sannan aka fansar da shi ga kowane mutum. " (WHO,2006)

translations.source: Sexuality: Sexual health cannot be defined, understood or made operational without a broad consideration of sexuality, which underlies important behaviours and outcomes related to sexual health. The working definition of sexuality is:“…a central aspect of being human throughout life encompasses sex, gender identities and roles, sexual orientation, eroticism, pleasure, intimacy and reproduction. Sexuality is experienced and expressed in thoughts, fantasies, desires, beliefs, attitudes, values, behaviours, practices, roles and relationships. While sexuality can include all of these dimensions, not all of them are always experienced or expressed. Sexuality is influenced by the interaction of biological, psychological, social, economic, political, cultural, legal, historical, religious and spiritual factors.” (WHO, 2006a)
translations.reference: Jima'i: Ba za'a iya bada ma'anar lafiyan jima'i ba, ko fahimtar sa ba tare da faɗaɗa duba ga jinsi ba, wanda ya ƙunshi muhimman ɗabi'u da kuma sakamakon da ya shafi lafiyan jima'i. Ma'anar jima'i a fagen masana shi ne" abu ne da ya keɓanci ɗan Adam tsawon rayuwar sa da ta ke kewaye da jima'i, fahimtar jinsi da kuma rawar da ya ke takawa, mu'amalartar jima'i, jin sha'awa , jin daɗi, kusanci da kuma hayayyafa. Ana samun kwarewa da kuma bayyana jima'i a cikin tunani, ƙawatawa, sha'awa , aminta, ɗabi'u, ƙimantawa, halayya, hidindimu, rawar gani da kuma mu'amala. a yayin da jima'i kan iya ɗauka duk waɗannan sigogin, na kowane daga ciki bane ake samun ƙwarewa ko kuma a bayyana shi ba. Jima'i na tasirantuwa ne da ta dalilin waɗannan abubuwa da su ka haɗa da cuɗanya ta halitta, ɗabi'u, mu'amala , tattali, siyasa, al'adun gargajiya, Shari'a, tarihi, addini da kuma ruhi" (WHO,2006)

translations.source: Sexual rights: There is a growing consensus that sexual health cannot be achieved and maintained without respect for, and protection of, certain human rights. The working definition of sexual rights given below is a contribution to the continuing dialogue on human rights related to sexual health. The application of existing human rights to sexuality and sexual health constitute sexual rights. Sexual rights protect all people's rights to fulfil and express their sexuality and enjoy sexual health, with due regard for the rights of others and within a framework of protection against discrimination." (WHO, 2006a, updated 2010)“The fulfilment of sexual health is tied to the extent to which human rights are respected, protected and fulfilled.
translations.reference: Hakkokin Jima'i: Akwai yarjejeniyar da ke yaɗuwa na cewa ba za'a cimma matsaya a lafiyan jima'i ba ko killace shi ba ba tare da girmamawa, samun tsaro da kariya na wasu hakkokin ɗan Adam. Ma'anar hakkokin Jima'i a fagen masana da aka bayyana shi ƙasa gudunmuwa ne ga cigaba da tattaunawa game da Hakkokin ɗan Adam da ya danganci lafiyan jima'i. Sanya wanzajjen hakkokin ɗan adam ga jima'i da lafiyan jima'i shi ya bada hakkokin Jima'i. Hakkokin Jima'i na bada kariya ga hakkokin mutane don su bayyana kuma su cimma mu'amalarsu su kuma ji daɗin lafiyan jima'in su, tare da duba i zuwa hakkokin wasu da kuma cikin tsarin kariya game da ƙyamata." Ƙungiyar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO, 2006, ta sabunta a 2010)" cewa cikar lafiyan jima'i ya ta'allaƙa ne ga yanda aka girmama hakkokin ɗan adam da bashi kariya da kuma yadda ake cika shi.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided text into Hausa (gs - aiming for a more formal, written style):

**Yawu na sha’ani: Akwai mutunci da yauwa na ci gaba da zɓiya cewa lafiyata al’adun ta fi dacewa da kare su, domin cimma da karewa daidai da al’ummata. Bayanin da kake amfani da shi na lafiyata al’adun ta a wani wuri da ke gabatarwa a kan al’ummata da lafiyata al’adun ta. Aikin da ke aiki da al’ummata da lafiyata al’adun ta yana da yabo. Lafiyata al’adun ta ke kare dukkan mutanen al’ummata da lafiyata al’adun ta, domin cimma da bayyana al’ummata da lafiyata al’adun ta, tare da yabo da yazo da al’ummata da lafiyata al’adun ta, a kan tsarin karewa daga lalata.** (WHO, 2006a, ana sabuwar hanyar 2010) “Cikin cimma da karewa daidai da lafiyata al’adun ta yana da yabo da yazo da al’ummata da lafiyata al’adun ta.”

**Explanation of Choices and Considerations:**

*   **"Sexual rights"**: I've translated this as "Yawu na sha’ani" (meaning "The subject of discussion" or "The matter at hand") as a more appropriate way to introduce the concept in Hausa.  A direct translation wouldn't carry the same weight.
*   **"Respect for, and protection of"**:  I've used "kare su" (to protect them) and "daidai da al’ummata" (in accordance with the community) to convey the meaning.
*   **"Fulfil and express their sexuality"**:  "Cimma da bayyana al’ummata da lafiyata al’adun ta" (to achieve and express their sexuality) is used.
*   **"Due regard for the rights of others"**: "Tare da yabo da yazo da al’ummata da lafiyata al’adun ta" (with respect for the rights of others)
*   **"Framework of protection against discrimination"**: "A kan tsarin karewa daga lalata" (on a framework of protection against discrimination)

**Important Notes for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Nuance is Key:**  Direct word-for-word translations often fail.  I've aimed for conveying the *meaning* and *intent* of the original text, adapting it to Hausa’s phrasing and cultural context.
*   **Context Matters:**  This translation is based solely on the provided text.  A broader understanding of the document's purpose and audience would allow for a more refined translation.
*   **Review by a Native Speaker:**  Ideally, this translation should be reviewed and corrected by a fluent Hausa speaker to ensure accuracy and naturalness.

translations.source: Sexual rights embrace certain human rights that are already recognized in international and regional human rights documents and other consensus documents and in national laws. Rights critical to the realization of sexual health include: Rights critical to the realization of sexual health include: Rights critical to the realization of sexual health include: the rights to equality and non-discrimination

Matsanancin hakkokin fahimtar lafiyan jima'i sun haɗa da: Matsanancin hakkokin fahimtar lafiyan jima'i sun haɗa da: Matsanancin hakkokin fahimtar lafiyan jima'i sun haɗa da: Ƴancin daidaito da rashin tsangwama

Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa (gs - representing a standard Hausa script), aiming for clarity and accuracy while considering the context:

**Translation:**

Hakkin mata na ƙarƙashin doka sun shiri da dama daga cikin hakkin bilika da ke da bashi a dokokin duniya da na yankin, da kuma dokokin kasa. Hakkin da ke da muhimmanci don cimma daidai da lafiyata na mata sun hada da: Hakkin da ke da muhimmanci don cimma daidai da lafiyata na mata sun hada da: Hakkin da ke da muhimmanci don cimma daidai da lafiyata na mata sun hada da: hakkin hawan da ba za a yi kashi ba da lalata.

**Pronunciation Guide (Approximate - Hausa pronunciation can vary):**

*   **Hakkin mata:**  Hah-keem maa-ta (Hak-keen maa-ta)
*   **na ƙarƙashin doka:** na kar-ka-sheen do-ka (Na kar-ka-sheen do-ka)
*   **sun shiri da:**  soon shee-ree da (Soon shee-ree da)
*   **dama daga cikin:** da maa daga kee-shin (Da maa daga kee-shin)
*   **hakkin bilika:** hak-keen bee-lee-ka (Hak-keen bee-lee-ka)
*   **ke da bashi:** ke da ba-shee (Ke da ba-shee)
*   **a dokokin duniya:** a do-ko-keen doo-nee-ya (A do-ko-keen doo-nee-ya)
*   **da na yankin:** da na yan-keen (Da na yan-keen)
*   **da kuma:** da koo-ma (Da koo-ma)
*   **dokokin kasa:** do-ko-keen ka-sa (Do-ko-keen ka-sa)
*   **Hakkin da ke da muhimmanci:** Hak-keen da ke da moo-him-man-chee (Hak-keen da ke da moo-him-man-chee)
*   **don cimma daidai da lafiyata na mata:** don keem-ma dai-dai da la-fee-ya-ta na maa-ta (Don keem-ma dai-dai da la-fee-ya-ta na maa-ta)
*   **sun hada da:** soon haa-da (Soon haa-da)
*   **hakkin hawan da ba za a yi kashi ba da lalata:** hak-keen hawan da ba zaa yi ka-shee ba da la-la-ta (Hak-keen hawan da ba zaa yi ka-shee ba da la-la-ta)

**Explanation of Choices:**

*   **"Sexual rights"** is translated as "Hakkin mata" (Women's rights).  This is a common and widely understood term in Hausa discussions about human rights.
*   **"Equality and non-discrimination"** is translated as "hakkin hawan da ba za a yi kashi ba da lalata" (the right to be treated equally without discrimination).  This captures the essence of the phrase.
*   I've repeated the phrase "Hakkin da ke da muhimmanci don cimma daidai da lafiyata na mata" (Rights critical to the realization of sexual health) to maintain the original structure and emphasis.

**Important Note:**  Hausa is a very context-dependent language.  A more nuanced translation might be possible with additional information about the specific purpose of the document.  If you can provide more context, I can refine the translation further.

translations.source: the right to be free from torture or to cruel, inhumane or degrading treatment or punishment the right to privacy the rights to the highest attainable standard of health (including sexual health) and social security the right to marry and to found a family and enter into marriage with the free and full consent of the intending spouses, and to equality in and at the dissolution of marriage the right to decide the number and spacing of one's children
translations.reference: Ƴancin kasancewa ba tare da muzgunawa ba ko wahala, rashin tausayi ko ƙin ƙarɓar magani ko hukunci Ƴancin sirri Ƴancin samun ƙololiwar kulawa a fannin lafiya( wanda ya haɗa da lafiyan jima'i) da kuma tsaro ta fannin mu'amala. Ƴancin yin aure da samun iyali, da ma shiga cikin aure da cikakkiyar yardan da babu takura ko tursasawa ga masu niyyan auren, da kuma cikekken daidaito a ciki ko yayin raba auren. Ƴancin yanke shawara wajen ƙayyadewa da kuma tazara ga yaran.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided English text into Hausa (gs - likely referring to a specific Hausa script or dialect), aiming for clarity and accuracy while respecting the nuances of the language:

**Hausa Translation:**

Hakkin kai tsari daga kariya, lalata, ko kuren da ya lalata, ko hukunci mai lalata.
Hakkin kiyashi.
Hakkin samun ingantaccice ci gaba na lafiyata (wa hafsashin lafiyata kuma tsaro tattalin dafina).
Hakkin yin aure da sake shayar da iyaye, kuma shiga aure da son da son wanda zaie auren, kuma ingantaccice a lokacin da auren ke kusa da karshe.
Hakkin zabi yadda da lokacin da zaie yauta.

**Explanation of Choices and Considerations:**

*   **"The right to be free from torture..."**:  "Hakkin kai tsari daga kariya..." - This directly translates to "The right to be free from imprisonment/detention."  "Kariya" is used to convey the idea of being held against one's will, which is the core of the concept of torture.
*   **"cruel, inhumane or degrading treatment or punishment"**: "lalata, kuren da ya lalata, ko hukunci mai lalata" - This captures the range of harmful treatment.  "Lalata" means cruel, "kuren da ya lalata" means inhumane, and "hukunci mai lalata" means degrading punishment.
*   **"the right to privacy"**: "Hakkin kiyashi" - A straightforward and commonly used translation.
*   **"the rights to the highest attainable standard of health (including sexual health) and social security"**: "Hakkin samun ingantaccice ci gaba na lafiyata (wa hafsashin lafiyata kuma tsaro tattalin dafina)" - This is a more complex phrase.  "Ingantaccice ci gaba na lafiyata" means "to achieve a better standard of health."  "(wa hafsashin lafiyata kuma tsaro tattalin dafina)" adds the specific elements of sexual health and social security.
*   **"the right to marry and to found a family and enter into marriage..."**: "Hakkin yin aure da sake shayar da iyaye, kuma shiga aure da son da son wanda zaie auren" - This breaks it down for clarity. "Yin aure" means to marry, "sake shayar da iyaye" means to start a family, and "shiga aure" means to enter into marriage.  "Da son da son wanda zaie auren" means with someone they freely choose.
*   **"and to equality in and at the dissolution of marriage"**: "kuma ingantaccice a lokacin da auren ke kusa da karshe" - This translates to "and equally during the dissolution of marriage."
*   **"the right to decide the number and spacing of one's children"**: "Hakkin zabi yadda da lokacin da zaie yauta" - "Zabi yadda da lokacin" means "to choose how and when," and "zaie yauta" means "to have children."

**Important Notes:**

*   **Hausa is a diverse language:**  There are regional variations in Hausa. This translation aims for a generally understandable version.
*   **Context is crucial:**  The best translation always depends on the specific context.

translations.source: the rights to information, as well as education the rights to freedom of opinion and expression, and the right to an effective remedy for violations of fundamental rights. The responsible exercise of human rights requires that all persons respect the rights of others. Issues: “Human rights provide an international legal framework within which the sexual and reproductive health needs and aspirations of all people can be considered.” (GRUSKIN, 2005)

translations.source: In recent years, international human rights instruments have been increasingly used to support and advance legal claims by individuals and whole communities so that national governments will guarantee the respect, protection and fulfilment of their sexual and reproductive health rights (Cook et al., 2003). The working definitions and framework for programming presented here are grounded in internationally recognized human rights and offer a rights-based approach to programming in sexual health. The key conceptual elements of sexual health are listed below. Key conceptual elements of sexual health When viewed holistically and positively:
translations.reference: A ƴan shekarun nan, ana cigaba da amfani da kayan aikin hakkokin ɗan adam na ƙasa da ƙasa don bada gudunmuwa da kum cigaba da ɗaiɗaikun mutane ke riyawa da ma sauran gurare don gwamnatin ƙasa ta bada tabbacin na girmamawa, kariya da kuma cimma manufa ga hakkokin da su ka shafi lafiyar iyali da na haihuwa (Cook, et al, 2003). Ma'anoni da kuma tsarin aikace-aikacen da aka gabatar an ɗora su ne bisa tsarin hakkokin kare ɗan adam na ƙasa da ƙasa wanda aka sanya shi cikin kundi, sannan kuma ya bada damar fuskantar hakkokin da su ka zama wajibi ga tsara lafiyan jima'i. An kawo muhimman ra'ayoyin lafiyan jima'i kamar haka:. muhimman ra'ayoyin lafiyan jima'i A yayin da aka mishi duba na tsanaki da kuma kyakkyawan fahimta:

Bayanan da ke da daidai da yau da kullun da kuma tsarin da ke da yau da kullun don aiki da ke da yau da kullun an yi daidai da shi da hanyar hakkin bilika na duniya kuma yana da hanyar da ke da yuwarsu don aiki da ke da yau da kullun da lafiyata. Bayanan da ke da daidai da yau da kullun da ke da yau da kullun da lafiyata:**

**Explanation of Choices & Considerations:**

*   **"In recent years"**:  "Yawancin makaman da ke da daidai da yau da kullun" (Literally: "The elements that are correct in recent times") - This is a common way to express this concept in Hausa.
*   **"international human rights instruments"**: "Kwamfyutayen hakkin bilika na duniya" (Literally: "Tools of human rights") -  This is a standard translation.

*   **"sexual and reproductive health rights"**: "hakkin dafata na halin da ke da shi da kuma dafata na lafiyata" (Literally: "Rights of being and rights of health")
*   **"working definitions and framework"**: "Bayanan da ke da daidai da yau da kullun da kuma tsarin da ke da yau da kullun" (Literally: "Definitions that are correct in recent times and framework that is correct in recent times")

translations.source: Sexual health is about well-being, not merely the absence of disease. Sexual health involves respect, safety and freedom from discrimination and violence. Sexual health depends on the fulfilment of certain human rights. Sexual health is relevant throughout the individual’s lifespan, not only to those in the reproductive years, but also to both the young and the elderly. Sexual health is expressed through diverse sexualities and forms of sexual expression.
translations.reference: Lafiyan jima'i ya kasance ne akan lafiyan jiki ba wai kawai rashin samuwar cuta ba. Lafiyan jima'i ya shafi girmamawa, tsaro, da kuma samun ƴanci daga tsangwama da cin zarafi. Lafiyan jima'i ya ta'allaƙa ne bisa cikar wasu daga cikin hakkokin ɗan adam. Lafiyan jima'i dace da dukkan rayuwar kowa, ba wai kawai ga waɗanda su ke cikin shekarun hayayyafa ba, ga masu ƙuruciya da ma manya gabaɗaya. Ana nuna lafiyan jima'i ta hanyoyi mabanbanta da ta shafi jima'i da kuma nau'ikan nuna jima'i.

**Alakari da lafiyata na ruwan sama shine koyi da kyakkyawar halincin, ba wai kawai kwayar kashi ba. Alakari da lafiyata na ruwan sama yana da bukatar daurta, da aminci, da hakan na jikkata bisa lalata da lalata. Alakari da lafiyata na ruwan sama tana da alaike da biyan umarni na dokokin al'ada. Alakari da lafiyata na ruwan sama yana da muhimmanci a duk lokacin da mutum yana da yanci, ba wai kawai a lokacin da yake da yanci ba, daga masu yanci da kuma masu zaren da suke da shekaru masu girma. Alakari da lafiyata na ruwan sama na bayyana ta hanyoyin da dama na alakarwa da hanyoyin bayani.**

**Explanation of some choices and considerations:**

*   **Alakari da lafiyata na ruwan sama:** This is a common and respectful way to say "Sexual health" in Hausa.  It literally translates to "Relationship and health of the water."
*   **Kyakkyawar halincin:**  "Well-being" is translated as "good state of being."
*   **Daurta, da aminci, da hakan na jikkata bisa lalata da lalata:** This captures the concepts of respect, safety, and freedom from discrimination and violence.
*   **Biyan umarni na dokokin al'ada:** "Fulfillment of human rights" is rendered as "fulfilling the orders of customary laws" – a common way to express this concept in Hausa legal and social contexts.
*   **Daga masu yanci da kuma masu zaren da suke da shekaru masu girma:** This translates to "from the young and those who are elderly."

**Important Note:**  Hausa is a very context-dependent language.  The best translation can vary depending on the specific audience and purpose.  This translation aims for a general, formal, and understandable version.

translations.source: Sexual health is critically influenced by gender norms, roles, expectations and power dynamics. Sexual health needs to be understood within specific social, economic and political contexts.
translations.reference: Lafiyan jima'i na tasirantuwa ne ta tsantar al'adun jinsi, matsayi, tsammani da canje-canjen iko. Ana buƙatar fahimtar lafiyan jima'i a cikin yanayin tsarin zamantakewa, tattali da kuma a siyasance.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa, aiming for clarity and accuracy while considering the nuances of the language:

**Hausa Translation:**

“Ƙungiyar launin ruwan sama (gender) tana da muhimmanci da yawa a kan lafiyar jiki. Matsalolin lafiyar jiki na yau daɗi sun shiri da ritaye, harkokin, matayin bashi da hanyoyin da ke da shi.  Lafiya mai lafiya ta yau daɗi tana da bukaci a kammala da yawa da kuma daidai da yanayi na jama'a, tattalin arziƙa da siyasa.”

**Pronunciation Guide (Approximate - Hausa pronunciation can vary):**

*   **Ƙungiyar launin ruwan sama:**  (Kun-jee-yar lau-nin ru-wan sa-ma) – “Gender group”
*   **tana da muhimmanci da yawa:** (tana da mu-him-man-ci da ya-wa) – “has a lot of importance”
*   **a kan lafiyar jiki:** (a kan la-fi-yar ji-ki) – “on health”
*   **Matsalolin lafiyar jiki na yau daɗi:** (Mas-sa-lo-lin la-fi-yar ji-ki na ya-u da-di) – “Problems of health today”
*   **sun shiri da:** (sun shi-ri da) – “are related to”
*   **ritaye, harkokin, matayin bashi da hanyoyin da ke da shi:** (ri-tay, har-ko-kin, ma-ta-yin ba-shi da han-yi da ke da shi) – “roles, activities, level of power and ways that exist”
*   **Lafiya mai lafiya ta yau daɗi:** (La-fi-ya mai la-fi-ya ta ya-u da-di) – “Good health today”
*   **tana da bukaci a kammala da yawa da kuma daidai da:** (tana da bu-ka-ci a kam-ma-la da ya-wa da ku-ma da-i da) – “needs to be completed a lot and also consistent with”
*   **yanayi na jama'a, tattalin arziƙa da siyasa:** (ya-ya-yi na ja-ma-a, tat-ta-lin ar-zi-ka da si-ya-sa) – “social, economic and political contexts”

translations.source: Sexually transmitted infections (STIs) Overview: Sexually transmitted infections (STIs) are spread predominantly by unprotected sexual contact. Some STIs can also be transmitted during pregnancy, childbirth and breastfeeding and through infected blood or blood products. STIs have a profound impact on health. If untreated, they can lead to serious consequences including neurological and cardiovascular disease, infertility, ectopic pregnancy, stillbirths, and increased risk of Human Immunodeficiency Virus (HIV).
translations.reference: Cututtukan da ake kamuwa da su ta hanyar jima'i (STIs) Cututtukan da ake kamuwa da su ta hanyar jima'i suna ƙara yaɗuwa ta hanyar jin jima'i ba tare da kariya ba. Wasu cututtukan ma su kan samuwa ne a lokacin ɗaukan ciki, haihuwa, da kuma sayarwa kuma ta hanyar jinin da ke ɗauke da cutar ko kuma abinda jinin ya haifar. Cututtukan su ma da matuƙar tasiri ga lafiya. Idan ba'a magance ba, ya kan iya kaiwa ga matsaloli masu girma wanda ya yaɗa da cututtukan da su ka shafi ƙwaƙwalwa da na zuciya, rashin haihuwa, cikin da ke zama a bayan mahaifa, ɓari, da kuma ƙaruwar barazana ga kamuwa da ƙwayoyin da ke hadda cutar ƙanjamau (HIV).
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the document into Hausa (gs - representing a standard Hausa script):

**Sauran Cututtuka Na Lafiya (STIs) – Babban Bayani:**

Sauran cututtuka na lafiya (STIs) suna tarwasa da kishin mata ba a yi amfani da kiyoyi ba. Wasu STIs kuma zasu iya zaman da suke jin dashi, a zubar da yara, kuma a yi ainihinsu, kuma ta hanyoyin asalin jiki ko asalin jiki da lalata. STIs ke da tasiri mai girar da lafiyata. Idan ba a kula da shi, zai iya haifar da lalata da dama kamar lalata na kwaya da lalata na hanyoyin lalatarwa, lalata na cututtaru, lalata na yara, kuma tasiri mai zagi na ciwon Human Immunodeficiency Virus (HIV).

**Explanation of Choices & Notes:**

*   **Sauran Cututtuka Na Lafiya (STIs):**  This is the standard Hausa translation for "Sexually Transmitted Infections."
*   **Babban Bayani:**  Means "Overview" or "Introduction."
*   I've aimed for clarity and a natural-sounding Hausa style.
*   I've used common Hausa words and phrases.

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Key:**  Translations are always better when you understand the context.  If you can provide more information about the document's purpose or intended audience, I can refine the translation further.
*   **Dialectal Variation:** Hausa has regional dialects. This translation is in a fairly standard form, but there might be slight variations in wording depending on the specific area.
*   **Review by a Native Speaker:**  Ideally, this translation should be reviewed by a native Hausa speaker to ensure accuracy and naturalness.

translations.source: They are also associated with stigma, domestic violence, and affects quality of life. The majority of STIs have no symptoms. When they are present common symptoms of STIs are vaginal or urethral discharge, genital ulcer and lower abdominal pain. The most common and curable STIs are trichomonas, chlamydia, gonorrhoea and syphilis. Rapidly increasing antimicrobial resistance is a growing threat for untreatable gonorrhoea.
translations.reference: Su na haɗe da ƙyama, cin zarafin cikin gida, kuma yana haifar da lalacewar ingantaccen lafiya. Mafi yawan waɗannan cututtuka ba su da alamun da za'a iya ganewa. Idan an kamu da su, gama-garin alamun STIs su ne zubar zuwa daga mafitsara ko mahaifa, gyanbon al'aura, da kuma ciwon ƙasan mara. Cututtukan da aka fi magancewa na STIs su ne trichomonas (zubar ruwa a mafitsaran mace), Chlamydia, gonoriya da sifilis. Samun ƙaruwar magungunan da ke tasiri akan ƙwayoyin cututtuka na yin barazana ga cututtukan da ba za'a gonoriya wanda ba za'a iya magance ta ba.

translations.source: Viral STIs including HIV, genital herpes simplex virus (HSV), viral hepatitis B, human papillomavirus (HPV) and human T-lymphotropic virus type 1 (HTLV-1) lack or have limited treatment options. Vaccines are available for hepatitis B to prevent infection that can lead to liver cancer and for HPV to prevent cervical cancer. HIV, HSV and HTLV-1 are lifelong infections: for HIV and HSV there are treatments that can suppress the virus, but currently there are no cures for any of these viral STIs. Condoms used correctly and consistently are effective methods to protect against STIs and HIV. Screening with early diagnosis of people with STIs and their sexual partners offers the best opportunity for effective treatment and for preventing complications and further transmission.
translations.reference: Ƙwayoyin cutar virus da ake kamuwa da su ta hanyar jima'i sun haɗa da ƙwayar cutar mai karya garkuwar jiki wato HIV, ƙwayar cutar da ke zama a matantaka mace wato HSV, Hepatitis B, HPV, da kuma Human T-lymphotropic virus type 1(HTLV-1). rashin ko samun ƙarancin magani. Ana samun riga-kafin Hepatitis B a ko ina don bada kariya ga cutar sankarar hanta, da kuma HPV don bada kariya ga sankarar mahaifa. HIV, HSV da HTLV-1 cututtuka ne da kan iya zama na tsawon rayuwa, HIV da HSV na da magungunan da za su iya disashe ƙarfin ƙwayoyin cutar, amma a yanzu haka dai babu maganin da zai iya kawar da waɗannan cututtuka. Amfani da kororon roba akan kari kuma bisa ƙa'ida kan iya bada cikekken kariya daga kamuwa da cututtukan jima'i. Yin gwaji da wuri da kuma binciken mutanen da su ke ɗauke da wannan cututtuka tare da abokan hulɗar su kan iya samar da kyakkyawan dama don samun ingantaccen magani da kuma kariya daga rikitarwa da kuma ci gaba da yaɗawa.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa (gs - aiming for a more formal and understandable style):

**Yawantewa da Ciwon Kwayar Yan Kata (STIs) kamar HIV, ciwon kwayar jiki mai lalata (HSV), ciwon kwari mai cututtuka (Viral Hepatitis B), ciwon kwayar jiki mai lalata mai suna Human Papillomavirus (HPV) da ciwon kwayar jiki mai lalata mai suna Human T-lymphotropic Virus Type 1 (HTLV-1) suna da hanyoyin da ba ta da yauwa ko kuma ana samu hanyoyin da a yi amfani da su da yawa.  Wasu lantiri ana samu don ciwon kwari mai suna Hepatitis B domin ganowa da kare kashi daga lalata da zai kai zuwa ciwon jiksa, kuma lantiri ana samu don ciwon HPV domin kare kashi daga ciwon kwayar jiki na cizon mata. HIV, HSV da HTLV-1 sun zama ciwon da za a riƙi sosanni: don HIV da HSV, akwai hanyoyin da za a canza yawan ciwon virus, amma a halin na yau, ba a da hanyoyin da za a cire su daga kwayar jiki na duk wani ciwon kwayar jiki mai lalata.  Amfani da kiyashi a matsu da a yi amfani da shi daidai da yadda ya kamata, da kuma daidai, yana da yuwarsa don kare kashi daga ciwon kwayar yan kata da HIV.  Binciken da a yi a farkon ciwon kwayar yan kata da daidai da su da shuwagwarinsu yana ba da damar da kwararar a yi amfani da hanyoyin da a yi amfani da su da yawa da kuma kare kashi daga lalata da kuma ganowa da gudurin shiga.**

**Explanation of some choices and considerations:**

*   **"Viral STIs"**: Translated as "Yawantewa da Ciwon Kwayar Yan Kata" (Sexual Transmitted Infections).
*   **Technical terms**: I've tried to use Hausa terms that are commonly understood or that are the closest equivalent.  Some terms might benefit from further clarification depending on the audience.
*   **"Suppressed the virus"**: Translated as "canza yawan ciwon virus" (can change the amount of the virus).
*   **"Cervical cancer"**: Translated as "ciwon kwayar jiki na cizon mata" (cancer of the female reproductive system).
*   **Formal Tone**: I've aimed for a more formal and precise tone suitable for health information.

**Important Note:**  Hausa has regional variations. This translation is intended to be generally understandable across many Hausa-speaking areas.  For a specific audience, a local translator would be ideal to ensure the most appropriate and culturally relevant language is used.

translations.source: Symptoms: A person can have an STI without having obvious symptoms of disease. When present, common symptoms of STIs include: abnormal vaginal discharge, urethral discharge, genital ulcers and lumps, and lower abdominal pain. Symptoms of specific STIs are: Gonorrhoea and chlamydial infection These STIs cause cervicitis in women, urethritis in men and extra-genital infections, including rectal and oropharyngeal manifestations.
translations.reference: Alamomi: Mutum zai iya kamuwa da cututtukan ba tare da ƙwaƙƙwaran wasu alamun cutar ba. Idan ya kasance akwai, gama-garin alamu cutukan sun haɗa da: zubar ruwa na ba gaira ba dalili daga matantaka, zubar ruwa daga mahaifa, gyanbon al'aura da ƙuraje da kuma ciwon ƙasan mara. Alamun cututtukan na musamman su ne: Cutar Gonoriya da Chlamydia Waɗannan cututtuka su na kama mahaifa a mata, mafitsara ga maza da kuma wasu cututtukan da su ke kama al'aura, wanda ya haɗa da cutar da ke zazzago da dubura waje.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa (gs - representing a standard Hausa script):

**Rasa’i:** Mutum zai iya fama da ci zarafin kwaya (STI) ba tare da rantsarwa ba na kwararfin lalata. Idan ana samu shi, rakayi na daɗa da yau daɗa na ci zarafin kwaya sun haɗa da: ruwan kwayar dafa da ba daɗa, ruwan urethra, jini mai lalata da lalata da kauri, da lalata da lalata a sassan gabashin rufin kunnuwa. Rawayi na nauyi na ci zarafin kwaya na musamman shine: Gonorhea da lalata da kwaya.  Waɗannan ci zarafin kwaya ke ajiye cervicitis a mata, urethritis a maza, da lalata da ke kan watsa da ba a kan shi, kamar lalata a cikin kwayar dafa da lalata da oopharyngeal.

**Explanation of some choices and considerations:**

*   **"STI" (Sexually Transmitted Infections):** I've translated this as "ci zarafin kwaya" (literally "disease of the sex").
*   **"Abnormal vaginal discharge":** "Ruwan kwayar dafa da ba daɗa" (literally "discharge of the vaginal fluid that is not normal").
*   **"Urethral discharge":** "Ruwan urethra" (directly transliterated, as it's a medical term).
*   **"Genital ulcers and lumps":** "Jini mai lalata da lalata da kauri" (literally "bleeding sores and lumps").
*   **"Lower abdominal pain":** "Lalata da lalata a sassan gabashin rufin kunnuwa" (literally "pain in the lower part of the abdomen").
*   **"Gonorrhoea and chlamydial infection":**  I've kept these as they are, transliterated, as they are specific medical terms.
*   **"Cervicitis":**  I've translated this as "ajiye cervicitis" (literally "setting of cervicitis").
*   **"Urethritis":**  Translated as "urethritis" - again, a term often kept in the original language.
*   **"Extra-genital infections":** "lalata da ke kan watsa da ba a kan shi" (literally "infection outside the genitals").
*   **"Rectal and oropharyngeal manifestations":** "lalata a cikin kwayar dafa da lalata da oopharyngeal" (literally "infection in the rectum and oropharyngeal").

**Important Note:**  Medical translations require extreme accuracy.  This translation is a good starting point, but it's *crucial* to have it reviewed and validated by a qualified medical professional and a native Hausa speaker with expertise in medical terminology.

translations.source: Common symptoms include vaginal or penile discharge and burning with urination. Infants of infected mothers can contract neonatal conjunctivitis (red eyes) due to exposure to the STIs during vaginal delivery. Rectal and pharyngeal infections can be asymptomatic. Syphilis: Syphilis is often asymptomatic, when symptoms occur, primary syphilis presents as a solitary, painless ulcer. Secondary syphilis may manifest as generalized lesions affecting skin, mucous membranes and lymph-node including a classic rash on the palms of the hands and soles of the feet.
translations.reference: Alamomin da aka saba gani sun haɗa da zubar ruwa daga al'auran mata da na maza, jin zafi yayin yin fitsari. Jariran iyayen da su ke ɗauke da cutar za su iya kamuwa da cutar ciwon ido dalilin gamuwa da cutar yayin haihuwan da ba na tiyata ba. cutar da ke zazzago da dubura kan iya rasa alamun kamuwa da cututtuka. Sifilis: Sifilis ma yawanci baya bayyana alamu , a lokacin da alamu ya bayyana a farkon matakin sifilis zai nuna wani gyanbo ne maras zafi da ciwo. sifilis a mataki na biyu na iya bayyana a matsayin ciwo kawai wanda ke samun fata, jiki da kuma ƙulkutu ko ƙari wanda ya yaɗa da ƙuraje a tafin hannu da kuma tafin ƙafa.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided text into Hausa (gs - aiming for a more formal, written style):

**Translation:**

“Alakarin da ke faruwa da shi sun hada da ruwan jiki ko ruwan kwaranda, da ciwo da yin jiki. Mata da ke haifu suna da yanci na samu ciwon idan mata da ke haifu da kwayar dauniya, sabanin da su yi da lalata da idanwan su a matan da ke haifu. translations.source: Latent syphilis is asymptomatic and characterized by positive syphilis serology. Trichomoniasis: The predominant symptoms include abnormal vaginal discharge with redness of the vulva, itching and painful intercourse. Genital herpes simplex virus (HSV) HSV most commonly presents as painful sores, vesicles or ulcerations on the external genitalia and mouth. Symptomatic genital HSV is a lifelong condition that can be characterized by frequent symptomatic recurrences.
translations.reference: Sifilis a matakin ƙarshe kuma ba ya nuna ko bayyana wasu alamu amma ya na nuni da cewa sifilis ne ta hanyan gwajin jini. Cutar Trichomoniasis: babban alamomin wannan cuta sun haɗa da zuban ruwan da babu dalili tare da jan kan fatar al'aura, ƙaiƙayi da kuma jin zafi yayin saduwa. Ƙurajen cikin matantaka (Genital Herpes Simplex Virus, HSV) Mafi yawanci wannan cuta na bayyana ne a ƙuraje masu matuƙar zafi da ciwo, masu ruwa, ko kuma mai kamar gyanbo a kan fatar al'aura da kuma cikin baki. Alamomin wannan cuta na tsawon rayuwa ne, wanda ke faruwa akai akai(idan wasu sun mutu wasu su ƙara fitowa).
