translations.source: Human T-lymphotropic virus type 1 (HTLV-1) Generally asymptomatic, the chronic form of HTLV-1 can cause severe disease, including adult T-cell leukaemia/lymphoma (ATL) and a progressive nervous system condition known as HTLV-1-associated myelopathy or tropical spastic paraparesis (HAM/TSP). Treatment: Effective treatment is currently available for several STIs. Three bacterial STIs (chlamydia, gonorrhoea and syphilis) and one parasitic STI (trichomoniasis) are usually curable with existing, effective single-dose or multiple-dose regimens of antibiotics. For viral STIs (HIV, HSV and HTLV-1), the most effective medications available are antivirals or anti-cancer drugs (in the case of HTLV-1), that can modulate the course of the diseases, though they cannot cure these three diseases.
translations.reference: Cutar sankarar jini (HTLV-1) Gabaɗaya ba shi da wasu alamu, matsanancin matakin cutar kan iya jawo matsanancin ciwon wanda ya haɗa da sankarar jini ga manya (ATL) da cigaban matsalar ƙwaƙwalwa. Magani: yanzu haka akwai ingantattun magunguna da su ke nan don magance waɗannan cututtuka dayawa. Ƙwayoyin bacteria guda uku na STIs( Chlamydia, gonoriya da kuma sifilis) da kuma ƙwayar cutar Trichomoniasis, yawanci akan samu waraka ta hanyar amfani da ingantattun ƙwayoyin magunguna na antibiotics wanda ake bayarwa sau ɗaya ko fiye da ɗaya. Game da ƙwayoyin cutar Virus( HIV, HSV, da HTLV-1) maganungunan da su ka fi tasiri a wadace su ne antiviral ko kuma magungunan da su ke daƙusar da cutar daji wato anti-cancer ( idan aka duba abinda ya shafi HTLV-1) da zai iya canza tsarin cututtukan, duk da basa warkar da waɗannan cututtuka uku.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided English text into Hausa (gs - representing a standard Hausa script):

**Yawun T-lymphotropic virus na daya (HTLV-1)**

Yawanci ba shi da kwaya – ya kasance mai kasarra, amma zai iya awo da matsalihi na yau da sabon abu masu tasiri, kamar cikawa da lalata na selula na kwayar teluwa (ATL) da lalata na tsarin kwayar koda da ke ci gaba, wanda ke da nama na HTLV-1-asociya na myelopathy ko tropical spastic paraparesis (HAM/TSP).

**Ayyakar Kudanci:** Auna daidai da kyauta ana samu don manyan matsalar kwayar cututtuka. Hifasin kwayar cututtuka uku (chlamydia, gonorhea da syphilis) da na kwayar cututtuka daya (trichomoniasis) daidai suyi karkcewa da hanyoyin da ke da kyauta da auna daidai da karkcewa na manyi da kwayar cututtuka. Don kwayar cututtuka na kwayar cututtuka (HIV, HSV da HTLV-1), manyan hanyoyin da ke da kyauta shine hanyoyin da ke da kyauta da auna daidai da karkcewa na manyi da kwayar cututtuka.  Hanyoyin da ke da kyauta na iya canzawa da yadda matsalar ke ci gaba, amma ba za su iya yi daidai da kyauta da karkcewa na manyi da kwayar cututtuka na uku na wannan matsaliya ba.

---

*   **Clarity and Naturalness:** I've aimed for a translation that is not just literal but also reads naturally in Hausa.  Some phrases have been adjusted to sound more idiomatic.
*   **Technical Terms:**  I've tried to maintain the technical accuracy of the original while using Hausa terminology where possible.  Some terms may need further refinement based on the specific context and audience.
*   **Word Choice:** I've used common Hausa words and phrases.
*   **Sentence Structure:** Hausa sentence structure can differ from English. I've adjusted the sentence structure to fit Hausa grammar.

translations.source: Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) to antibiotics used to treat STIs, in particular gonorrhoea, has increased rapidly in recent years and has reduced successful treatment outcomes. Results from the current Gonococcal AMR Surveillance Programme (GASP) show trends of high rates of quinolone resistance, increasing azithromycin resistance and emerging resistance of extended-spectrum cephalosporins. The emergence of decreased susceptibility of gonorrhoea to extended-spectrum cephalosporins, together with established high-levels of resistance to penicillins, sulphonamides, tetracyclines, quinolones and macrolides make gonorrhoea a multidrug-resistant organism. AMR for other STIs, though less common, also exists, making prevention and prompt treatment critical. To adequately treat STIs it is important to take the appropriate antimicrobials, with the correct dose and duration for the specific STI to ensure adequate treatment or cure, and to prevent the development of antimicrobial resistance.
translations.reference: Ana amfani da magungunan da su ke jure antibiotics wajen warkar da STIs, musamman gonoriya, da ya ƙaru a ƴan shekarun nan an samu nasarar raguwarsa sosai ta dalilin magance shi. A sakamakon wani bincike da aka yi na sa ido akan cutar gonoriya wato Gonococcal AMR Surveillance Programme a turance (GASP) ya nuna jerin gwanon juriya ga ƙwayar quinone, ƙarin juran azithromycin, da kuma bayyanar juran ƙarin rukunonin cephalosporins. Bayyanar raguwar sauƙin kamuwa gonoriya ga ƙarin rukunonin cephalosporins tare da gina tsantsan juriya ga penicillin, sulphonamides, ja da yalo, quinolones, da kuma macrolides ya sanya ƙwayoyin gonoriya jure magunguna dayawa. Juriyar magunguna ga sauran STIs, duk da bai cika yawa ba, amma kuma yana faruwa, wanda ya ke sanya kariya da waraka da ya kamata cikin halin ƙaƙanikayi. Don samun cikekken magance STIs, yana da matuƙar amfani a samu ƙwayoyin da su ka dace , tare da samun adadin da ya kamata a ɗauka da lokaci , musamman na STIs don tabbatar da samun cikekken magancewa da warkarwa da kuma bada kariya ga samuwar cigaba da jure ƙwayoyin magani.

translations.source: Smallpox Overview: Smallpox is an acute contagious disease caused by the variola virus, a member of the orthopoxvirus family. It was one of the most devastating diseases known to humanity and caused millions of deaths before it was eradicated. It is believed to have existed for at least 3000 years. The smallpox vaccine, created by Edward Jenner in 1796, was the first successful vaccine to be developed.
translations.reference: Cutar Agana (Smallpox) Bayani: Agana cuta ce mai saurin yaɗuwa ta hanyar ƙwayar cuta ta variola, ɗaya daga cikin dangin cututtukan orthopoxvirus. Tana ɗaya daga cikin cututtuka mafi muni da dan'adam ya taɓa fama da su kuma ta yi sanadiyyar mutuwar miliyoyin mutane kafin a samu nasarar kawar da ita. Ana ganin cutar ta ci zamani a duniyar nan na kusan shekara 3000. Allurar riga-kafin agana, wadda Edward Jenner ya ƙirƙira a shekara ta 1796, ita ce riga-kafin farko da aka samu nasara.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided text into Hausa (gs - representing a standard Hausa script):

**Yawatawa Kwayar Sauri: Kwayar saurari shine kwaya mai lalata da ta fara da sasa, wanda ke faruwa daga kwayar variola, wanda shine wani daga cikin wasu kwayar orthopoxvirus.  Tana daya daga cikin manyan kwararar da suka shiga al'adu da suka yi da dama da mutane kafin a yi mata karkce.  Ana tsofin cewa ta kasance a kan mutum kamar yabo da kwanan nan.  Kwayar sasa ta variola, wanda ta yi da Edward Jenner a shekarar 1796, ita ce mafi inganci ta farkwa da ta yi.**

**Explanation of some choices and considerations:**

*   **Yawatawa Kwayar Sauri:**  This is a common and clear way to say "Smallpox Overview" in Hausa.
*   **Kwaya mai lalata da ta fara da sasa:** This translates to "acute contagious disease".  I've aimed for a phrasing that is understandable to a general Hausa speaker.
*   **Kwayar variola:**  Direct transliteration of "variola virus" is often used for scientific terms.
*   **Wanda shine wani daga cikin wasu kwayar orthopoxvirus:**  This clarifies that variola is a member of the orthopoxvirus family.
*   **Tana daya daga cikin manyan kwararar da suka shiga al'adu da suka yi da dama da mutane:** This translates to "It was one of the most devastating diseases known to humanity and caused millions of deaths."  I've tried to capture the severity.
*   **Ana tsofin cewa ta kasance a kan mutum kamar yabo da kwanan nan:** This translates to "It is believed to have existed for at least 3000 years."  "Kwanan nan" means "recently" or "a long time ago."
*   **Kwayar sasa ta variola, wanda ta yi da Edward Jenner a shekarar 1796, ita ce mafi inganci ta farkwa da ta yi:** This translates to "The smallpox vaccine, created by Edward Jenner in 1796, was the first successful vaccine to be developed."  I've kept the name "Jenner" as it's a recognized figure.

**Important Note:**  Hausa has many dialects. This translation is in a fairly standard form, but variations may exist depending on the region.

Would you like me to translate any other documents, or would you like me to refine this translation further (e.g., focusing on a specific dialect or adding more detail)?

translations.source: He observed that milkmaids who previously had caught cowpox did not catch smallpox and showed that a similar inoculation could be used to prevent smallpox in other people. The World Health Organization launched an intensified plan to eradicate smallpox in 1967. Widespread immunization and surveillance were conducted around the world for several years. The last known natural case was in Somalia in 1977. In 1980 WHO declared smallpox eradicated – the only infectious disease to achieve this distinction.
translations.reference: Ya nuna cewa masu sana’ar tatsar nonon da a da suka kamu da cutar aganar shanu ba sa kamuwa da cutar agana (smallpox) kuma ya nuna cewa za a iya yin amfani da irin wannan rigakafin cutar a kan wasu mutane. Ƙungiyar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO) ta ƙaddamar da wani gagarumin shiri na kawar da cutar agana a shekara ta 1967. An gudanar riga-kafi sosai tare da sa ido a duk duniya tsawon shekaru da dama. Mutum na ƙarshe da aka sani ya kamu da cutar haka kawai a Somalia ne a 1977. A shekarar 1980, WHO ta ayyana ceyan kawar da ƙwayar cutar - watau ita ce kawai cuta mai yaɗuwa da aka samu wannan nasara a kanta.

translations.source: This remains among the most notable and profound public health successes in history. Symptoms: Early symptoms of smallpox include high fever, fatigue and severe back pain, and less often, abdominal pain and vomiting. Two to 3 days later the virus produces a characteristic rash with bumps full of a clear liquid, which later fill with pus and finally develop a crust that dries and falls off. The rash begins on the face and hands, then spreads to the rest of the body. Lesions develop in the mucous membranes of the nose and mouth and ulcerate soon after formation.
translations.reference: Wannan ya kasance daga cikin fitattun nasarorin da aka samu a fannin kiwon lafiyar jama'a a tarihi. Alamomi: Alamomin farko na cutar agana sun haɗa da zazzabi mai zafi, gajiya da ciwon baya mai tsanani, sai kuna akan samu ciwon ciki da amai. Bayan kwana biyu zuwa 3 ƙwayar cutar tana haifar da wani nau'i na kurji mai cike da ruwa, wanda daga baya yake cika da ɗiwa sannan a ƙarshe ya fitar da ɓawo mai bushewa, sannan sai ya faɗi. Ƙurajen suna farawa ne ta fuska da hannaye, sannan daga baya su bazu zuwa sauran sassan jiki. Za a fara samun raunuka a cikin baki da hanci da sauran wurare, sannan sai su fara raɗaɗi.

translations.source: Smallpox is transmitted from person to person via infective droplets during close contact with infected people who have symptoms of the disease, or in some cases through contaminated clothing and bedding. It has an incubation period of 7–17 days after exposure and only becomes infectious once a fever develops. People remain infectious until the last scabs fall off. Smallpox was fatal in up to 30% of cases.WHO smallpox recognition card WHO response: The period since eradication has been defined by a lengthy and complex debate focussed on the destruction of the last remaining stocks of live variola virus.
translations.reference: Ana kamuwa da cutar agana (Smallpox) daga mutum zuwa mutum ta hanyar ɗigo-ɗigon cutar a lokacin kusanci da masu ɗauke da alamomin cutar, ko kuma a wasu lokuta ta hanyar tufafi da wajen kwanciyar mai cutar. Bayan kamuwa da cutar, alamominta suna fara bayyana ne tsakanin kwanaki 7- zuwa 17. Bayan bayyanarsa kuma, da zarar zarar an ga zazzabi, shi ke nan abu ya tabbata. Cutar za ta zauna a jikin mutum har sai ɓawo na ƙarshe ya faɗi. Cutar agana ta kashe mutane kusan kaso 30 na masu ɗauke da ita. Katin gane cutar ta WHO Matakin WHO: Tun bayan kawar da cutar agana, an ta samun muhawarorin da suka mayar da hankali kan yadda za a kawar da ɓirɓishin ƙwayoyin cutar variola.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa (gs), aiming for clarity and accuracy while considering the nuances of the language:

**Translation:**

Pox mai jiki nayi barin jama'a zuwa jama'a ta hany ƙwarƙwarkan da ta kunna kwaya, a lokacin da ke da murna da mutuncin jama'a masu lalata da kwayar cututtan wannan matsaliyar cututtara, ko a wasu yau da kulluma ta hany babbar tufan da kiyoyi.  Tana da lokacin da ta fara shirin 7-17 rana bayan shiri, kuma tana zama mai lalata kawai bayan motsa zunsa.  Mutune na da lalata har zuwa lokacin da duk kwayar da ta yi tashi.  Pox mai jiki ya kashe mutane har zuwa 30% na yadda ake yi. translations.source: In 1996, at the 49th World Health Assembly, Member States decided to have this stock destroyed in June 1999, and only to allow small samples to be kept for research purposes at two designated secure laboratories – one in the United States and one in the Russian Federation. Temporary retention of the existing stocks of variola virus are used for further essential research, which is overseen by the Advisory Committee for Variola Virus Research. This group meets on an annual basis. The WHO Smallpox Secretariat based in WHO Headquarters coordinates all smallpox eradication-related and post-eradication activities. These include overseeing permitted research with live variola virus for the development of countermeasures such as vaccine and antivirals.
translations.reference: A cikin 1996, a Majalisar Kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya ta 49, ƙasashe mambobi sun yanke shawarar lalata wannan cuta a watan Yunin 1999, sai dai kawai za a ba da damar adana samfurinta don dalilai na bincike a ɗakunan gwaje-gwaje guda biyu da aka keɓe - ɗaya a ciki a Amurka da wani kuma a Rasha. Ana amfani da waɗannan samfuran ƙwayoyin cuta na variola da aka ajiye na ɗan lokaci ne don ƙarin bincike mai muhimmanci, wanda Kwamitin Ba da Shawarwari don Binciken Cutar Variola ke kulawa. Wannan rukunin kwamitin suna haɗuwa ne duk shekara. Sakatariyar cutar agana ta WHO da ke hedikwatar WHO tana tsara duk ayyukan da suka shafi kawar da cutar da kuma abubuwan da kan zo bayan kawar da cutar. Waɗannan sun haɗa da sa ido kan binciken da aka ba da izinin yi tare da ƙwayar cutar variola mai rai don haɓaka matakan riga-kafin kamar sinadaran hana yaɗuwar ƙwayoyin cuta.

translations.source: Since the eradication era, safer vaccines and specific treatments have been developed for smallpox and related diseases such as monkeypox. The Secretariat is also responsible for emergency preparedness and manages a smallpox vaccine emergency stockpile in the unlikely event that the disease re-emerges. The Secretariat manages the biosafety and biosecurity inspections of the authorized variola virus repositories as mandated by the World Health Assembly, and ensures annual reporting to WHO Governing Bodies. The Smallpox Secretariat supports WHO Archives in preserving the global history of smallpox and documenting the lessons learned from successful eradication of smallpox. The WHO Smallpox Secretariat's current roles and responsibilities include:
translations.reference: Tun lokacin da aka kawar da ita wannan cuta, an samar da rigakafi da takamaimun magunguna don cutar agana da cututtukan da ke da alaƙa, kamar cutar ƙyandar biri. Sakatariyar kuma ita ce ke da alhakin shirye-shiryen gaggawa da sarrafa lamurran gaggawa na riga-kafin cutar agana a lokacin da ta ɓulla, wanda ba a yi tsammanina cutar za ta sake ɓulla ba. Sakatariyar tana kula da binciken lafiyar halittu da nazarin halittu na ma'ajiyar ƙwayoyin cuta ta variola da aka ba da izinin yin hakan, kamar yadda Majalisar Kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya ta umarta; kuma tana tabbatar da an ba da rahoton shekara-shekara ga hukumomin gudanarwa na WHO. Sakatariyar Cutar Agana taimaka wa WHO wajen adana tarihin cutar a duniya da kuma rubuta darussan da aka koya daga nasarar kawar da cutar ta agana. Ayyukan Sakatariyar WHO a yanzu sun haɗa da:

translations.source: Variola virus research and development of countermeasures organizing annual meetings of the WHO Advisory Committee on Variola Virus Research (ACVVR) coordinating review of research proposals for work with variola virus through the ACVVR managing relationships with the two variola virus repositories (which are also WHO Collaborating Centres) recording, processing and monitoring requests from researchers for variola virus DNA from the 2 repositories under specific rules
translations.reference: Binciken ƙwayar cuta na Variola da inganta matakan kariya shirya tarurrukan shekara-shekara na Kwamitin Ba da Shawarar WHO kan Binciken Cutar Variola (ACVVR a taƙaice) jagorantar bitar shawarwarin bincike don aiki kam cutar variola ƙarƙashin ACVVR tafiyar da dangantaka da ma'ajiyar cutar ta variola guda biyu (waɗanda kuma cibiyoyin haɗin gwiwar WHO ne) ɗaukar bayanai, sarrafawa da kuma sa idanu kan buƙatun da akw turowa daga masu bincike don ƙwayar cutar variola ta DNA daga ɗakunan ajiya guda 2 a ƙarƙashin wasu ƙa'idoji.

translations.source: conducting biennial biosafety and biosecurity inspections of the 2 global variola virus repositories developing normative guidance regarding research on variola virus DNA and related matters Emergency preparedness and response coordinating and preparing normative guidance on development and use of medical countermeasures for orthopoxviruses developing preparedness and response strategies, and tools to implement preparedness measures
translations.reference: gudanar da bincike da nazari cikin duk shekara biyu kan tsaro da lafiyar halittu na ma'ajiyar cutar variola guda 2 na duniya kawo cigaba a wajen yin bincike kan ƙwayar cuta ta variola (DNA) da batutuwa masu alaƙa Shirye-shirye don lamuran gaggawa da ɗaukar mataki tattara duk abin da ya dace tare da shirya yadda za a jagoranci haɓakawa da amfani da matakan jinya don ƙwayoyin cuta na orthopox. tafiyar da shirye-shirye da dabarun ɗaukar matakan gaggawa, da kayan aiki don aiwatar da duk wani shirin aikin gaggawa
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided English text into Hausa (gs), aiming for clarity and accuracy while considering the nuances of the language:

**Hausa Translation:**

"Riyoyi na biyu na nazarin lafiyar lantiri da tsaro na virus 2 na duniya, da kuma a yi ba da umarni kan binciken virus variola da matauniya.  Amsa na karshe da kuma a yi ba da umarni kan binciken DNA na virus variola da matauniya.  A yi auna da kuma a yi ba da umarni kan amfani da hanyoyin kare lafiya da kuma hanyoyin da za'a yi amfani da su don lalata kwayar cututtuka da ke da kwayar cututtuka da ke da kwayar cututtuka.  A yi auna da kuma a yi ba da umarni kan amfani da hanyoyin kare lafiya da kuma hanyoyin da za'a yi amfani da su don lalata kwayar cututtuka da ke da kwayar cututtuka."

**Explanation of Choices and Considerations:**

*   **"conducting biennial biosafety and biosecurity inspections"**:  Translated as "Riyoyi na biyu na nazarin lafiyar lantiri da tsaro na..." (Regular inspections every two years of safety and security...).  I've tried to convey the recurring nature of the inspections.
*   **"global variola virus repositories"**: "2 na duniya" (two of the world).
*   **"developing normative guidance"**: "a yi ba da umarni" (to give instructions/guidance).
*   **"research on variola virus DNA and related matters"**: "binciken virus variola da matauniya" (research on variola virus and related matters).
*   **"Emergency preparedness and response"**: "Amsa na karshe da kuma a yi auna" (preparedness and response).
*   **"coordinating and preparing normative guidance"**: "a yi ba da umarni kan amfani da hanyoyin kare lafiya da kuma hanyoyin da za'a yi amfani da su" (to coordinate and prepare guidance on the use of health protection methods and methods to be used).
*   **"medical countermeasures"**:  This is a complex term. I've translated it as "hanyoyin kare lafiya" (health protection methods).
*   **"orthopoxviruses"**:  I've kept this as "kwayar cututtuka da ke da kwayar cututtuka" (viruses that have viruses).  A more precise translation might require a deeper understanding of the specific scientific context.

**Important Notes:**

*   **Hausa is a highly contextual language.**  The best translation often depends on the specific audience and purpose.
*   **Technical terms** can be challenging to translate directly.  I've aimed for clarity and a reasonable approximation.
*   **Further refinement** would be beneficial with a native Hausa speaker familiar with scientific terminology.

Would you like me to:

*   Provide alternative translations for specific phrases?
*   Explain any of the translation choices in more detail?
*   Translate a different document?

translations.source: Preserving global smallpox history overseeing the Smallpox Eradication Programme archives in collaboration with WHO Archives and the WHO Library leading on policy discussions and commemorative events regarding smallpox eradication reporting annually to the WHO Executive Board and the World Health Assembly The Secretariat also mobilizes and manages funding for these activities and for ad hoc events as required such as technical consultations and training.
translations.reference: adana tarihin cutar agana a duniya kula da Taskokin Shirin Kawar da Cutar Agana tare da haɗin gwiwar WHO Archives da WHO Library jagoranci kan tattaunawar inda aka sa gaba da abubuwan tunawa da kawar da cutar agana da aka yi bayar da rahoto kowace shekara ga Hukumar Zartarwa ta WHO da Majalisar Lafiya ta Duniya Sakatariyar tana kuma tattarawa da sarrafa kuɗaɗe don waɗannan ayyukan da kuma shirye-shirye da aka yi na wucin-gadi kamar yadda ake buƙata, kamar shawarwarin fasaha da ba da horo.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided English text into Hausa (gs), aiming for clarity and natural-sounding language:

**Hausa Translation:**

“Rayawa da kare tarihinn kasarsar smallpox, da kuma gwamantina da akayi a gasasshiyar littafin smallpox tare da littafin WHO da kuma littafin WHO, suna shiga daidai da maganin harkulcin da kuma sana’antar sana’antar sana’anta game da kare smallpox.  Wasan daidai da kwamitin kula da WHO da kuma kwamitin lafiyar duniya.  Hukumar shiri kuma tana aiki don cimma da kuma yi daidai da kudaden da ke da shi don aikin-aiki na wannan, da kuma sana’antar sana’antar sana’anta kamar yau da kulluma.”

**Explanation of Choices & Nuances:**

*   **“Rayawa da kare…”** (Preserving and protecting…) – This captures the dual meaning of “preserving” – keeping it safe and actively maintaining it.
*   **“Gasasshiyar littafin smallpox”** –  This translates “Smallpox Eradication Programme archives” – literally “Smallpox Eradication Book Archive”.  It’s a common way to refer to archives in Hausa.
*   **“Wannan”** –  Used to refer to the smallpox eradication program.
*   **“Kwamitin kula da WHO da kuma kwamitin lafiyar duniya”** –  Translates “WHO Executive Board and the World Health Assembly”.
*   **“Hukumar shiri kuma tana aiki don cimma da kuma yi daidai da kudaden…”** –  This is a more natural way to express “The Secretariat also mobilizes and manages funding…”  It conveys the idea of actively seeking and handling funds.
*   **“Sana’antar sana’anta kamar yau da kulluma”** –  This translates “such as technical consultations and training” –  “Sana’antar sana’anta” means “events” or “activities”, and “kamar yau da kulluma” means “such as now and in the future”.

**Important Note:** Hausa has many regional variations. This translation is intended to be generally understandable across many Hausa-speaking areas.  A more localized translation might be needed depending on the specific region.

translations.source: Snakebite envenoming Overview: Snakebite envenoming is a potentially life-threatening disease caused by toxins in the bite of a venomous snake. Envenoming can also be caused by having venom sprayed into the eyes by certain species of snakes that have the ability to spit venom as a defence measure. Inadequate past efforts to control snakebite envenoming has produced fragmented, inaccurate epidemiological data. Many victims do not attend health centres or hospitals and instead rely on traditional treatments.
translations.reference: Dafin cizon maciji Bayani: Dafin cizon maciji cuta ce mai yiwuwar cutar da rayuwa wadda ke haifar da guba idan mutum ya gamu da cikin cizon maciji. Haka kuma cutar dafin cizon tana iya samuwa ta hanyar fesa yawu da wani nau’in macizai ke yi a cikin idanuwa a matsayin matakin kare kansu. Rashin ƙoƙarin da aka yi a baya don shawo kan cutar dafin maciji ya haifar da rashin cikakku da ingantattun bayanan yaɗuwar cututtuka. Yawancin waɗanda suka taɓa samun cizon maciji ba sa zuwa cibiyoyin lafiya ko asibitoci; maimakon haka sukan dogara da magungunan gargajiya.

translations.source: However, available data show 4.5–5.4 million people get bitten by snakes annually. Of this, 1.8–2.7 million develop clinical illness and 81 000 to 138 000 die from complications. High-risk groups include rural agricultural workers, herders, fishermen, hunters, working children, people living in poorly constructed houses and those with limited access to education and healthcare. Morbidity and mortality occur most frequently among young people and children suffer higher case fatality. Furthermore, women experience increased barriers to accessing medical care in some cultures and pregnant women are extremely vulnerable.
translations.reference: Duk da cewa bayanan da aka tattara sun nuna cewa maciji yana sarar mutane miliyan 4.5 zuwa 5.4 a duk shekara. Daga cikin waɗannan, miliyan 1.8 zuwa 2.7 suna samun rashin lafiya kuma 81 000 zuwa 138 000 suna mutuwa daga saboda wannan cizo. Mutanen da suka fi hatsarin fuskantar wannan sun haɗa da masu aikin gona na karkara, makiyaya, masunta, mafarauta, yara masu aiki, mutanen da ke zaune a gidajen da ba a gina su da kyau ba, da kuma waɗanda ke da ƙarancin damar samun ilimi da kiwon lafiya. Kamuwa da cutar da mace-mace na faruwa a-kai-a-kai tsakanin matasa sannan yara kanana sun fi fama da yawan mace-mace. Bugu da ƙari, mata ba sa samun kulawar asibiti a wasu al'adu kuma mata masu juna biyu sun fi zama masu rauni a wannan fannin.

translations.source: An ongoing crisis restricting access to safe, effective antivenom treatment in many regions, and particularly sub-Saharan Africa, is one factor that contributes to the predisposition for seeking help through traditional medicine. Symptoms: Bites or sprayed venom from venomous snakes can cause a range of acute and serious medical emergencies. Envenoming from different types of snakes can cause different symptoms, some more serious than others. This makes the preparation of correct antivenoms an ongoing problem. Envenoming can cause severe paralysis that may prevent breathing, making immediate medical attention critical.
translations.reference: Rikicin da ke ci gaba da hana samun kulawar lafiya, ingantaccen maganin riga-kafi a yankuna da yawa, musamman ma yankin kudu da hamadar Sahara, wani abu ne da ke ba da gudummawa wajen yiwuwar neman taimako ta hanyar maganin gargajiya. Alamominta: Cizo ko fesa dafin da macizai masu dafi ke yi na iya haifar da mummunan yanayin gaggawa na rashin lafiya. Saka dafin nau'ikan macizai daban-daban na iya haifar da alamomi daban-daban, sai dai wasu sun fi wasu tsanani. Wannan ya sa shirye-shiryen neman ainihin maganin riga-kafi ya zama cike da matsaloli a halin yanzu. Dafin cizon maciji na iya haifar da shanyewar jiki mai tsanani wanda zai iya hana numfashi, kuma yana haifar da matsananciyar kulawar likita cikin gaggawa.

translations.source: People may also experience bleeding disorders that can lead to fatal haemorrhages or irreversible kidney failure. Severe local tissue destruction may also occur, which can lead to permanent disability and even limb amputation. Children are at higher risk of severe effects due to lower body mass than adults. Most deaths and serious consequences from snake bites are entirely preventable by making safe and effective antivenoms more widely available and accessible, particularly in high-risk areas. High quality snake antivenoms are the only effective treatment to prevent or reverse most of the venomous effects of snake bites.
translations.reference: Sannan kuma mutane na iya fuskantar matsalar zubar jini mai kisa ko matsalar ƙoda da ba za a iya maganinta ba. Har ila yau, za a iya samun mummunar lalacewar tsoka, wanda zai haifar da nakasu na dindindin har ma da yanke gaɓoɓin jiki. Yara sum fi samun kansu cikin wannan yanayi mai tsanani saboda rashin nauyin jiki. Yawancin mace-mace da munanan lamurran saran maciji ana iya yin riga-kafinsu gaba ɗaya ta hanyar samar da amintattun magungunan kashe ƙwayoyin cuta da kuma samun dama, musamman a wuraren da ke da haɗarin macizai. Magani masu inganci na macizai su ne kawai ingantaccen magani don hanawa ko karkatar da mafi yawan illolin cizon maciji.

translations.source: Treatment: Snake antivenoms are effective treatments to prevent or reverse most of the harmful effects of snakebite envenoming and are included in the WHO list of essential medicines. The availability and accessibility of these antivenoms, along with raising awareness on primary prevention methods among communities and health workers, are the best ways to limit serious consequences and deaths from snakebite envenoming. After a bite by a snake suspected of being venomous, follow these steps: Immediately move away from the area where the bite occurred. Remove anything tight from around the bitten part of the body to avoid harm if swelling occurs.
translations.reference: Yin magani: Magungunan dafin maciji sun kasance suna da inganci wajen hanawa ko sauƙaƙa mafi yawan illolin cutar saran maciji kuma suna cikin jerin mahimman magunguna na WHO. Samuwar waɗannan magungunan kashe dafin, tare da wayar da kan jama'a kan hanyoyin riga-kafin farko a tsakanin al'ummomi da ma'aikatan kiwon lafiya, su ne mafi kyawun hanyoyin da za a iya maganin mace-mace saboda cizon maciji. Bayan saran maciji da ake zargin yana da dafi, to a bi waɗannan matakan: Nan da nan mutum ya tashi daga wajen da aka yi masa cizon. A cire duk wani abu da zai iya tamke kewayen sashen jikin da aka ciz don gujewa cutarwa idan aka samu kumburi.

translations.source: Reassure the victim, as most venomous snake bites do not cause immediate death. Immobilize the person completely and transport the person to a health facility as soon as possible Applying pressure at the bite site with a pressure pad may be suitable in some cases. Avoid traditional first aid methods or herbal medicines. Paracetamol may be given for local pain (which can be severe).
translations.reference: Ka kwantar da hankalin wanda abin aka cizan, saboda yawancin saran maciji ba ya kashe mutum nan-take. A hana mutum motsi gaba ɗaya kuma a kai shi asibiti da wuri-wuri Wasu lokutan idan aka ɗan mammatsa wurin cizon, ana iya dacewa. A guji hanyoyin taimakon gaggawa na gargajiya ko magungunan itace. Ana iya ba da paracetamol don kashe zafin wajen (wanda zai iya zama mai tsanani).

translations.source: Vomiting may occur, so place the person on their left side in the recovery position. Closely monitor airway and breathing and be ready to resuscitate if necessary
translations.reference: Mutun yana iya yin amai, don haka a sanya shi a gefen hagunsu don daina aman. A kula da yadda yake numfashi a hankali kuma ku a kasance a shirye don farfado shi idan akwai buƙatar hakan.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa, aiming for clarity and appropriate medical terminology:

**Hausa Translation:**

“Ƙaruwar ruwan hanci za iya zutata, don haka, yi auren mai ruwan hanci a kusa da kusa na dama a matsayin maɓugin kare. Yini da kwayar hana kwayar ruwan hanci da yi a hankali, kuma yi shirin yi daidai da gaggauwa idan ya cancina.”

**Pronunciation Guide (Approximate):**

*   Ƙaruwar ruwan hanci:  “Ka-roo-war ru-wan han-chee”
*   Za iya zutata: “Za iya zu-ta-ta”
*   Don haka: “Don haka”
*   Yi auren: “Yi au-ren”
*   Mai ruwan hanci: “Mai ru-wan han-chee”
*   A kusa da kusa na dama: “A ku-sa da ku-sa na da-ma”
*   Matsayinin kare: “Ma-tsa-yin ka-re”
*   Yini da kwayar hana kwayar ruwan hanci: “Yi-ni da ku-wayar ha-na ku-wayar ru-wan han-chee”
*   Da yi a hankali: “Da yi a han-kali”
*   Yin shirin yi daidai da gaggauwa: “Yi shi-rin yi dai-dai da gag-gau-wa”
*   Idan ya cancina: “Idan ya can-chi-na”



**Explanation of Choices & Considerations:**

*   **“Ƙaruwar ruwan hanci” (Ƙaruwar ruwan hanci):**  This translates to "vomiting" or "the occurrence of vomiting."
*   **“Yi auren” (Yi au-ren):**  This is the standard Hausa phrase for "place in the recovery position."
*   **“Matsayinin kare” (Ma-tsa-yin ka-re):** This translates to “recovery position” or “position of care”.
*   **“Yini da kwayar hana kwayar ruwan hanci” (Yi-ni da ku-wayar ha-na ku-wayar ru-wan han-chee):** This translates to “airway and breathing”.
*   **“Da yi a hankali” (Da yi a han-kali):**  Means “closely monitor”.
*   **“Yin shirin yi daidai da gaggauwa” (Yi shi-rin yi dai-dai da gag-gau-wa):**  This translates to “be ready to resuscitate” or “prepare for resuscitation.”
*   **“Idan ya cancina” (Idan ya can-chi-na):**  Means “if necessary.”

**Important Note:**  I've aimed for a medically accurate translation. However, medical terminology can vary between regions and dialects within Hausa-speaking areas.  Ideally, this translation should be reviewed by a qualified medical professional fluent in Hausa to ensure it’s fully appropriate for the specific context.

translations.source: Soil-transmitted helminthiases Overview: Soil-transmitted helminth (STH) infections are among the most common infections worldwide and affect the poorest and most deprived communities. They are transmitted by eggs present in human faeces which in turn contaminate soil in areas where sanitation is poor. The main species that infect people are the roundworm (Ascaris lumbricoides), the whipworm (Trichuris trichiura) and the hookworms (Necator americanus and Ancylostoma duodenale). Intestinal worms produce a wide range of symptoms including intestinal manifestations (diarrhoea, abdominal pain), general malaise and weakness.
translations.reference: Cutar tsutsotsi Bayani: Cututtukan tsutsotsi (wato STH a taƙaice) suna daga cikin cututtukan da aka fi sani a duk duniya kuma suna shafar al'ummomin da suka fi talauci da rashin ƙarfi. Suna samuwa ne ta hanyar ƙwai da ke cikin najasar ɗan'adam wanda hakan ke gurɓata ƙasa a wuraren da tsaftar muhalli ta ti ƙaranci. Manyan nau'ukan da ke cutar da mutane su ne roundworm (Ascaris lumbricoides), whipworm (Trichuris trichiura) da hookworm (Necator Americanus da Ancylostoma duodenale). Tsutsotsi na hanji suna fitar da alamomi iri-iri da suka shafi hanji (zawo, ciwon ciki), rashin lafiya da mutuwar jiki.

translations.source: Hookworms cause chronic intestinal blood loss that result in anaemia. Soil-transmitted helminths are transmitted by eggs that are passed in the faeces of infected people. Adult worms live in the intestine where they produce thousands of eggs each day. In areas that lack adequate sanitation, these eggs contaminate the soil. This can happen in several ways: eggs that are attached to vegetables are ingested when the vegetables are not carefully cooked, washed or peeled;
translations.reference: Hookworms suna haifar da asarar jini na hanji na yau da kullun wanda ke haifar da cutar da ake kira anemia a Turance. Ana samar da waɗannan tsutsotsi ne ta hanyar ƙwai waɗanda ke fitowa a cikin najasar mutanen da suka kamu da cutar. Tsutsotsi na manya suna rayuwa ne a cikin hanji inda suke samar da dubban ƙwai kowace rana. A wuraren da ba su da isasshen tsafta, waɗannan ƙwai suna gurɓata ƙasa. Wannan na iya faruwa ta hanyoyi da yawa: ana cin wannan ƙwan da ke maƙala da kayan lambu ne a lokacin da ba a dafa kayan lambun da kyau ba, ko ba a wanke ko an ɓare bawon da kyai ba;
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided English text into Hausa (gs - representing a standard Hausa script):

**Translation:**

Ƙarƙashar ƙwarƙwarkan (hookworms), ana samu da jiran jini da lalata a cikin kwayar launin jiki, wanda ke da lalata.  Ƙwarƙwarkan da ke da lalata (soil-transmitted helminths) na wucewa ta hanyar kasƙaarai wanda ke komawa a cikin lalata na mutanen da suka yi rauni.  Ƙwararrawar masu daɗi suna zuwa a cikin kwayar launin jiki inda suke fitar da kasƙaarai da yau da kullum. Aananin gidaje da ba su da ainiyyacciyar sana’a, waɗannan kasƙaarai ke lalata kasa.  Hakan zai iya zana da yawa da yawa: kasƙaarai da suka yi riki na amfani da kayauci lokacin da suke da kwayar launin jiki ba a yi da shi da kiyashi, a launar ko a yi da shi da kiyashi;

**Pronunciation Guide (Rough - Hausa pronunciation can vary):**

*   **Ƙarƙashar:**  Kahr-kahr-shahr
*   **ƙwarƙwarkan:**  Kwar-kwar-kahr-kahn
*   **Ana samu da:**  Ah-nah-sah-moo-dah
*   **jiran jini da lalata:**  Jeer-ahn je-nee-nah dah lah-lah-tah
*   **wanda ke da lalata:**  Wan-dah keh dah lah-lah-tah
*   **Ƙwarƙwarkan da ke da lalata:** Kwar-kwar-kahr-kahn dah keh dah lah-lah-tah
*   **na wucewa ta hanyar:** Nah woo-seh-wah tah hahn-yahr
*   **kasƙaarai:**  Kahs-kah-rai
*   **wanda ke komawa:** Wan-dah keh koh-moh-wah
*   **a cikin lalata:**  Ah kee-n dah lah-lah-tah
*   **mutanen da suka yi rauni:** Moo-tah-nen dah suk-kah-ee rah-nee
*   **Ƙwararrawar masu daɗi:** Kwar-rah-wah-rah mah-soo dah-dee
*   **suna zuwa:** Soo-nah zoo-wah
*   **a cikin kwayar launin jiki:** Ah kee-n kway-yah lah-noo-een je-kee
*   **indai suke fitar da:** In-dah soo-keh fee-tahr dah
*   **kasƙaarai da yau da kullum:** Kahs-kah-rai dah yow-dah kul-lum
*   **Aananin gidaje:** Ah-nah-nee gee-dah-jeh
*   **ba su da ainiyyacciyar sana’a:** Bah soo dah ah-nee-nyah-chee-yah-rah sah-nah-ah
*   **waɗannan kasƙaarai:** Wah-dah-nan kahs-kah-rai
*   **ke lalata kasa:** Keh lah-lah-tah kah-sah
*   **Hakan zai iya zana da yawa:** Hah-kahn zah-ee ee-yah zah-nah dah yow-wah
*   **kasƙaarai da suka yi riki na amfani da kayauci:** Kahs-kah-rai dah suk-kah-ee ree-kee nah ah-mah-fah-nee dah kah-yoo-chee
*   **lokacin da suke da kwayar launin jiki:** Loh-kah-seen dah soo-keh dah kway-yah lah-noo-een je-kee
*   **ba a yi da shi da kiyashi, a launar ko a yi da shi da kiyashi:** Bah ah-ee dah shee dah kee-yah-shee, ah lah-noo-ar koh ah-ee dah shee dah kee-yah-shee

**Important Notes:**

*   **Hausa is a complex language:**  This translation aims for accuracy and natural-sounding Hausa. However, nuances can be lost in translation.
*   **Dialects:** Hausa has many dialects. This translation uses a fairly standard form.
*   **Context is Key:**  The best translation always depends on the specific context.

translations.source: eggs are ingested from contaminated water sources; eggs are ingested by children who play in the contaminated soil and then put their hands in their mouths without washing them. Symptoms: Morbidity is related to the number of worms harboured. People with infections of light intensity (few worms) usually do not suffer from the infection. Heavier infections can cause a range of symptoms including intestinal manifestations (diarrhoea and abdominal pain), malnutrition, general malaise and weakness, and impaired growth and physical development.
translations.reference: ana cin ƙwan a gurɓataccen ruwa; yaran da ke wasa a gurɓataccen wuri suna cin ƙwan ne idan sun sanya hannayensu a cikin bakinsu ba tare da wankewa ba. Alamunta: kamuwa da cutar yana da alaƙa da adadin tsutsotsi da suka yi wa mutum katutu. Mutanen da ke ɗauke tsutsotsin ƙaɗan yawanci cutar ba ta kama su. Idan kuma suka yi yawa, suna iya haifar da alamomi iri-iri da suka danganci hanji (zawo da ciwon ciki), rashin nuna cewa mutum yana cin abinci mai gina jiki, raunin jiki da rashin girma da haɓakar jiki.

translations.source: Infections of very high intensity can cause intestinal obstruction that should be treated surgically. S. stercoralis may cause dermatological and gastro-intestinal morbidity and is also known to be associated with chronic malnutrition in children. In case of reduced host immunity, the parasite can cause the hyperinfection/dissemination syndrome that is invariably fatal if not promptly and properly cured and is often fatal despite the treatment. In 2001, delegates at the World Health Assembly unanimously endorsed a resolution (WHA54.19) urging endemic countries to start seriously tackling worms, specifically schistosomiasis and soil-transmitted helminths. The strategy for control of soil-transmitted helminth infections is to control morbidity through the periodic treatment of at-risk people living in endemic areas.
translations.reference: Lokacin da cutar ta yi tsanani sosai, tana iya haifar da toshewar hanji wanda ya kamata a ce an yi tiyata. S. stercoralis na iya haifar da cututtuka na fara da hanji kuma an san yana da alaƙa da rashin abinci mai gina jiki na yau da kullum a tsakanin yara. Idan ma mai ɗauke da cutar garkuwar jikinsa ta ragu, ƙwayar cuta na iya karaɗe masa jiki, wadda tana iya kisa a koyaushe idan ba a yi magani da sauri ba kuma sau da yawa mutum yana iya mutuwa duk da an masa jinya. A shekarar 2001, wakilai a Majalisar Kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya sun amince da wani kuduri (WHA54.19) wanda yake kira ga ƙasashe masu fama da cutar da su fara yaƙar tsutsotsi, musamman schistosomiasis da helminths. Dabarar yaƙar cututtukan tsutsotsin ita ce sarrafa cututtuka ta hanyar jinya na lokaci-lokaci na mutanen da ke fama da abin waɗanda kuma ke zaune a yankunan da ke fama da cutar.

translations.source: People at risk are: preschool children school-age children women of reproductive age (including pregnant women in the second and third trimesters and breastfeeding women) adults in certain high-risk occupations such as tea-pickers or miners.
translations.reference: Mutanen da za su iya daukar cutar: Yaran da ba su shiga makaranta ba tukunna Yara ƴan makaranta matan da suka kai shekarun haihuwa (ciki har da mata masu juna biyu da ke tsakanin wata 6 zuwa 9 da mata masu shayarwa) mutane a wasu sana'o'i masu haɗarin ɗaukar wannan cutar akwai masu noman ganyen shayi ko masu haƙar ma'adinai.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided text into Hausa, aiming for clarity and natural-sounding language:

**"Mun yi hankali da masu yuwarsa, kamar haka: masu yawu da ke da shekaru biyu da karatu, mata masu dafa jarurare (waɗanda ke da jiran jarurare a biyu da uku na shekara kuma ke ainihawtara), da masu aikin da ke da yuwarsa kamar masu yi da teka ko masu yiwa kokawa."**

**Explanation of Choices & Nuances:**

* **"Mun yi hankali da..."** -  This translates to "We are focusing on..." or "We are concerned with..." - a good way to introduce the list.
* **"Masu yuwarsa"** - This means "people at risk" or "those at risk."
* **"Masu yawu da ke da shekaru biyu da karatu"** - "Preschool children" is rendered as "children who are two years old and attending school."  This is a common and understandable way to express it in Hausa.
* **"Mata masu dafa jarurare"** - "Women of reproductive age" is translated as "women who are pregnant" (literally "women who are giving birth").
* **"(waɗanda ke da jiran jarurare a biyu da uku na shekara kuma ke ainihawtara)"** -  This clarifies "pregnant women in the second and third trimesters and breastfeeding women."  It breaks it down for better understanding.  "Ke da jiran jarurare" means "who are pregnant," "a biyu da uku na shekara" means "in the second and third trimesters," and "kuma ke ainihawtara" means "and who are breastfeeding."
* **"Da masu aikin da ke da yuwarsa"** - "Adults in certain high-risk occupations" is translated as "and adults in occupations that have risk."
* **"Masu yi da teka ko masu yiwa kokawa"** - "Tea-pickers or miners" is rendered as "those who pick tea or those who work in mines."

**Important Note:**  Hausa has many regional variations. This translation aims for a fairly standard, widely understood version.  If you have a specific region in mind, the phrasing might need slight adjustments.

translations.source: TreatmentThe WHO recommended medicines –albendazole (400 mg) and mebendazole (500 mg) – are effective, inexpensive and easy to administer by non-medical personnel (e.g. teachers). They have been through extensive safety testing and have been used in millions of people with few and minor side-effects. Both albendazole and mebendazole are donated to national ministries of health through WHO in all endemic countries for the treatment of all children of school age. Ivermectin for the control of S. stercoralis is expected to be available at affordable price from 2021.
translations.reference: Magani: Magungunan da WHO ta ba da shawarar aiki da su -albendazole (400 MG) da mebendazole (500 MG) - suna da tasiri, ba su da tsada kuma ga sauƙin gane yadda za a yi amfani da shi ko ga ma'aikatan da ba likita ba (misali malamai). An duba magungunan sosai ta hanyar gwaji mai yawa kuma an yi amfani da su a kan miliyoyin mutane, kuma ba a ga wata illa tare da su ba. Duka albendazole da mebendazole ana ba da su gudummawa ga ma'aikatun lafiya na ƙasa ta ƙarƙashin WHO a duk ƙasashen da ke fama da cutar don kula da duk yaran da suka isa shiga makaranta. Ivermectin wanda ake sa ran zai rage yaɗuwar S. stercoralis zai kasance a farashi mai araha daga 2021.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa (gs - representing a standard Hausa script), aiming for clarity and accuracy:

**Yawancin Karbar da Rikicin Lafiya (WHO) ya bada shawarar wata dama na halaka – albendazole (400mg) da mebendazole (500mg) – suna da yuwarsa, masu tasune kuma da yuwarsa don a yi amfani da su daga masu kare lafiya (misali, masu koyarwa). Wasu bincike da suka yi suka tabbatar da cewa sunyi ajiya kuma an yi amfani da su da masu yawansu da lalata da yauwa. Albendazole da mebendazole dukansu an ba su a kan ministocin lafiya na kasa ta hanyar WHO a duk wani yankin da kwayoyin cututtuka da dama ke yasa. Ivermectin don gaggauta da S. stercoralis ta yi murfin shawarar zata bude da wani farashi mai tasune daga shekara ta 2021.**

**Explanation of some choices and considerations:**

*   **Yawancin Karbar da Rikicin Lafiya (WHO):**  This is a direct translation of "World Health Organization."
*   **Wata dama na halaka:** This translates to "recommended medicines."
*   **Masu tasune, masu tasune kuma da yuwarsa:**  This captures the meaning of "effective, inexpensive and easy to administer."  I've used repetition to emphasize the positive qualities.
*   **Masu kare lafiya:**  "Non-medical personnel" is translated as "those who protect health."
*   **Wasu bincike da suka yi suka tabbatar da cewa:** "They have been through extensive safety testing" is rendered as "some research they did confirmed that."
*   **Sunyi ajiya kuma an yi amfani da su da masu yawansu da yauwa:** "Few and minor side-effects" is translated as "they are safe and widely used."
*   **Dukansu an ba su a kan ministocin lafiya na kasa:** "Donated to national ministries of health" is translated as "they are given to national health ministries."
*   **Duk wani yankin da kwayoyin cututtuka da dama ke yasa:** "In all endemic countries" is translated as "in all regions where many parasites are found."
*   **Ta yi murfin shawarar zata bude da wani farashi mai tasune:** "Is expected to be available at affordable price" is translated as "it is expected to be available at an affordable price."

**Important Note:**  Hausa is a very context-dependent language.  A more nuanced translation might be possible with more context about the specific audience and purpose of the document.  This translation prioritizes clarity and accuracy for a general audience.

translations.source: Stillbirth Overview: A baby who dies after 28 weeks of pregnancy, but before or during birth, is classified as a stillbirth.There are nearly 2 million stillbirths every year – one every 16 seconds. Over 40% of all stillbirths occur during labour – a loss that could be avoided with improved quality and respectful care during childbirth including routine monitoring and timely access to emergency obstetric care when required. Experiencing a stillbirth during pregnancy or childbirth is a tragedy insufficiently addressed in global agendas, policies and funded programmes. There are psychological costs, especially to women and their families, such as maternal depression, financial consequences and economic repercussions, as well as stigma and taboo.In 2014, the World Health Assembly endorsed the Every Newborn Action Plan (ENAP), which includes a global target of 12 or fewer third trimester (late) stillbirths per 1,000 total births in every country by 2030.
translations.reference: Haihuwar jariri a mace Bayani: Jaririn da ya mutu bayan makonni 28 a ciki, kafin ko lokacin haihuwa, ana ƙirga shi a matsayin wanda aka haifa a mace. Ana haihuwar jarirai kusan miliyan 2 a mace a kowace shekara - jariri ɗaya ke nan a cikin duk daƙika 16. Fiye da kashi 40 cikin 100 na jariran da ake haifa a mace suna mutuwa ne a lokacin naƙuda – asarar da za a iya guje wa ta hanyar ingantaccen tsari da nuna kulawa yayin haihuwa, ciki har da sa ido na yau da kullum da ba da kulawar haihuwa ta gaggawa lokacin da ya kamata. Mutuwar jarirai a lokacin juna biyu ko lokacin haihuwa wani bala'i ne wanda ba a magance shi ba a cikin ajandar duniya, manufofi da shirye-shiryen da aka ba wa kuɗi. Ana samun kaɗuwar zuciya, musamman ga mata da danginsu, kamar shiga damuwa lokacin jego, matsalolin kuɗi, da kuma nuna ƙyama da ƙiyayya. A shekarar 2014, Majalisar Kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya ta amince da Tsarin Hidima ga Jarirai (ENAP), wanda ya haɗa da burin rage adadin mace-macen jarirai a cikin mahaifa da guda 12 ko ƙasa da haka a wata na huɗu zuwa shida lokacin rainon ciki a jimillar haihuwa 1,000 a kowace ƙasa nan da 2030.

translations.source: In 2021, 139 mainly high-income and upper middle-income countries had met this target, but 56 countries will not each the ENAP target by 2030 if further efforts are not made. If current trends continue, 15.9 million babies will be stillborn; nearly half of these (7.7 million, 48%) will occur in sub-Saharan Africa. Causes: With quality health care throughout pregnancy and childbirth, most stillbirths are preventable. The major causes of stillbirth include pregnancy and childbirth-related complications, prolonged pregnancy, maternal infections such as malaria, syphilis and HIV, maternal conditions especially hypertension, and diabetes, and fetal growth restriction (when an unborn baby is unable to achieve its growth potential and therefore smaller than it should be). Congenital abnormalities are responsible for less than 10% of stillbirths reported nationally in high-income countries and the exact proportion in low-income settings is unknown due to limitations in diagnostics.
translations.reference: A shekarar 2021, ƙasashe 139 galibi masu ƙarfin tattalin arziki da masu tattalin arziki dama-dama sun cimma wannan manufa, amma ƙasashe 56 ba za su cimma wannan manufa ta ENAP ba nan da shekarar 2030 idan ba a ƙara yin kokari ba. Idan aka ci gaba a haka, za a haifi jarirai miliyan 15.9 a mace; kuma kusan rabin waɗannan (watau miliyan 7.7, 48%) duk a yankin ƙasashen kudu da Sahara. Abubuwan da ke jawo shi: Idan akwai ingantacciyar kulawar lafiya tun daga lokacin rainon ciki da haihuwa, ana iya kauce wa mafi yawan haihuwar jarirai a mace. Manyan abubuwan da ke haifar da haihuwar jarirai a mace sun haɗa da matsalolin rainon ciki da haihuwa, doguwar naƙuda, cututtuka kamar zazzabin cizon sauro, cutar sifilis da cutar sida, hawan jini, da ciwon sukari, da hana girman jaririn da ke ciki. Matsalolin da ake haifar mutum da su suna haddasa ƙasa da kaso 10 na mutuwar jarirai kafin a haife su kamar yadda aka ruwaito a ƙasashe masu ƙarfin tattalin arziki kuma ba a san ainihin adadin ba a ƙasashe masu ƙarancin tattalin arziki saboda rashin iya binciko waɗannan lamurran.

**Yawushe!**

A 2021, 139 kasuwa da ke kera kuwo da jikansu da yadda suke (kasuwannin kuwo da jikansu na mahayawa da kuma mahaipin kuwo), sun kammala kashi na nan. Duk da haka, 56 kasuwa da ba za su samu kashi na nan na ENAP a shekarar 2030 ba, idan a yi kokwarwar shiri da fatar da shi.  Idan al'amarin na ci gaba da yi haka, mili uku da shida masu ritshin (15.9 million) za su kasu a matsuwa.  Kashi mai girma (7.7 million, 48%) na yaba daga yankin Arewa na Sahara.

translations.source: Factors related to age of the mother and practicing smoking can also increase the risk of maternal disease and stillbirth. Stillbirths can be prevented through family planning to avoid unwanted pregnancies, good health and nutrition prior to and during pregnancy, quality and respectful antenatal and childbirth care including adequate skilled health personnel including midwives. Syphilis treatment in pregnancy could also prevent an estimated 200 000 stillbirths, while fetal heart rate monitoring and labour surveillance and prompt interventions when needed are crucial for preventing 832 000 intrapartum stillbirths and reducing neonatal deaths. Stillbirths are strongly linked to adverse social and economic determinants of health. Prevention and responsive care need to be integrated across the continuum of maternal health care, and beyond.
translations.reference: Abubuwan da suka danganci shekarun uwa da kuma shan taba suna iya ƙara yiwuwar kamuwa da cututtukan da ke da alaƙa da jego da kuma haihuwar jarirai a mace. Ana iya kauce wa haihuwar jarirai a mace ta hanyar tsarin iyali don hana samin haihuwar da ba a buƙata, samun cikakken kiwon lafiya da abinci mai gina jiki kafin da lokacin rainon ciki, samun ingantacciyar kulawa yayin haihuwa, ciki har da samar da ƙwararrun ma'aikatan kiwon lafiya, kamar da ungozoma. Maganin cutar sifilis a lokacin rainon ciki shi ma zai iya hana haihuwar kimanin jarirai 200 000 a mace, yayin da saka idanu kan bugun zuciya da sa ido a kan aiki da kuma kawo ɗauki lokacin da ake buƙata suna da mahimmanci don kauce wa mutuwar jarirai da ke cikin mahaifansu guda 832,000 tare da rage mutuwar jarirai. Haihuwar jariri a mace har yanzu tana da alaƙa mai ƙarfi da munanan al'amurran lafiya na zamantakewa da tattalin arziki. Riga-kafi da nuna kulawa ta hanyar kai agaji suna buƙatar a haɗa su a yi amfani da su a fannin kula da lafiyar mata da sauran fannoni.

translations.source: This includes respectful and supportive care in the event of a death. Listening to the experiences and voices of women and their communities is essential to help address issues of stigma associated with stillbirth. WHO response: More needs to be done to integrate stillbirth prevention within global and national agendas for high quality health care for women, adolescents, and babies. Through the Global Strategy for Women's, Children's and Adolescents Health 2016–2030 and implementing the recommendations of the Every Newborn Action Plan (2014), WHO is working to end preventable stillbirths, as part of efforts to improve maternal, newborn, child and adolescent health. Most stillbirths do not receive a birth certificate and are not registered.
translations.reference: Wannan ya haɗa da kulawa da tallafi a yayin mutuwa. Sauraron abubuwan da suka faru mata da al'ummominsu da suka fito yana da mahimmanci don taimakawa wajen magance matsalolin ƙyama da ke da alaƙa da haihuwar jarirai a mace. Amsar WHO: Ana buƙatar ƙara zage damtse don ganin an sanya yaƙi da haihuwar jarirai a mace cikin ajandoji na duniya da na ƙasa don ingantaccen kiwon lafiya ga mata, matasa, da jarirai. Ta ƙarƙashin shirin Dabarun Lafiyar Mata, Yara da Matasa a Faɗin Diniya 2016-2030 da amfani da shawarwarin kowane Tsarin Hidima wa Jarirai a (2014), WHO na aiki don kawo ƙarshen haifuwar jarirai mace, a matsayin wani ɓangare na ƙoƙarin inganta lafiyar mata masu juna biyu, Jariri, yaro da lafiyar matasa. Yawancin jariran da ake haihuwa a mace ba sa samun takardar shaidar haihuwa kuma ba su da rajista.

translations.source: Improving systems for reporting births and neonatal deaths is a matter of human rights and a prerequisite for reducing stillbirths. In addition, there is a need to strengthen routine health information systems to accurately capture and report stillbirths for monitoring and improving the quality of care. WHO provides tools to help countries improve their data on both stillbirths and neonatal deaths. WHO also has guidance to help countries review and investigate individual deaths so they can recommend and implement solutions to prevent similar ones in the future and a standard classification system for perinatal deaths (ICD-PM). WHO and UNICEF are supporting a call for collective action to end preventable stillbirths by:
translations.reference: Inganta tsarin bayar da rahoton haihuwa da mutuwar jarirai al'amari ne na 'yancin ɗan'adam kuma abu ne da ake buƙata don rage haifar jarirai a mace. Bugu da ƙari, akwai buƙatar ƙarfafa tsarin bayanan kiwon lafiya na yau da kullum don samar da sahihin rahoton haihuwa don sa ido da haɓaka ingancin ba da kulawar lafiya. WHO ta ba da kayan aiki don taimaka wa ƙasashe su inganta ɗaukar ƙididdigarsu game da haihuwa da kuma mutuwar jarirai. WHO ta kuma ba da hanyoyi don taimaka wa ƙasashe yin nazari da bincika mutuwar mutane don su iya ba da shawararda aiwatar da mafita don hana irin waɗannan a nan gaba da kuma samar da tsarin tantance mutuwa kafin haihuwa (ICD-PM). WHO da UNICEF suna goyan bayan kira ga matakin gama kai don kawo ƙarshen haifuwar jarirai a mace ta hanyar:

translations.reference: ƙara wayar da kai da rage jin ƙyama taimaka wa mata da iyalan da aka mutu aka bari inganta harkar kiwon lafiya kallon matsalar mutuwar jarirai kafin haihuwa abin da ya shafi ƙasa da al'umma yunƙurin ƙara ƙaimi wajen ɗaukar ƙididdigar mutuwar jarirai a mace domin tabbatar da faruwar lamarin da kuma sanin halin da ake ciiki.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided English text into Hausa (gs - likely referring to a specific Hausa script or dialect), aiming for clarity and naturalness:

**Hausa Translation:**

"Nara da ƙara da ci gaba da rage lalata, da tallafawa mata da al'umar da suka rasa halayta.  Tsarin lafan ya yi karfi don ba da aminci mai tsafta.  Ƙarƙashin doka da kuma ainihin al'adu, za mu guza da kyakkyawan kyakkyawar kiyaye mata da yawa.  Barin da suka kashe za mu yi auna da yabo, kuma a sake sauran da yabo don da'awa da koyawa."

**Explanation of Choices and Nuances:**

* **"Increasing awareness and reducing stigma"**:  "Nara da ƙara da ci gaba da rage lalata" - This captures the idea of growing understanding and lessening negative attitudes.
* **"supporting bereaved women and families"**: "da tallafawa mata da al'umar da suka rasa halayta" -  Directly translates to "supporting women and families who have lost someone."
* **"strengthening health systems to provide high-quality care"**: "Tsarin lafan ya yi karfi don ba da aminci mai tsafta" -  This emphasizes the need for a robust healthcare system to deliver reliable care.
* **"nationalizing and localizing stillbirth targets"**: "Ƙarƙashin doka da kuma ainihin al'adu, za mu guza da kyakkyawar kyakkyawar kiyaye mata da yawa." - This is a more complex phrase.  I've interpreted it as ensuring targets are both nationally defined *and* adapted to local circumstances.  "Kiyaye mata da yawa" refers to the number of stillbirths.
* **"improving measurement of stillbirths to enhance evidence and knowledge"**: "Barin da suka kashe za mu yi auna da yabo, kuma a sake sauran da yabo don da'awa da koyawa." - This focuses on better data collection and analysis to build a stronger understanding of the issue.


**Important Notes:**

* **Hausa is a diverse language:**  There are regional variations in Hausa. This translation aims for a fairly standard, widely understood form.
* **Context is Key:**  The best translation always depends on the specific context of the document.  If you can provide more information about the document's purpose, I can refine the translation further.

translations.source: Substandard and falsified medical products Overview: Up to two billion people around the world lack access to necessary medicines, vaccines, medical devices including in vitro diagnostics, and other health products, which creates a vacuum that is too often filled by substandard and falsified products. This problem is growing as global supply chains become more complex, meaning products manufactured in one country may be packaged in a second country and distributed across borders to be marketed or sold to consumers in a third. The growth of e-commerce also contributes to this trend by making it easier to purchase medicines online, often from unauthorized sources. WHO has identified this issue one of the urgent health challenges for the next decade given that more than one in ten medicines in low- and middle-income countries are estimated to be substandard or falsified.
translations.reference: Kayan aikin jinya da magunguna marasa inganci da na bogi Bayyani: Kimanin mutane biliyan biyu a duniya ba su da damar samun ainihin magunguna, alluran riga-kafi, na'urorin likitanci da suka hada da na bincika rashin lafiya, da sauran kayayyakin kiwon lafiya, waɗanda saboda rashinsu sai dai kawai a yi amfani da marasa inganci kuma na bogi. Wannan matsala tana ta ƙaruwa ne yayin da salsalar samar da kayayyaki na duniya ke ƙara cika da sarƙaƙƙiya, ma'ana kayayyakin da aka ƙera a wata ƙasa ana iya tattara ninke su cikin fakiti a wata ƙasa kuma a tura su don a tallata ko a sayar da su ga masu siye a wata ƙasa daban. Bunƙasar kasuwancin zamani ya taimaka wajen wannan al'amari ta hanyar sauƙaƙawa wajen siyan magungunan ta intanet, yawanci ta hannun waɗanda ba su cancanta ba. . Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta bayyana wannan matsalar da ɗaya daga cikin matsalolin lafiya da za a fuskanta nan da shekara goma, inda aka yi hasashen samun ɗaya daga cikin magunguna goma yakasance ba shi da inganci ko na jabu a ƙasashen da ke da ƙaranci da matsakaicin kuɗin shiga.

translations.source: No country remains untouched from this issue, and WHO has received reports of substandard or falsified medical medicines, vaccines and in vitro diagnostics from all regions of the world. Both generic and innovator medicines can be falsified, ranging from very expensive products for cancer to very inexpensive products for treatment of pain. WHO Member States have agreed on a comprehensive global strategy focused on prevention, detection and response to move towards achieving increased access to quality, safe, effective and quality medical products. Impact: Substandard and falsified medical products create many problems for both the individual taking the medicine and for families, the larger society, health care system and supply chain. When medicines do not work the way they should, they can fail to treat or prevent disease, contribute to antimicrobial resistance, waste precious resources and lead to a loss of confidence in medicines and distrust of healthcare providers.
translations.reference: Babu wata ƙasa da wannan al'amari bai shafa ba, in Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta samu rahotanni game da magunguna da allurori marasa inganci ko na jabu da kuma gwaje-gwajen cututtuka daga kome lungu da saƙo na duniya. Wannan lamari na yin jabu ka iya shafar kowane nau'i na magani, kama daga magungunan kansa masu tsada zuwa magungunan kashe zafi masu sauƙi. ƙasashen da cikin Majalisar Ɗinkin Duniya sun amince da a ɗauki babban mataki da zai mayar da hankali wajen kawarwa da ganowa da kuma ɗaukar mataki wajen samun ƙaruwar kaiwa ga ingantacce, amintacce kuma gangariyar magani. Tasiri: Magunguna marasa inganci ko na jabu na haifar da matsaloli da dama ga ɗaiɗaikun mutane da iyalai da suke amfani da su da ma al'umma da tsarin kula da lafiya da kuma hanyoyin rarraba su. Yayin da maganunguna ba su yi aiki ba, za su gaza ne wajen yin maganin cuta, lamarin da ka iya haifar da tirjiyar ƙwayoyin cuta da ɓarnar dukiya da kuma daina amincewa da da magunguna da kuma masu samar da kulawa ta lafiya.

translations.source: This can have a negative socioeconomic impact, contributing to related loss in productivity and adding expenses to the individual and national health system. They are most likely to reach patients in situations where there is constrained access to quality and safe medical products, poor governance and weak technical capacity. Although this issue impacts all countries, countries where there are weak or non-existent regulatory systems bear the greatest burden of substandard and falsified medical products. In an increasingly globalized world, no one country has sufficient resources and capacity to deal with this issue in isolation. Through global systems and processes such as the WHO Global Surveillance and Monitoring System and WHO Member State Mechanism,
translations.reference: Wannan ka iya haifar da mummunan tasiri a kan tsarin tattalin arziki da zamantakewa, wanda shi kuma zai taimaka wajen daina samar da magungunan da ƙarin kashe kuɗin ga ɗaiɗaikun mutane da kuma tsarin lafiya na ƙasa. Wannan tasiri ka iya kaiwa ga marasa lafiya, a yayin da aka samu tarnaƙi wajen kaiwa wa ga ingantacce kuma amintaccen magani da rashin shugabanci mai nagarta da kuma rauni wajen amfani da fasaha. Kodayake wannan matsala ta shafi kafatanin ƙasashen duniya, to amma a ƙasashen da da suke da rauni ko rashin tsarin sa-ido, sun fi samun magunguna marasa inganci ko na jabu. Sakamakon yadda duniya ke ci gaba da kasancewa tamkar ɗaya, babu wata ƙasa da ke da ƙarfin tattalin arzikin da za ta tunkari wannan matsalar ita kaɗai. Ta hanyar tsare-tsare na duniya da kuma hukumomi irin su Hukumar Sa-ido ta Hukumar Llafiya ta Duniya da kuma Kwamitin Mambobin ƙasashe na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya,

translations.source: Member States are working together to prevent, detect and respond to substandard and falsified medical products.
translations.reference: Mabobin ƙasashe na aiki kafaɗa da kafaɗa domin hana da gano da kuma ɗaukar matakai a kan magaunguna marasa inganci ko jabu.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa, aiming for clarity and naturalness:

**"Jam’atar Gaba da Sauran Al’ummu ke aiki tare don ganowa, gano, da kuma auna kuren kayayyaki na lafaffen da suka yi watsi da shi."**

**Breakdown and Explanation:**

*   **Jam’atar Gaba da Sauran Al’ummu:**  “Member States” – This translates to “The group of leading and other communities.”  It’s a common way to refer to a group of nations in Hausa.
*   **ke aiki tare:** “are working together” –  “are working together”
*   **don ganowa, gano, da kuma auna kuren:** “to prevent, detect and respond” – This is a combined phrase.
    *   **ganowa:** “to prevent”
    *   **gano:** “to detect”
    *   **da kuma auna kuren:** “and to respond” (literally, “and also to measure the problem/situation”)
*   **kayayyaki na lafaffen:** “substandard medical products” – “products that are not good/quality”
*   **da suka yi watsi da shi:** “and falsified” – “and those that ignore/disregard it” (This captures the meaning of “falsified” – products that are deliberately misrepresented).

**Important Note:**  Hausa has many nuances, and there can be slightly different ways to express the same idea. This translation prioritizes conveying the core meaning accurately and using language that would be readily understood by a Hausa speaker.

Would you like me to:

*   Provide alternative translations?
*   Explain any part of the translation in more detail?
*   Translate another document?

translations.source: Suicide prevention Overview: More than 700 000 people die by suicide every year. For each suicide, there are an estimated more than 20 suicide attempts. Suicide can occur at any stage of life and in all regions of the world. In 2019, suicide was the fourth leading cause of death among 15–29-year-olds globally, and 77% of all suicides happened in low- and middle-income countries.
translations.reference: Magance ƙunar-baƙin-wake/ksan-kai Sharhi: Fiye da mutane 700 000 ne suke rasa rayukansu a kowace shekara a sanadiyyar ƙunar-baƙin-wake/kisan-kai. Bisa faruwar kowane ƙunar-baƙin-wake, akwai hasashen yin ƙunar-baƙin-wake fiye da 20. ƙunar-baƙin-wake/kisank-kai kan iya aukuwa a kowane mataki na rayuwa, sannan kuma a kowane ɓangare na duniya. A 2019, ƙunar-baƙin-wake shi ne na huɗu a cikin abubuwan da suke haifar da mutuwa a tsakanin 'yan shekara 15-29 a duniya da kuma kaso 77% na ƙunar-baƙin-wake/kisan-kai na faruwa ne a tsakanin ƙasashe masu mafi qaranci da matsakaicin kuɗin shiga.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the document into Hausa, aiming for clarity and accuracy while considering the nuances of the language:

**Sashen Tsalle-Tsalle: (Suicide Prevention Overview)**

Kuma karin mata 700,000 da mutum ke yi tsalle-tsalle a duk duniya duk wane shekara. Don haka, don kowane tsalle-tsalle, ana saita cewa komai karin 20 da mutum ke yi tsalle-tsalle. Tsalle-tsalle na iya zama a kowane lokaci na rayuwa kuma a duk wani yankin duniya. A shekara ta 2019, tsalle-tsalle ya zama karo na huɗu a kan kwararar mutuwa ga masu shekara 15-29 a duniya, kuma 77% na dukanmu tsalle-tsalle sun yi a arewasa da gabas na kasa.

**Explanation of Choices and Considerations:**

*   **"Suicide prevention Overview"** translated as **"Sashen Tsalle-Tsalle"** (meaning "The aspect of preventing suicide").
*   **"More than 700 000 people die by suicide every year"** translated as **"Kuma karin mata 700,000 da mutum ke yi tsalle-tsalle a duk duniya duk wane shekara."** (meaning "And more than 700,000 people are committing suicide every year in the world").  I've used "ke yi tsalle-tsalle" which is a common way to express the act of suicide in Hausa.
*   **"For each suicide, there are an estimated more than 20 suicide attempts"** translated as **"Don haka, don kowane tsalle-tsalle, ana saita cewa komai karin 20 da mutum ke yi tsalle-tsalle."** (meaning "Therefore, for each suicide attempt, it is estimated that more than 20 people attempt suicide").
*   **"Suicide can occur at any stage of life and in all regions of the world"** translated as **"Tsalle-tsalle na iya zama a kowane lokaci na rayuwa kuma a duk wani yankin duniya."** (meaning "Suicide can happen at any time in life and in all parts of the world").
*   **"In 2019, suicide was the fourth leading cause of death among 15–29-year-olds globally"** translated as **"A shekara ta 2019, tsalle-tsalle ya zama karo na huɗu a kan kwararar mutuwa ga masu shekara 15-29 a duniya."** (meaning "In the year 2019, suicide became the fourth leading cause of death among 15-29 year olds globally").
*   **"77% of all suicides happened in low- and middle-income countries"** translated as **"kuma 77% na dukanmu tsalle-tsalle sun yi a arewasa da gabas na kasa."** (meaning "and 77% of all suicides happened in Africa and Asia").  I've used "arewasa da gabas na kasa" to represent "low- and middle-income countries" in a way that is understandable in Hausa.

**Important Note:**  Hausa has many dialects and regional variations. This translation is a general one, aiming for a widely understood form of the language.  For a more precise translation, it would be beneficial to know the specific region where the translation will be used.

Would you like me to:

*   Translate a different document?
*   Adjust this translation based on a specific region of Hausa?
*   Explain any particular word or phrase in more detail?

translations.source: Almost 20% of global suicides were due to pesticide self-poisoning. While the link between suicide and mental health conditions (in particular, depression and alcohol use disorders) and a previous suicide attempt is well established in high-income countries, many suicides happen impulsively in moments of crisis. Further risk factors for suicide include experience of loss, loneliness, discrimination, a relationship break-up, financial problems, chronic pain and illness, violence, abuse, and conflict or other humanitarian emergencies. Stigma around mental health conditions and suicide means many people thinking about suicide do not seek help. Suicides and suicide attempts have a ripple effect that impacts on families, friends, colleagues, communities and societies.
translations.reference: Kimanin kaso 20% na ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai a duniya, na faruwa ne sakamakon shan guba bisa ra'in ƙashi-kai. A yayin da aka tabbatar da danganata ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai da yanayin matsalar ƙwaƙwalwa (Musamman damuwa da shan barasa ba tare da ƙaƙƙautawa ba) da kuma yunƙurin yin ƙunar-baƙin-wake/kisank-kai a baya a ƙasashen da yawan kuɗin shiga, inda yawan yin ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai ke faruwa a lokacin rigingimu. Abubuwan da ke haifar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai sun haɗa da karaya da damuwa da nuna bambanci da rabuwar wata alaƙa da matsalar kuɗi da matsanancin ciwo da cuta da keta haddi da rigingimu da sauran abubuwa da suka shafi keta haddin ɗan'adam. Matsalar yanayin hauka da na ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai shi ne mutane suna yin tunanin ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai ba neman taimako ba. ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai ko ƙoƙarin yin hakan yana da mummunan tasiri a kan iyalai da abokai da abokan aiki da al'umma gaba ɗaya.

WHO’s LIVE LIFE approach recommends four effective, evidence-based key interventions which should be included in every national response to suicide:
translations.reference: ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai: Adadin faruwarsa a duniya Rahoton faruwar ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai a 2019 a duniya Gwagwarmayar Rayuwa: jagora wajen kawar da yin ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai a ƙasashe Kawarwa: Akwai matakai da dama da za a iya ɗauka a matakin ɗaiɗaikun mutane da al'umma da kuma matakin ƙasa wajen kawar da aukuwar ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai da kuma yunƙurin yin hakan. translations.source: Suicide prevention efforts require coordination and collaboration among multiple sectors, including health, education, labour, agriculture, business, justice, law, defence, politics and the media. Suicide prevention is often not adequately addressed because of stigma and lack of awareness that suicide is a major public health problem. Communities also play a crucial role in preventing suicide. The WHO community engagement toolkit guides communities in identifying priorities and implementing activities according to local contexts. WHO response: The urgency to act to prevent suicides has been recognized and prioritized at the highest levels.
translations.reference: Yunƙurin kawar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai na buƙatar haɗin-kai da haɗin gwiwa a tsakanin ɓangarori, waɗanda suka haɗa da ɓangaren lafiya da ilimi da ƙwadago da noma da kasuwanci da shari'a da doka da tsaro da siyasa da kuma kafafen watsa labarai. Ba kasafai ake kawar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai yadda ya kamata ba saboda damuwa da rashin wayar da kai, wanda shi ne babban ƙalubalen ɓangaren lafiya. Su ma al'ummomi suna da rawar da za su taka wajen kawar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai. Bayanan Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya na yi wa al'ummomi jagoranci sun bayyana yadda al'ummomi za su gano abubuwan da suka fi muhimmanci wajen aiwatar da aiwatar da su bisa ga kowace al'umma. Bayanin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya: An ba wa ƙoƙarin gaggauta kawar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai matuƙar fifiko.

translations.source: The reduction of suicide rates in countries is an indicator in the UN Sustainable Development Goals (the only indicator for mental health), WHO’s General Programme of Work and WHO’s Comprehensive Mental Health Action Plan 2013–2030. The first WHO world suicide report, Preventing suicide: a global imperative, published in 2014, aimed to increase awareness of the public health significance of suicide and suicide attempts and make suicide prevention a public health priority. Governments are encouraged to implement WHO’s LIVE LIFE package of effective and evidence-based key interventions for suicide prevention, and to develop or strengthen comprehensive national suicide prevention strategies in a multisectoral public health approach. National leadership and coordination on suicide prevention are further supported by the publication of National suicide prevention strategies: progress, examples and indicators. Recognizing that data and statistics are necessary for advocacy and decision-making, WHO published Suicide worldwide in 2019: Global Health Estimates.
translations.reference: Raguwar yawan aukuwar ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai a ƙasashe alama ce ta ayyukan Hukumar Ci-gaba ta Majalisar Ɗinkin Duniya (alama ce kawai a ɓabgaren lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa) da Shirye-shiryen Ayyuka na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya da kuma Shirin Samar da Wadatacciyar Lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa na 2013-2030. Rahoton Hukmar Lafiya ta Duniya a kan ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai na farko ya nuna cewa, kawar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai: rahoton da aka buga a 2014 da manufar ƙara wayar da kai a kan muhimmancin inganta lafiyar al'umma wajen daƙile aukuwar ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai ko kuma yunƙurin yin hakan da kuma da ba wa kawar da aukuwar ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai fifiko tamkar na kula da lafiyar al'umma. An ƙarfafar gwiyoyin gwamnatoci da su aiwatar da shirin Hukumar Lafiya na Rayuwa yadda ya kamata ta hanyar ɗaukar matakan kawar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai da kuma samar da dabarun kawar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai na ƙasa, ta hanyar dabarun kula da lafiya daban-daban. Ana ƙarfafar shugabannni da masu sa-ido a kan kawar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai ta hanyar buga rahotanni game da dabarun daƙile ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai, ta hanyar bayyana ci-gaban da aka samu da misalai da kuma alamomi. Sakamakon gamsuwa da muhimmancin da ke tattare da da bayanai da ƙididdiga wajen yanke shawara,Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta buga rahoto aukuwar ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai a duniya a 2019: Hashen Lafiya na Duniya.
