translations.source: Dr Nahya Salim, Tanzania: Born Too Soon co-author and national lead of Newborn Essential Solutions and Technologies 360 (NEST360) “There is now no excuse for silence. We now have in our hands the devices and the knowledge to change outcomes for our most vulnerable newborns. I am proud to see my government now investing and committed to implementation across even rural areas. The next decade can and must be different for those facing preterm birth here and everywhere.”
translations.reference: Dr Nahya Salim, Tanzania: Ɗaya daga cikin marubuta na Born Too Soon sannan kuma jagora na Newborn Essential Solutions and Technologies 360 (NEST360) na ƙasa. A yanzu kenan babu dalili na yin shiru. Yanzu muna da wuƙa da nama da ilimi na sauya makomar jariranmu da wannan abin zai iya shafa. Ina mai alfahari da ganin a yanzu gwamnatin ƙasata ta mayar da hankali a kan aiwatarwa hatta a yankunan karkara. Shekaru goma masu zuwa suna iya zama, kai dole ne ma su zama daban dangane da masu fuskantar haihuwar bakwaini.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the document into Hausa, aiming for accuracy and natural flow:

**"Dr Nahya Salim, Tanzania: Born Too Soon - mawakwafi kuma mai jagalin kasa na Yanayin da Tsaro na Rayoyin Jarirai 360 (NEST360) “Ba a da wani dalili kuma na dogara da shi. Mun samu hanyar da za mu cance yadda ake rayuwa da rayar da za mu yi mata tasari ga masu yuwarsu da lalata. Ina taya makwabtana ya yi aiki kuma yana da gaskiya wajen aiwatarwa a duk wani yankin jama’a. Shekaru goma na gaba za mu iya kuma dole a yi hakan ga waɗanda ke fama da raywar jarirai na lafiya a nan kuma a duniya kaɗa.”**

**Explanation of Choices & Nuances:**

* **"mawakwafi kuma mai jagalin kasa"** -  This translates "co-author and national lead" –  "mawakwafi" means co-author, and "mai jagalin kasa" means national lead.
* **"Yanayin da Tsaro na Rayoyin Jarirai 360 (NEST360)"** - This is a direct translation of "Newborn Essential Solutions and Technologies 360 (NEST360)". Keeping the acronym is common practice.
* **“Ba a da wani dalili kuma na dogara da shi”** - This captures the sentiment of "There is now no excuse for silence."  It’s a more idiomatic way to express the urgency.
* **"mun samu hanyar da za mu cance yadda ake rayuwa da rayar da za mu yi mata tasari"** - This translates "We now have in our hands the devices and the knowledge to change outcomes."  It’s a slightly more descriptive way to convey the meaning.
* **"Ina taya makwabtana ya yi aiki kuma yana da gaskiya wajen aiwatarwa"** - This translates "I am proud to see my government now investing and committed to implementation."  "Ina taya" expresses pride.
* **"a duk wani yankin jama’a"** - This translates "across even rural areas."
* **"Shekaru goma na gaba za mu iya kuma dole a yi hakan"** - This translates "The next decade can and must be different."  It’s a more forceful way of saying "must be."
* **"ga waɗanda ke fama da raywar jarirai na lafiya a nan kuma a duniya kaɗa”** - This translates "for those facing preterm birth here and everywhere."

**Important Note:** Hausa has many regional variations. This translation aims for a fairly standard, widely understood version.  If you need a translation for a specific region of Hausa-speaking Nigeria or Niger, the wording might need slight adjustments.

translations.source: Dr Anshu Banerjee, Director for Maternal, Newborn, Child and Adolescent Health and Ageing at WHO “Ensuring quality care for these tiniest, most vulnerable babies and their families is absolutely imperative for improving child health and survival. Progress is also needed to help prevent preterm births -- this means every woman must be able to access quality health services before and during pregnancy to identify and manage risks.” Steven Lauwerier, Director of Health (a.i.), UNICEF “After every preterm death is a trail of loss and heartbreak.
translations.reference: Dr Anshu Banerjee, Darektan kula da lafiyar mata masu ciki da jarirai da yara da matasa da harkar da ta shafi tsufa na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO). Tabbatar da an samar da ingantacciyar kulawa ga waɗannan mitsitsan jarirai da iyalansu ya zama wajibi domin inganta kula da yara da rage mace-macensu. Akwai buƙatar samun cigaba ta fuskar kula da jarirai bakwaini --- wannan na nufin cewa dole kowace mace mai ciki ta iya samun damar halartar asibiti kafin da kuma yayin da take ɗauke da juna biyu domin gano tare da fuskantar ƙalubale. Steven Lauwerier, Darektan Kiwon Lafiya (a.i.), UNICEF Babban rashi da damuwa ne ke biyo bayan dukkan mutuwar jariri bakwaini.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided text into Hausa (gs - likely referring to a specific Hausa script or format, which I'll aim to represent as accurately as possible):

**Translation:**

Dr Anshu Banerjee, Sarkin Daur Masu Hawauniya, Masu Hafe Kwararfin Daka, Masu Kishi da Matasa a WHO “Amsaicin daidai da lafiyar kwakwaran, masu yawa, masu kashi da matasa shine wani abu mai kyau sosai don ingina da lafiyar kwakwaran da lalata.  Hakan kuma yana bukatar ci gaba don taimakawa wajen ganowa da yawan zaro mai karancinsa – hakan yana nuna cewa duk mata dole ne a zama masu aiki da kyakkyawan hanyoyin hafsassa kafiya da a lokacin da su ke yi don gano da kula da lalata.” Steven Lauwerier, Sarki na Hawauniya (a.i.), UNICEF “Bayan kowace zaro mai karancinsa, akwai wani abu mai zagin da kuma kwararfin zuciya. ”

**Explanation of Choices and Considerations:**

*   **Formal Language:** Hausa often uses more formal language than English, especially in official contexts. I've aimed for a tone appropriate for a statement from a director.
*   **"Director for..."**: I've translated this as "Sarkin Daur..." (Head of Department/Director).  "Sarki" is a common term for a leader or head.
*   **"Maternal, Newborn, Child and Adolescent Health and Ageing"**: This was translated as "Masu Hawauniya, Masu Hafe Kwararfin Daka, Masu Kishi da Matasa" – literally, "Those who care for mothers, newborns, children and young people."  This is a reasonably accurate and understandable rendering.
*   **"Imperative"**: Translated as "mai kyau sosai" (very important/essential).
*   **"Preterm births"**: Translated as "yawan zaro mai karancinsa" (premature births).
*   **"Access"**: Translated as "masu aiki da" (able to access/have access to).
*   **"Heartbreak"**: Translated as "kwararfin zuciya" (a heavy heart/feeling of heartbreak).

**Important Notes:**

*   **Hausa Script (gs):**  I've presented the translation in a way that attempts to represent Hausa script.  The exact formatting (gs) is unclear, so I've used a standard transliteration. translations.source: Despite the many advances the world has made in the past decade, we have made no progress in reducing the number of small babies born too soon or averting the risk of their death. The toll is devasting. It’s time we improve access to care for pregnant mothers and preterm infants and ensure every child gets a healthy start and thrives in life.” Helga Fogstad, Executive Director, PMNCH “Born too soon underlines why we must increase investment and accountability for preterm birth – the world’s largest cause of death of children under the age of five.
translations.reference: Duk da cigaba da aka samu a duniya ta fuskoki da dama, babu wata cigaba ta a-zo-a-gani da aka samu dangane da yawan jarirai bakwaini da kuma rage mace-macensu. Yawan yana razanarawa. Lokaci ya yi na inganta lafiyar mata masu ciki da kuma jarirai bakwaini domin tabbatar da samun ingantacciyar lafiya da kyakkyawar rayuwa gare su. Helga Fogstad, Babban Darekta na PMNCH Daftarin Born too soon ya nuna wajibcin ƙara zuba jari da sa-ido yadda ya kamata a kan haihuwar jarirai bakwaini wanda shi ne babban dalilin mutuwar yara 'yan ƙasa da shekara biyar.

translations.source: Progress is flatlining for maternal and newborn health, as well as the prevention of stillbirths, and is now pushed back further through the devastating combination of COVID-19, climate change, expanding conflicts and rising living costs. “By working together in partnership – governments, donors, the private sector, civil society, parents, and health professionals – we can sound the alarm about this “silent emergency”, and bring preterm prevention and care efforts to the forefront of national health and development efforts, building human capital by supporting families, societies and economies everywhere. ”Gabriela and Jerome Foster, Las Vegas, United States: parents of Jalen Foster, and founders of Jalen’s Gift Foundation “Our foundation was founded after the loss of our son, Jalen Foster, who was a preterm stillbirth at 27 weeks due to prenatal onset of a bacteria known as group B streptococcus. Losing our son was devastating, and there was no support in the community and that’s when we decided to provide a place of comfort and hope for families who have lost a baby.
translations.reference: Cigaban da ake samu dangane da kiwon lafiyar mata masu ciki da na jarirai da ma samuwar ɓarin ciki na mai haƙin rijiya ne, ga shi kuma ya ƙara samun koma-baya sakamakon cutar Covid-19 da sauyin yanayi da ƙaruwar rikice-rikice da kuma tsadar rayuwa. Idan muka haɗa kai, gwamnatocinmu da masu hannu da shuni da ma'aikatu masu zaman kansu da ƙungiyoyi masu fafutuka da iyaye da kuma ma'aikatan lafiya, za mu iya fito da wannan abin da ke buƙatar gaggawa har ya zama cikin muhimman abin da ɓangaren kiwon lafiya na ƙasa ya sa a gaba ta yadda za a gina al'umma ta hanyar tallafa wa iyalai da ƙungiyoyi da ma ɓangarori na tattalin arziƙi a ko'ina. "Gabriela and Jerome Foster, Las Vegas, United States: iyaye ga Jalen Foster, kuma waɗanda suka kafa Jalen's Gift Foundation An kafa gidauniyarmu ne bayan an da muka rasa ɗanmu mai suna Jalen Foster wanda bakwaini ne da aka haifa tun cikinsa yana mako 27 sakamakon harbuwar da ya yi da ƙwayar cuta mai suna streptococous nau'I na B. Rashin ɗan namu ya kasance babban tashin hankali a gare mu kuma babu wanda a tallafa mana daga cikin al'umma, don haka muka ga zai dace a faranta wa iyalan da suka rasa ɗa.

translations.source: We didn’t want other families to feel like we did – alone. So, we started Jalen’s Gift Foundation to help other families going through a loss, to provide multiple free services, such as photograph, grief support and help towards memorial services.” ***Download the Born too soon media resources
translations.reference: Ba mu son sauran iyalai su ji irin abin da muka ji. Don wannan ne muka kafa Gidauniyar Jalena don taimaka wa sauran iyalan da suke fuskantar rashi don samar ayyuka kyauta a gare su kamar hotuna da tallafin rashi da kuma taimakawa ta yadda za a tuna wanda aka rasa. Sauke manhajar labarai ta Born too soon
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa (gs - aiming for a more natural, conversational style):

**"Muna son cewa wasu al’ummi masu son sha’i da mu ke yi – cewa sun yi tazarar – suna son sha’i da mu ke yi. Don haka muka kammala Foundation na Jalen wanda ke taimakawa al’ummin da ke tazarar, wanda ke ba su aminci da yawa ba tare da biyan kuɗi, kamar cikar wasu, tallafin ganowa da kwararfin aiki da aiki da taron taya."**

**“Zaɓi yadda da dama na yanar melaye na Born too soon”**

---

**Explanation of Choices & Nuances:**

*   **"Muna son cewa..."** - "We didn't want..." (A common and natural way to start expressing a desire in Hausa)
*   **"...wasu al’ummi masu son sha’i da mu ke yi – cewa sun yi tazarar..."** - "...other families to feel like we did – alone."  "Tazarar" is a good word for feeling isolated or experiencing hardship.
*   **"...suna son sha’i da mu ke yi."** - "...to feel like we did – alone." (Rephrased for better flow)
*   **"Don haka muka kammala..."** - "So, we started..." (A common phrase for initiating an action)
*   **"Foundation na Jalen..."** - "Jalen’s Gift Foundation..." (Direct translation)
*   **"...wanda ke taimakawa al’ummin da ke tazarar..."** - "...to help other families going through a loss..." (Focuses on the help being given)
*   **"...wanda ke ba su aminci da yawa ba tare da biyan kuɗi..."** - "...to provide multiple free services..." (Explains the services are free of charge)
*   **"... kamar cikar wasu, tallafin ganowa da aiki da taron taya."** - "...such as photograph, grief support and help towards memorial services.” (Breaking down the services into understandable Hausa phrases.  "Cikar wasu" - taking photographs, "Tallafin ganowa" - financial assistance for funerals, "Aiki da taron taya" - assistance with memorial services.)
*   **“Zaɓi yadda da dama na yanar melaye na Born too soon”** - “Download the Born too soon media resources” (A straightforward translation)

**Important Note:** Hausa has many regional variations. This translation aims for a fairly standard, widely understood version.  If you know the specific region where this translation will be used, it might be beneficial to adjust it slightly for greater local resonance.

*   Translate a different document?

translations.source: UAE and WHO deliver air lift of critical medical supplies to Sudan The United Arab Emirates (UAE) and the World Health Organization have delivered 30 tons of urgent medical supplies to Sudan today. A plane carrying supplies for injury treatment, emergency surgeries, and essential drugs arrived in Port Sudan Airport early this morning. The shipment, valued at US$ 444 000, is the first that WHO has been able to deliver by air to Sudan since the outbreak of the conflict. WHO distributed supplies to heath facilities prior to the escalation of conflict.
translations.reference: Hadaddiyar Daular Larabawa da Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya sun kai wani jirgin sama mai dauke da muhimman kayayyakin kiwon lafiya zuwa Sudan Haɗaɗɗiyar daular larabawa da hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) sun kai wani jirgin sama mai ɗauke da muhimman kayayyakin kiwon lafiya zuwa ƙasar Sudan. wani jirgi ɗauke da kayayyakin jinya da tiyatar gaggawa da muhimman magunguna sun isa filin jirgin saman port Sudan da safiyar yau. kayan waɗanda darajar su ta kai dalar Amurka 444 000, shine na farko da hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) ta iya kaiwa ta jirgin sama zuwa Sudan tun bayan ɓarkewar rikicin. Hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) ta rarraba kayayyakin kowon lafiya kafin ƙaruwar rikicin.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa (gs - representing a good, understandable Hausa translation):

**Jarofi Amurika da WHO sun kai sarƙafin bayanai na lafiya na muhimman ga Sudan**

Jarofi Amurika (UAE) da Haƙƙin Lafiya na Duniya (WHO) sun kai sarƙafin bayanai na lafiya na muhimman da cikinsa yana da kauri mai girma 30 tuni da yau ga Sudan.  Hotin da ke da oda da bayanai don ginawa da auna, auna auna da iyakantaccen abin bauta ya shiga arewa ta Port Sudan Airport a farkon wannan makwancin.  Sarƙafin na yana da kudin Amurika $444,000 kuma shine na farkon da WHO za iya kai sarƙafin bayanai ta hotin sama ga Sudan tun da fara wasan gaba. WHO ya ba da oda da bayanai ga cibayoyin lantiri kafin fara wasan gaba.

**Explanation of Choices and Nuances:**

*   **Jarofi Amurika:**  "United Arab Emirates" - A standard translation.
*   **Haƙƙin Lafiya na Duniya:** "World Health Organization" -  A common and accepted translation.
*   **Sarƙafin bayanai na lafiya na muhimman:** "Critical medical supplies" -  This phrase is constructed to convey the urgency and importance.
*   **Kauri mai girma:** "30 tons" -  Literally "large quantity," a common way to express weight in Hausa.
*   **Auna da iyakantaccen abin bauta:** "Injury treatment, emergency surgeries, and essential drugs" -  This is a more descriptive translation, aiming for clarity.
*   **Farko ta Port Sudan Airport:** "Arrived in Port Sudan Airport" - Straightforward translation.
*   **Makwancin:** "Morning" -  Used to indicate the time of arrival.
*   **Fara wasan gaba:** "Outbreak of the conflict" -  This is a common way to describe the beginning of a conflict in Hausa.
*   **Cibayoyin lantiri:** "Health facilities" -  A standard translation.

**Important Note:** Hausa is a very context-dependent language.  A more specialized translation might be needed depending on the specific audience and purpose of the document.  This translation prioritizes clarity and accuracy for a general audience.

translations.source: These were exhausted after a few days given the number of injured. The dispatch of the aircraft comes as part of the UAE's continuous relief efforts in support of the Sudanese people and reflects its deep relations with Sudan, particularly in light of the current situation the country is facing. The relief is also an extension of the UAE’s humanitarian vision and underscores its relations with other countries based on human fraternity and its commitment to assisting others during crises and emergency situations. Dr Reem bint Ebrahim Al Hashimy, Minister of State for International Cooperation, said that the UAE "continues to work closely alongside the World Health Organization to ensure the successful deployment of the critical logistics operations to send urgent medical and food aid to help address the current crisis in Sudan. In parallel with calls for all sides of the current conflict to immediately cease hostilities and de-escalate a situation that is causing untold suffering for the Sudanese people, the UAE is steadfast in its commitment to providing aid and assistance to countries in times of need.
translations.reference: Waɗancan sun ƙare ne ƴan kwanaki kaɗan bayan an bada adadin waɗanda suka jikkata. Aikewa da jirgin na zuwa ne a wani mataki na cigaba da bada agajin da haɗaɗaɗiyya daular larabawa(UAE) ke yi na bada tallafawa wa al’ummar Sudan da ke nuna ƙarfafa dangatakar ta da ƙasar Sudan, musamman ma ta la’akari da halin da ƙasar ke ciki a halin yanzu. Har ila yau faɗaɗa ayyukan jinƙai na haɗaɗdiyar daular larabawa tare da jadadda alaƙar ta da sauran ƙasashe dangane da ƴan uwantaka da jajircewarta na taimakon wasu a lokutan rikici da halin gaggawa. Ƙaramar ministar haɗin gwiwar ƙasa da ƙasa Dakta Reem bint Ebrahim Al Hashimy tace haɗaɗdiyar daular larabawa (UAE) na cigaba da yin aiki kafaɗa da kafaɗa da hukumar lafiya ta duniya domin tabbatar da nasarar tura muhimman ayyuka da dabarun ayyukan agajin gaggawa da magunguna da abinci don taimakawa wajen magance halin da ake ciki a yanzu na rikicin Sudan. A daidai lokacin da ake kira ga dukkan rikice rikice da juna da su gaggauta tsagaita wuta tare da kawar da matsalar da ke janyo wa al'ummar Sudan wahalhalun da ba za a iya mantawa da su ba, Hadaddiyar Daular Larabawa ta tsaya tsayin daka wajen bayar da taimako da taimako ga kasashe a lokutan bukata.

translations.source: The UAE is particularly focused on providing for the most vulnerable groups affected by the situation in Sudan, especially the sick, children, the elderly, and women who are most at risk from the ongoing concerning conflict – and these relief flights will directly address the most pressing gaps in medical and food provision. The UAE's deeply held humanitarian values have meant that it has ensured it has continued to communicate to the world its robust and unrelenting dedication to strengthening peace, security and stability, not just regionally, but also worldwide, whilst alongside its partners and the international community, the country continues to assist the Sudanese people in times of crisis.” The health supplies include enough trauma, emergency surgical supplies, and essential medicines to immediately reach 165 000 people who are in desperate need of humanitarian aid. Health facilities across the country report they have run out of basic health supplies and that national medical stores are no longer accessible due to the security situation. Among other support, WHO is deploying two emergency logisticians travelling with the cargo to ensure that these supplies are immediately distributed to 13 major health facilities to support healthcare workers and extend care to those in need.
translations.reference: Hadaddiyar Daular Larabawa ta mayar da hankali ne musamman wajen samar wa kungiyoyin da suka fi fama da matsalar halin da ake ciki a Sudan, musamman ma marasa lafiya, da yara, da tsoffi, da mata wadanda suka fi fuskantar hadarin daga rikice-rikicen da ke ci gaba da faruwa. mafi matsananciyar gibi a cikin samar da magunguna da abinci. Ƙididdigar jin ƙai na Hadaddiyar Daular Larabawa tana nufin cewa ta tabbatar da cewa ta ci gaba da isar da saƙo ga duniya ƙaƙƙarfan sadaukarwarta ga ƙarfafa zaman lafiya, tsaro da kwanciyar hankali, ba kawai a wani yanki ba, har ma a duk faɗin duniya, tare da abokan hulɗarta da al'ummomin duniya. kasar na ci gaba da taimakawa al'ummar Sudan a lokutan rikici. Kayayyakin kiwon lafiyar sun haɗa da isassun raunuka, kayan aikin tiyata na gaggawa, da magunguna masu mahimmanci don kai ga mutane 165,000 da ke cikin matsananciyar buƙatar agajin jin kai. Cibiyoyin kiwon lafiya a faɗin ƙasar sun ba da rahoton cewa, kayayyakin kiwon lafiya na yau da kullum sun ƙare kuma basa samun damar shiga shaguna saida magunguna a ƙasar. Daga cikin tallafin hukumar lafiya ta duniya(WHO) ta tura ƙwararrun likitocin gaggawa guda biyu da ke tafiya tare da tabbatar da cewa an rarraba waɗannan kayayyaki nan take zuwa manyan cibiyoyin kiwon lafiya goma sha uku don tallafawa wa ma’aikatan kiwon lafiya da kuma bada kulawa ga masu buƙatar agaji.

translations.source: WHO has another 30 metric tons of supplies for malaria and noncommunicable diseases like diabetes and hypertension, conditions that can become deadly if left untreated. These and about 23 000 blood bags are being readied within the WHO global logistics hub in the International Humanitarian City, and WHO is currently exploring all possibilities for delivering these supplies to Sudan as quickly as possible in collaboration with the Sudanese Ministry of Health. Dr Michael Ryan, Executive Director, of the WHO Health Emergencies Programme, said, “The WHO Global Logistics Hub in the UAE has become a centerpiece of rapid supply response to acute events globally. Supporting over 140 countries across all 6 WHO geographic regions, the hub provides a lifeline to Member States experiencing health emergencies arising from outbreaks of diseases, disasters such as floods and earthquakes, and the impact of conflict on health systems. The support provided by the UAE enables WHO to be at the forefront of these health emergency responses – delivering specialist medical aid to those in need wherever and whenever it is needed.
translations.reference: Hukumar lafiya ta duniya(WHO) tana da tan talatin na kayan agaji na zazzaɓin cizon sauro da cututtuka marasa yaɗuwa kamar ciwon suga hawan jini da kuma yanayin da ka iya haifar da asarar rai matuƙar ba’a ɗauki mataki ba. An gama shirya waɗannan haɗe da wajen ledar jini 23,000 a kamfanin jigila na duniya na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya a International Humanitarian City, sannan Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya tana ta neman hanyoyin da za ta kai waɗannan kaya zuwa Sudan da gaggawa, tare da haɗin guiwar Ma'aikatar Lafiya ta Sudan. Babban daraktan shirin agajin gaggawa ta hukumar lafiya ta duniya Dakta Micheal Ryan yace shirin agajin gaggawa na kamafani na jigila na duniya na hukumar lafiya ta duniya da haɗaɗɗiyar daular larabawa ta zama cibiyar samar da taimakon gaggawa a faɗin duniya. Taimakawa wa ƙasashe sama da ɗari da arba’in na a yankuna shida na hukumar lafiya ta duniya kamfanin na samar da hanyar rayuwa ga mambobin jihohin da ke fuskantar matsalolin kiwon lafiya da suka taso sanadiyyar ɓarkewar cututtuka bala’o’i kamar ambaliyar ruwa girgizar ƙasa da kuma tasirin rikicin akan tsarin kiwon lafiya. Tallafin da haɗaɗdiyar daular larabawa ke bayarwa ya baiwa hukumar lafiya ta duniya(WHO) kasancewa a sahun gaba a matakin gaggawa na kiwon lafiya da kuma isar da ƙwararrun likitoci ga masu buƙata a ko’ina a kuma duk lokacin da ake buƙata.

translations.source: As part of efforts to strengthen the global architecture for health emergency preparedness, response, and resilience the UAE, WHO, and partners are working hand-in-hand to deliver supplies to reach the world’s most vulnerable in their time of greatest need.” For his part, Dr Ahmed Al-Mandhari, WHO Regional Director for the Eastern Mediterranean, said, “The World Health Organization continues to coordinate with the Sudanese health authorities to deliver essential health supplies through all available pathways. Due to the conflict, hospitals, pharmacies and primary health care facilities have stocked out of essential, life-saving medicines. The arrival of an additional 30 metric tons of trauma and emergency surgery supplies as well as essential medicines will enable WHO to support 13 major health facilities and re-establish health care services for those in need. Our global logistics hub in Dubai plays a vital role in ensuring an uninterrupted supply of health commodities and we are grateful for the support provided by the United Arab Emirates to facilitate our first charter flight of these desperately needed supplies.
translations.reference: A ƙoƙarinta na gana ƙaƙƙarfan tsarin agajin gaggawa a faɗin duniya kulawa da kuma jajircewa haɗaɗdiyar daular larabawa (UAE) da kuma hukumar lafiya ta duniya(WHO) da abokan haɗin gwiwar suna aiki don isar da kayayyakin don isa ga mutane masu rauni a duniya a lokacin da suke kan buƙata A nasa ɓangaren Daktan hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) na yankin gabashin bahar rum Dakta Ahmed Al-Mandhari yace hukumar lafiya na cigaba da haɗa kai da hukumomin kiwon lafiya na Sudan domin isar da muhimman kayayyakin kiwon lafiya daga dukkan hanyoyin da ake da su. Sakamakon rikicin asibitoci kantinan magani da cibiyoyin kula da lafiya a matakin farko sun tanadi muhimman maguguna don ceton rai. Zuwan ƙarin tan talatin na kayyakin agaji da tiyatar gaggawa da kuma muhimman magunguna zasu ba hukumar lafiya ta duniya damar tallafawa hukumomin lafiya goma sha uku da sake kafa ayyukan kula da lafiyar masu buƙatar hakan. Kamfanin mu na jigila na duniya a Dubai yana taka muhimmiyar rawa wurin tabbatar kayayyakin kiwon lafiya ba tare da katsewa ba kuma muna godiya da tallafin da haɗaɗdiyar daular larabawa ta bamu don sauƙaƙe mana na farko.

translations.source: It is support such as this that shows in action our Regional vision of health for all, by all.” The medical aid provided by the World Health Organization through the UAE accounted for approximately 55% of the total medical supplies provided to Sudan from abroad in 2022, reflecting the UAE's position as a major hub for international humanitarian assistance.
translations.reference: Irin wannan taimakon kamar wannan shi ne yake nuna ƙoƙari a aikacenmu na yanki na samar da lafiya ba kowa. Tallafin lafiya da hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) ta bayar ta hannun haɗaɗɗiyar fdaular larabawa ya kai kusan kashi hamsin da biyar na jimilla kayayyakin jinya da aka baiwa Sudan daga ƙetare a shekarar 2022 wanda ke nuni da matsayin haɗaɗɗiyar daular larabawa a matsayin babbar cibiyar taimakon jinƙai ta ƙasa da ƙasa.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa (gs - representing a standard Hausa script), aiming for accuracy and natural flow:

**Hausa Translation:**

“Halin da na cire daya haka na nuna yadda makaman sana’a ke aiki don cimma kyakkyawan kwararron lafiyata a sararin Arewa, ta hanyar duk wani mutum.”  Matsalatar sana’ar da kasar United Arab Emirates (UAE) ta bayar, ta hanyar hukumar lafiyarta ta duniya (WHO), ta yi daidai da kusan 55% na bukatar duka na sana’a da suka karba daga wajen wajen Sudan a shekarar 2022.  Hakan yana nuna cewa UAE tana da muhimmiyar wujara a matsayin wata gaba na tallafawa al’ummata a duniya.”

**Explanation of Choices & Nuances:**

* **“Halin da na cire daya haka…”** -  This translates "It is support such as this..."  I've used a phrasing that emphasizes the *demonstration* of support.
* **“na nuna yadda makaman sana’a ke aiki…”** -  This captures the idea of "shows in action."  I’ve used “makaman sana’a” (medical supplies/aid) and “ke aiki” (are working/showing).
* **“don cimma kyakkyawan kwararron lafiyata a sararin Arewa…”** - This translates “our Regional vision of health for all, by all.”  I’ve used “kyakkyawan kwararron lafiyata” (a good vision of health) and “a sararin Arewa” (in the region).
* **“Matsalatar sana’ar da…”** -  This translates “The medical aid provided…”
* **“ta yi daidai da kusan 55%…”** -  This translates “accounted for approximately 55%…”
* **“na bukatar duka…”** - This translates “of the total medical supplies…”
* **“ta karba daga wajen…”** - This translates “provided to Sudan from abroad…”
* **“Hakan yana nuna cewa…”** - This translates “reflecting the UAE’s position…”
* **“UAE tana da muhimmiyar wujara…”** - This translates “the UAE's position as a major hub…”

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

* **Context is Key:** Hausa, like many low-resource languages, relies heavily on context.  Some phrases might have multiple interpretations depending on the situation.
* **Idiomatic Expressions:** I've tried to use relatively straightforward language, avoiding overly complex idioms.
* **Regional Variations:** Hausa has regional dialects. This translation aims for a fairly standard form, but there might be slight variations in wording depending on the specific area.

translations.source: Collaborating locally is key for progress globally towards health-related SDGs A new progress report is being jointly released today by the 13 signatory agencies of the Global Action Plan for Healthy Lives and Well-being for All (SDG3 GAP). The report entitled “What worked? What didn’t? What’s next?” reflects four years of joint work by major multilateral agencies outlining what has and has not worked in strengthening collaboration and support to accelerate country progress towards health-related Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). This year marks the halfway point toward the SDGs, but the world is lagging behind to reach the global goals. Since its launch in 2019, the SDG3 GAP enabled creation of new collaboration structures between the signatory agencies in key areas such as sustainable financing and primary health care among others.
translations.reference: Haɗin kai a cikin gida shine mabuɗin don ci gaba a duniya game da kiwon lafiya na muradan ƙarni SDGs Hukumomin 13 da suka sanya hannu kan Tsarin Ayyukan Duniya don Rayuwar Lafiya da Jin Dadin Kowa (SDG3 GAP) ne ke fitar da wani sabon rahoton ci gaba tare a haɗin gwiwa a yau. Rahoton mai taken me ya faru? mene bai yi ba? menen na gaba yana nuna shekaru huɗu na ayyukan haɗin gwiwa da manyan hukumomin ƙungiyoyi suka yi tare da bayyana abinda yayi aiki da wanda bai yi aiki ba domin ƙarfafa haɗin gwiwa da tallafi domin cigaban ƙasa a ɓangaren harkokin lafiya da kuma cigaban muradan ƙarni. A wannan shekarar ce aka kai rabin cimma cigaban muradan ƙarni amma kuma duniya tana baya wurin cimma muradan ƙarnin. Tun lokacin da aka ƙaddamar da shi a cikin 2019, SDG3 GAP ya ba da damar ƙirƙirar sabbin tsarin haɗin gwiwa tsakanin hukumomin da suka sanya hannu a cikin mahimman fannoni kamar dorewar kuɗi da kula da lafiya na farko da sauransu.

translations.source: At least 67 countries engaged in on one or more of the SDG3 GAP accelerator themes. "We have made important progress, but we still have a long path to travel to improve the way that multilateral organizations work together to support countries. We must listen to what countries tell us and act upon their guidance,” said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General and Chair of the SDG3 GAP Principals Group. “I thank the partners for their collaboration and for the honest self-assessments contained in this report. "The report provides six key recommendations to ensure that countries benefit from a more streamlined support and to realize the commitments made in the SDG3 GAP.
translations.reference: Mafi ƙaranci ƙasashe 67 ne suka shiga ɗaya ko fiye da ɗaya daga cikin shirye-shiryen ingantata fasali na SDG3 GAP. Mun samu cigaba mai muhimmanci amma akwai amma har yanzu akwai doguwar tafiya domin inganta yadda ƙungiyoyi daban daban ke aiki tare domin tallafa wa ƙasashe. Dole ne mu saurari abinda ƙasashe ke gaya mana kuma muyi aiki bisa jagorancin su inji Dakta Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus darakta janar na hukumar lafiya ta duniya WHO kuma shugaban ƙungiyar shugabannin SDG3 GAP. Ina godiya ga abokan hulɗa bisa hadin kaida suka yi da kuma yadda suka nuna gaskiya cikin wannan rahoto. Rahoton ya bada shawarwari guda shida masu muhimmanci don tabbaatar da cewa ƙasashe sun ci gajiyar tallafin da ya dace da kuma tabbatar da alƙawuran da aka yi a SDG3 GAP.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa (gs - representing a more formal, standard Hausa):

**Hausa Translation:**

Kuma da karin hari, sama ukuɗen kasuwa da dama sun yi aikin daidai da wani ko wasu daga cikin harkulcin fashewar SDG3 GAP accelerator. “Mu mun yi sabbin matakan da dama, amma yana nan wutar da za mu yi don ingina yadda kwamitin kasuwancin duniya ke aiki tare don goyani kasuwanci. Dole mu saurari abin da kasuwanci ke gaya mata kuma mu yi aiki da koyaushe da koyauyar su,” in kaula Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, mai jagowa hukumar WHO da ke jagorawa kwamitin fashewar SDG3 GAP. “Ina godolle ga kauda da aikin da suka yi tare da binciken kiyasin kiyasin da suka yi a cikin wannan rahoto. “Rahoton na ba da shiri gomafiya na muhimman da za mu yi don tabbatar da cewa kasuwanci ke samu da goyan bayansu na daidai kuma su cimma da yadda su ke yi a cikin fashewar SDG3 GAP.”

**Explanation of Choices & Notes:**

*   **"At least 67 countries"**:  Translated as "Kuma da karin hari, sama ukuɗen kasuwa da dama" (meaning "And at least a number of countries").  I've aimed for clarity and natural-sounding Hausa.
*   **"SDG3 GAP accelerator themes"**: Translated as "harkulcin fashewar SDG3 GAP accelerator" (meaning "the themes of the SDG3 GAP accelerator").
*   **"We have made important progress"**: Translated as "Mu mun yi sabbin matakan da dama" (meaning "We have made significant steps").
*   **"multilateral organizations"**: Translated as "kwaminin kasuwanci" (meaning "international organizations").
*   **"listen to what countries tell us and act upon their guidance”**: Translated as "Dole mu saurari abin da kasuwanci ke gaya mata kuma mu yi aiki da koyaushe da koyauyar su" (meaning "We must listen to what countries tell us and always act according to their guidance").
*   **"WHO Director-General"**: Translated as "mai jagowa hukumar WHO" (meaning "the leader of the WHO organization").
*   **"SDG3 GAP Principals Group"**: Translated as "kwamitin fashewar SDG3 GAP" (meaning "the SDG3 GAP Principals Committee").
*   **"I thank the partners for their collaboration"**: Translated as "Ina godolle ga kauda da aikin da suka yi tare da" (meaning "I am grateful to the partners for their work together").
*   **"honest self-assessments"**: Translated as "binciken kiyasin kiyasin da suka yi" (meaning "the self-assessments they have made").
*   **"streamlined support"**: Translated as "goyan bayansu na daidai" (meaning "their support in a streamlined manner").
*   **"realize the commitments made"**: Translated as "su cimma da yadda su ke yi" (meaning "to fulfill the commitments they have made").

**Important Considerations for Hausa Translation:**

*   **Context is Key:** Hausa is a very context-dependent language.  The best translation always depends on the specific situation and audience.
*   **Cultural Nuances:**  Direct translations can sometimes miss important cultural nuances. I've tried to convey the meaning accurately while using natural-sounding Hausa.
*   **Variations in Dialect:** Hausa has regional dialects. This translation aims for a standard, widely understood form.

translations.source: These include: continue the SDG3 GAP improvement cycle for health by seeking the views of Member States on how we collaborate at country-level and responding to related recommendations; maintain GAP as a platform for collaboration; foster stronger collaboration at the country level on primary health care and explore new thematic topics such as climate resilient health systems; jointly apply new approaches at country level such as the delivery for impact approach;
translations.reference: Sun haɗa da: Cigaba da inganta cigaban muradan ƙarni SDG3 GAP na lafiya ta hanyar neman ra’ayoyin mambobin ƙasashe kan yadda muke haɗa kai a matakin ƙasa da kuma amsa shawarwarin da suka danganci; Kula da GAP a matsayin dandamali da haɗin gwiwa; Haɓaka haɗin gwiwa mai ƙarfi a matakin ƙasa kan kula da hukumar kiwon lafiya a matakin farko da kuma bincika sabbin batutuwa kamar tsarin kiwon lafiya mai jure yanayi Tare da yin amfani da sabbin hanyoyin a matakin ƙasa domin isar da tsari mai tasiri;

translations.source: engage more with civil society; and work with Member States to strengthen incentives for collaboration through political leadership, governance direction and funding to support collaboration. Key findings of the report will feed into discussions of the next United Nations General Assembly SDG Summit and the High-level Meeting on Universal Health Coverage in September 2023. The months leading up to these key events provide an opportunity for a joint push by Member States and multilateral agencies to identify ways on how to implement the recommendations and to prepare the ground to fully leverage stronger collaboration and accelerate progress towards the health-related SDGs in the second half of the SDG timeframe. Note to the editor:
translations.reference: Asusun Yara na Majalisar Dinkin Duniya (UNICEF); Unitaid; Aiki tare da mambobin ƙasashe don ƙarfafa gwiwa ta hanyar jagoranci a siyasance da kuma jagoranci na shugabanci da kudi domin tallafawa da haɗin gwiwa. Mihimman binciken da aka samu na rahoton da aka samu na rahoton zai bada labari game da tattaunawar babban taron majalisar dinkin duniya na cigaban muradan ƙarni SDG da kuma taron duniya na akan kiwon lafiya a watan Satumbar 2023. Watanni kafin waɗannan muhimman abubuwan da suka faru sun bada dama ga haɗin gwiwar ƙasashe membobi da hukumomi da ƙungiyoyi daban daban don gano hanyoyin da za’a aiwatar da shawarwarin da shiryawa don yin ƙarfaffan haɗin gwiwa tare da haɓaka cigaba ga cigaban muradan ƙarni masu alaƙa da kiwon lafiya na rabin lokacin da SDG ta dauka. Bayanan kula ga Edita:

**Yawancin Shiri:**

Yana bukatar a yi aikin dafara da kuma a yi doka da al’amuliyoyin al’ama-lama; kuma a yi aikin daidai da manyan gobara don ingina da manufofin da za su yi aiki tare ta hanyar shirin shinge, murja, da tallafin da ke da yawa don daidawa da aikin da ke yi. Manyan bayanai na wannan rikodin za su yi daidai da tattaunawa a taron Babban Gabatarwar Kasar United na kwamarran sana’a na wasan ido da kuma taron Babban Gabatarwa na Kariya ta duniya a watan Yuni 2023. translations.source: The SDG3 GAP describes how the 13 signatory agencies will adopt new ways of working, building on existing successful collaborations, and jointly align their support around national plans and strategies that are country-owned and -led. The signatories to the SDG3 GAP are Gavi, the Vaccine Alliance; Global Financing Facility for Women, Children and Adolescents (GFF); Global Fund to Fight AIDS, Tuberculosis and Malaria (Global Fund); International Labour Organization (ILO);
translations.reference: SDG GAP ya bayyana yadda hukumomi goma sha da suka sahannu zasu yi amfani da sabbin hanyoyin aiki, tare. Masu rattaba hannu ga ciga cigaban muradan ƙarni SDG3 GAP sune Gavi, da kuma ƙungiyar allurar rigakafi Kayan Tallafi na Duniya don Mata, Yara da Matasa (GFF); Asusun duniya don yaƙi da cutar AIDS,tarin fuka da zazzaɓin cizon sauro(Asusun duniya) Ƙungiyar ƙwadago ta duniya (ILO);
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa (gs - representing a good, understandable Hausa translation):

**Translation:**

“Gap na SDG3 yana nuna yadda cibayoyin da ke da mutuncin 13 za su yi aikin da sabon hanya, bisa hakan da suka yi a wani wacemi na da nasara, kuma za su yi hanyar da suka yaba masa tare da yi daidai da hangen-benansu na kasa da hanyoyi na kasa da ke da alƙarfi da su na yi a karkuke.”

“Cibayoyin da ke da mutuncin Gap na SDG3 sun hada da: Gavi, Al'amuliyar Lissafin Dadi; Global Financing Facility don Mata, Yauta da Matasa (GFF); Global Fund don Yaki da AIDS, Tudar da Almakin (Global Fund); International Labour Organization (ILO).”

**Explanation of Choices & Notes:**

*   **“Gap na SDG3”**:  I’ve kept “SDG3” as it’s a recognized acronym.
*   **“Yana nuna yadda…”**:  This translates to “describes how…”
*   **“Cibayoyin da ke da mutuncin…”**: This translates to “The signatory agencies…”
*   **“Yi aikin da sabon hanya”**: This translates to “adopt new ways of working”.
*   **“Bisa hakan da suka yi a wani wacemi na da nasara”**: This translates to “building on existing successful collaborations”.
*   **“Yi hanyar da suka yaba masa tare da yi daidai…”**: This translates to “jointly align their support”.
*   **“Hangena-benansu na kasa”**: This translates to “national plans”.
*   **“Hanyoyi na kasa da ke da alƙarfi da su na yi a karkuke”**: This translates to “country-owned and -led”.
*   **“Cibayoyin da ke da mutuncin Gap na SDG3 sun hada da…”**: This translates to “The signatories to the SDG3 GAP are…”
*   I’ve included the English acronyms in parentheses after the Hausa translations for clarity, especially for the organizations.

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Key:** Hausa, like many low-resource languages, relies heavily on context.  If this translation is part of a larger document, it's crucial to ensure the surrounding text provides sufficient context for understanding.
*   **Nuance:**  Direct word-for-word translations often don't work well. I've aimed for a natural-sounding Hausa translation that conveys the meaning accurately.
*   **Regional Variations:** Hausa has regional variations in dialect. This translation is based on a fairly standard form of Hausa.

translations.source: Joint United Nations Programme on HIV/AIDS (UNAIDS); United Nations Development Programme (UNDP); United Nations Population Fund (UNFPA); United Nations Children’s Fund (UNICEF); Unitaid; United Nations Entity for Gender Equality and the Empowerment of Women (UN Women);
translations.reference: Shirin haɗin gwiwa na majalisar ɗinkin duniya kan HIV/AIDS (UNAIDS); Shirin cigaban majalisar ɗinkin duniya (UNDP) Asusun majalisar ɗinkin duniya na yawan jama’a (UNFPA); Asusun Yara na Majalisar Dinkin Duniya (UNICEF); Unitaid; Ƙungiyar majalisar ɗinkin duniya don daidaita jinsi da ƙarfafa mata (matan majalisar ɗinkin duniya)

Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided text:

*   **Bayanin Amurka da Kasuwancin Duniya da Yaki da AIDS (UNAIDS);**
*   **Bayanin Amurka da Sandarwa da Kasuwanci (UNDP);**
*   **Bayanin Amurka da Kudanci da Jinuwarmomi (UNFPA);**
*   **Bayanin Amurka da Daki-daki da Karfata Mata (UNICEF);**
*   **Unitaid;**
*   **Bayanin Amurka da Karfata Mata da Karfata Mata (UN Women);**

**Important Notes on Hausa Translation & Context:**

*   **"Bayanin Amurka da..."** – This is the standard way to translate "United Nations..." in Hausa. It literally means "The United States of America and..."
*   **Word Choice:** I've aimed for the most common and understandable Hausa equivalents.  There might be slightly different ways to phrase some of these, depending on the specific context and desired level of formality.
*   **Abbreviations:** I've kept the abbreviations as they are in English, as this is common practice.

translations.source: World Bank Group; World Food Programme (WFP); and World Health Organization (WHO). See full report, What Worked? What’s next?
translations.reference: Rukunin bankin duniya; Shirn abincin na duniya (WFP); da kuma Hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO). Duba cikakken rahoto me yayi aiki? Menene na gaba?
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the translation of the document into Hausa (gs - representing a good attempt at standard Hausa):

**Gaba na Koda Duniya; Gaba na Aikin Kiwonki (WFP); da Gaba na Lafiya (WHO).  Yanzu karana ta ciki, Men kiyasha ya yi nasara? Me ya gabata?**

**Explanation of Choices & Nuances:**

* **World Bank Group:**  "Gaba na Koda Duniya" - This translates to "Progress of the World Bank" or "The World Bank's Advancement."  It’s a common way to refer to the organization in Hausa.
* **World Food Programme (WFP):** "Gaba na Aikin Kiwonki (WFP)" - "Gaba na Aikin Kiwonki" means "Progress of the Food Program" or "Work on Food."  Keeping the acronym (WFP) is standard practice.
* **World Health Organization (WHO):** "da Gaba na Lafiya (WHO)" - "da" means "and," "Gaba na Lafiya" means "Progress of Health" or "Health Advancement." Again, keeping the acronym (WHO) is standard.
* **See full report, What Worked? What’s next?:** "Yanzu karana ta ciki, Men kiyasha ya yi nasara? Me ya gabata?" - This is a more idiomatic translation.  It roughly translates to: "Now read the full report, what worked? What comes next?"  It captures the essence of the question.

**Important Note:**  Hausa is a very context-dependent language.  A more precise translation might be possible with more context about the report itself.  However, this provides a solid and understandable translation of the provided text.

Would you like me to translate any other text, or perhaps provide alternative phrasing for any of these sentences?

translations.source: New survey results show health systems starting to recover from pandemic After three years of the COVID-19 pandemic, health systems in countries have started showing the first major signs of health system recovery, according to the WHO interim report on the “Fourth round of the global pulse survey on continuity of essential health services during the COVID-19 pandemic: November 2022–January 2023”. By early 2023, countries reported experiencing reduced disruptions in the delivery of routine health services, but highlighted the need to invest in recovery and stronger resilience for the future. Among the 139 countries that responded to the fourth round of WHO’s pulse survey, countries reported continued disruptions in almost one-quarter of services on average. In 84 countries where trend analysis is possible, the percentage of disrupted services declined on average from 56% in July-September 2020 to 23% in November 2022- January 2023.
translations.reference: Sabon sakamakon binciken ya nuna tsarin kiwon lafiya ya fara murmurewa da annobar Bayan shekaru uku na cutar COVID-19 tsarin kiwon lafiya a cikin ƙasashe sun fara nuna alamun farko na farfaɗowar tsarin kiwon lafiya a cewar rahoton wucin gadi na hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) game da zagaye na huɗu na binciken bugun jini na duniya kan cigaba da muhimman ayyukan kiwon lafiya a lokacin annobar COVID-19 Nuwaba 2022 January 2023. Ya zuwa farkon shekarar 2023, kasashe sun ba da rahoton samun raguwar cikas wajen isar da ayyukan kiwon lafiya na yau da kullun, amma sun nuna bukatar saka hannun jari don farfadowa da kuma karfin juriya na gaba. A cikin kasashe 139 da suka amsa zagaye na hudu na binciken bugun jini na hukumar lafiya ta duniya WHO kasashe sun ba da rahoton ci gaba da wargajewa a kusan kashi daya bisa hudu na ayyuka a matsakaici. A cikin ƙasashe 84 inda za a iya nazarin yanayin, yawan ayyukan da aka katse ya ragu a matsaikata daga 56% a watan Yuli-Satumba 2020 zuwa 23% a watan Nuwamba 2022- Janairu 2023.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa (gs - aiming for a natural and understandable style):

**Yawun kwampramcin da ya gabatar da binciken na nuna cewa kwasannan al'umar da ke da hangen-ben na ke komawa bayan cutar COVID-19.**

Bayan shekaru uku na cutar COVID-19, kwasannan al'umar da ke a duniya suka fara nunawa alamar farafiya na komawa kwasarsu, kamar yadda rahoto na tasha na Amurika na Kabilar Duniya (WHO) na auna shi “Binciken biyu na duniya game da ci gaba da aiki da kwasannan al'umar da ke da hangen-ben a lokacin cutar COVID-19: Yulin 2022 – Yulin 2023”.

A karkashin shekara ta 2023, al'umar sun shaci cewa sun yi watsi da matsala a aiki da kwasannan al'umar da ke da hangen-ben da kuma bukatar shiga dafin da yi da ƙarfi don gaba.  A kan 139 al'umar da suka yi aiki da binciken na biyu na WHO, al'umar sun shaci cewa suna da matsala a aiki da kwasannan al'umar da ke da hangen-ben a karkashin 23 cikin 100 na sararin kwamanni.

A 84 al'umar da a bisa binciken na da yadda su ke yi, kashi 56 na matsala a aiki da kwasannan al'umar da ke da hangen-ben da suka wuce Yulin da Yulin 2020 (Yulin da Yulin 2020) ya yi 23 cikin 100 a Yulin 2022 – Yulin 2023.

---

**Notes on the Translation and Choices Made:**

*   **Hausa (gs):**  I've aimed for a style that is generally understandable across different Hausa-speaking regions.
*   **Formal Language:** I've used a relatively formal tone, suitable for a report or official document.
*   **Technical Terms:** I've tried to translate technical terms (like "WHO," "pulse survey," "continuity of essential health services") in a way that is clear and understandable to a general audience.  Sometimes, keeping the English term in parentheses after the Hausa translation is helpful for clarity.
*   **Numbers:** I've used the Hausa numeral system (e.g., "23 cikin 100" for "23%").
*   **Flow and Readability:** I've adjusted the sentence structure to flow naturally in Hausa.

**Disclaimer:**  As a language model, my translation is based on my training data.  A native Hausa speaker would likely refine it further for optimal accuracy and naturalness.

Would you like me to:

*   Explain any specific part of the translation in more detail?
*   Translate a different document?

translations.source: Persisting disruptions are due to both demand- and supply-side factors, including low levels of health care-seeking in communities as well as limited availability of health workers and other health-care resources such as open clinics or available stocks of medicines and products. “It is welcome news that health systems in the majority of countries are starting to restore essential health services for millions of people who missed them during the pandemic,” said Dr Rudi Eggers, WHO Director for Integrated Health Services. “But we need to ensure that all countries continue to close this gap to recover health services, and apply lessons learnt to build more prepared and resilient health systems for the future”. First notable signs of recovery In this new survey, fewer countries reported intentionally scaling back access across all service delivery platforms and essential public health functions since 2020-2021 reporting, showing an important step to return to pre-pandemic levels of service delivery and broader system functioning.
translations.reference: Ci gaba da rikice-rikicen ya faru ne saboda abubuwan buƙatu- da abubuwan wadata, gami da ƙarancin matakan neman kiwon lafiya a cikin al'ummomi gami da ƙarancin wadatar ma'aikatan kiwon lafiya da sauran albarkatun kula da lafiya kamar buɗaɗɗen asibitoci ko samfuran magunguna da samfuran da ake samu. Abin maraba ne cewa tsarin kiwon lafiya a yawancin kasashe sun fara dawo da muhimman ayyukan kiwon lafiya ga miliyoyin mutanen da suka rasa su yayin barkewar cutar," in ji Dr Rudi Eggers, Daraktan Hukumar Kula da Lafiya ta Duniya. Amma muna buƙatar tabbatar da cewa dukkan ƙasashe suna ci gaba da rufe wannan rata don dawo da ayyukan kiwon lafiya, da kuma amfani da darussan da aka koya don gina shirye-shiryen kiwon lafiya da tsayayye don nan gaba". Alamun farko na samun lafiya A cikin wannan sabon binciken, ƙasashe kaɗan sun ba da rahoton ƙaddamar da damar samun dama ga duk dandamali na isar da sabis da mahimman ayyukan kiwon lafiyar jama'a tun daga rahoton 2020-2021, suna nuna muhimmin mataki na komawa zuw matakin kafin annoba da isar da sabis na da faffadan tsarin aiki.

translations.source: By the end of 2022, most countries reported partial signs of service recovery, including in services for sexual, reproductive, maternal, newborn, child and adolescent health; nutrition; immunization; communicable diseases (including malaria, HIV, TB, and other sexually-transmitted infections); neglected tropical diseases; noncommunicable diseases; management of mental, neurological and substance use disorders; care for older people; and traditional and/or complementary care. The number of countries reporting disruption to their national supply chain system reduced from nearly half (29 of 59 responding countries) to about a quarter (18 of 66 responding countries) within the last year. Despite signs of recovery, service disruptions persist across countries in all regions and income levels, and across most service delivery settings and tracer service areas. Countries are also dealing with increasing service backlogs – most frequently in services for screening, diagnosis and treatment of noncommunicable diseases – which can lead to negative consequences as people are delayed access to timely care. Recovering essential health service delivery is critical because disruptions – including to services for health promotion, disease prevention, diagnosis, treatment, rehabilitation and palliation – may have even greater adverse health effects at population and individual level than the pandemic itself, especially among vulnerable populations.
translations.reference: A ƙarshen 2022, yawancin ƙasashe sun ba da rahoton alamun dawo da sabis na ɓangare, gami da sabis don jima'i, haihuwa, uwa, jarirai, yara da matasa; abinci mai gina jiki; rigakafi; cututtukan cututtuka (gami da zazzabin cizon sauro, HIV, tarin fuka, da sauran cututtukan da ake ɗauka ta hanyar jima'i); cuta mai zafi da aka manta da ita; cututtukan da ba a kamuwa da su; kula da rashin lafiyar taɓin ƙwaƙwalwa, jijiyoyin jiki da kuma amfani da kwayoyi; kula da tsofaffi; da kuma na gargajiya da / ko ƙarin kulawa. Adadin kasashen da ke bayar da rahoton cikas ga tsarin samar da kayayyaki na kasa ya ragu daga kusan rabin (29 daga cikin kasashe 59 da suka amsa) zuwa kusan kashi hudu (18 daga cikin kasashe 66 da suka amsa) a cikin shekarar da ta gabata. Duk da alamun farfadowa, hargitsin sabis na ci gaba da wanzuwa a cikin ƙasashe a duk yankuna da matakan samun kudin shiga, kuma a cikin mafi yawan saitunan isar da sabis da wuraren sabis na ganowa. Ƙasashe kuma suna fuskantar karuwar bayanan sabis - mafi yawan lokuta a cikin sabis don tantancewa, ganowa da kuma magance cututtukan da ba sa yaduwa - wanda zai haifar da mummunan sakamako yayin da mutane ke jinkirta samun kulawa akan lokaci. Farfado da mahimman isar da sabis na kiwon lafiya yana da mahimmanci saboda rikice-rikice - gami da sabis don haɓaka kiwon lafiya, rigakafin cututtuka, gwaje gwajd, jiyya, gyare-gyare - na iya haifar da mummunar illa ga lafiyar jama'a da kuma mutum fiye da annobar kanta, musamman ma. tsakanin jama'a masu rauni.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided English text into Hausa (gs - aiming for a more formal and understandable style):

**Hausa Translation:**

A kan shekara ta 2022, karfinmu da yadda kasashe biyu sun shiga da dama da dama na ganowa da yadda ake sake daidai da aikin lantiri, kamar da kuma aikin lantiri na halaka, lafiya da lalata, lafiyyar jiki da lalata, sana’antar cututtuka (cikin su malaria, HIV, TB, da sauran cututtuka na halaka), cututtuka na mutuncin da ba a iya cusa su ba, cututtuka na lafiya da ba a iya cusa su ba, daidashawa da lafiyyar masu shegi, da kuma aikin lantiri na sana’a da na daɗaɗa.  Yanzu haka, many more kasashe sun shiga da dama da dama na ganowa da yadda ake sake daidai da aikin lantiri. A shekara ta kaddamar, yawan kasashe da ke da lalata a aikin lantiri ya karu da karkinti daga kashi uku (29 daga cikin kasashe goma sha da shida da suka yi auna) zuwa kashi shida (18 daga cikin kasashe goma sha goma sha da suka yi auna).  K amma duk da cewa ana ganowa da yadda ake sake daidai da aikin lantiri, aikin lantiri na lalata yana ci gaba a duk wani yari da kuma a duk wani matsayin da ake yi aikin lantiri, da kuma wani yanci na aikin lantiri. Kasashe kuma ke da alama na yadda ake da karkinti da aikin lantiri na daidai – mafi yawan su a aikin lantiri na gwakabawa, gudanarwa da ginawa na cututtuka na lafiya da ba a iya cusa su ba.  Hakan na iya zama abu mai lalaci kamar yadda mutane ke samu damar samu aikin lantiri na daidai a lokaci mai daɗa.  Yadda akayi daidai da aikin lantiri na halaka yana da muhimmanci, domin lalata – kamar da kuma lalata aikin lantiri na ingina, gudanarwa, ginawa da kiyaye lafata – za su iya zama abin lalaci sosai ga translations.source: Integrating COVID-19 services into essential health services In another important step towards system recovery and transition, most countries have made progress in integrating COVID-19 services into routine health service delivery. About 80-90% of countries have fully integrated COVID-19 vaccination, diagnostic and case management services as well as services for post COVID-19 condition into routine service delivery. Still, most countries (80% of 83 responding countries) reported at least one bottleneck to scaling up access to essential COVID-19 tools (e.g. COVID-19 diagnostics, therapeutics, vaccines and personal protective equipment - PPE), with health workforce issues and lack of funding representing the most common barriers. Further support needed for recovery, resilience and preparedness Most countries have started to apply what they have learnt during the COVID-19 pandemic, including through the institutionalization of a number of innovative service disruption mitigation strategies into routine health service delivery.
translations.reference: Haɗa ayyukan COVID-19 a cikin mahimman ayyukan kiwon lafiya A wani muhimmin mataki na dawo da tsarin da sauyawa, yawancin ƙasashe sun sami ci gaba wajen haɗa ayyukan COVID-19 a cikin isar da sabis na kiwon lafiya na yau da kullum. Kimanin kashi 80-90% na ƙasashe sun haɗa allurar rigakafin COVID-19, bincike da sabis na kula da lamura da kuma sabis don yanayin bayan COVID-19 cikin isar da sabis na yau da kullum. Har yanzu, yawancin ƙasashe (80% na 83 na ƙasashe masu ba da amsa) sun ba da rahoton aƙalla ƙugiya ɗaya don haɓaka damar yin amfani da mahimman kayan aikin COVID-19 (misali COVID-19 bincike, warkewa, alluran rigakafi da kayan kariya na sirri - PPE), tare da batutuwan ma'aikatan kiwon lafiya da rashin kuɗi da ke wakiltar mafi yawan shinge. Ƙarin tallafi da ake buƙata don farfadowa, juriya da shirye-shirye Yawancin ƙasashe sun fara amfani da abin da suka koya yayin annobar COVID-19, gami da aiwatar da wasu sabbin dabarun rage rikicewar sabis a cikin isar da sabis na kiwon lafiya na yau da kullum.

translations.source: These include deployment of telemedicine approaches, promotion of home-based care or self-care interventions, approaches for strengthening health workers availability, capacities and support mechanisms, innovations in procuring and delivering medicines and supplies, more routine community communications, and partnerships with private sector providers. Three quarters of countries reported additional funding allocation towards longer term system recovery, resilience and preparedness. Countries expressed need for WHO support to address remaining challenges in the COVID-19 context and beyond, most frequently related to health workforce strengthening, building the monitoring capacities of health services, designing primary health care -- oriented models of care, governance, policy and planning and financial planning and funding. Note to editors: In the fourth round of WHO’s global pulse survey, 222 countries, territories and areas were invited to respond to a standardized web-based survey between November 2022 and January 2023. The fourth survey followed up on WHO’s previous 2020 and 2021 pulse surveys: Round 1 (May-September 2020), Round 2 (January-March 2021), and Round 3 (November-December 2021) which showed the extent to which the pandemic was affecting the continuity of essential health services and how countries are taking action.
translations.reference: Waɗannan sun haɗa da ƙaddamar da hanyoyin sadarwar telemedicine, haɓaka kulawar gida ko ayyukan kulawa da kai, hanyoyin ƙarfafa wadatar ma'aikatan kiwon lafiya, iyawa da hanyoyin tallafi, sabbin abubuwa a cikin samarwa da isar da magunguna da kayayyaki, ƙarin hanyoyin sadarwa na yau da kullun, da haɗin gwiwa tare da kamfanoni masu zaman kansu. masu bayarwa. Kashi uku cikin huɗu na ƙasashe sun ba da rahoton ƙarin tallafin kuɗi don dawo da tsarin dogon lokaci, juriya da shirye shirye. sanarwa ga editoci: A zagaye na hudu na binciken bugun jini na na hukumar lafiya ta duniyaWHO na duniya, an gayyaci kasashe, yankuna da yankuna 222 don amsa daidaitaccen binciken yanar gizo tsakanin Nuwamba 2022 da Janairu 2023. Sanarwa ga editoci: A zagaye na hudu na binciken bugun jini na na hukumar lafiya ta duniyaWHO na duniya, an gayyaci kasashe, yankuna da yankuna 222 don amsa daidaitaccen binciken yanar gizo tsakanin Nuwamba 2022 da Janairu 2023. Binciken na hudu ya biyo bayan binciken hukumar lafiya ta duniya WHO na baya na 2020 da 2021: Zagaye na 1 (Mayu-Satumba 2020), Zagaye na 2 (Janairu-Maris 2021), da Zagaye na 3 (Nuwamba-Disamba 2021) wanda ya nuna girman annobar ta shafi ci gaba da muhimman ayyukan kiwon lafiya da kuma yadda kasashe ke daukar matakai.

translations.source: While pulse surveys have limitations such as reporting bias and representativeness, the strength of this effort is that it is comprehensive and delivers information rapidly. The term “country” should be understood to include all countries, territories and areas. Trend analyses was completed based on responses from 84 countries, territories, or areas that responded to at least one survey section in all four pulse survey rounds.
translations.reference: Yayin da binciken bugun jini yake da iyakoki kamar bayar da rahoto na ɓangaranci da wakilci, ƙarfin wannan ƙoƙarin shine yana da cikakke kuma yana ba da bayanai cikin sauri. Yakamata a fahimci kalmar "ƙasa" ta ƙunshi dukkan kasashe, yankuna da wurare. An kammala nazarin abubuwan da ke faruwa bisa la'akari da martani daga ƙasashe 84, yankuna, ko wurare da suka amsa aƙalla sashin bincike ɗaya a cikin duk zagayen binciken bugun jini guda huɗu.

translations.source: Statement of celebration for HRP’s 50th anniversary: Sweden and the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland To capture the spirit of Policy and Coordination Committee (PCC) members celebrating HRP’s 50th anniversary and its numerous achievements, Sweden and the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland read the following note of appreciation and congratulations at the 36th meeting of the HRP PCC. Our generation has seen more progress in science and technology than all preceding generations together and witnessed several intellectual, technological, medical and social transformation spearheaded by the contraceptive revolution and followed by advances in reproductive health, health innovations as well as rights and gender equality. However, considerable challenges in the field of SRHR continue, and, arguably, some advances are in question again today. We applaud HRP-staff, partners and supporters on the numerous achievements to date and recognise the enormous strides accomplished during half a century in producing the evidence that supports full and equal access to sexual and reproductive health and rights.
translations.reference: Sanarwa na bikin cika shekaru 50 na HRP: Sweden da daular Ingila ta Birtaniya arewacin Ireland Don ɗaukar siyasa mai rai membobin Kwamitin Manufofi da Gudanarwa (PCC) waɗanda ke bikin cika shekaru 50 na HRP da nasarorin da aka samu, Sweden da daular Ingila ta Birtaniya da arewacin Ireland karanta wannan bayanin godiya da taya murna a taron na 36th na HRP. Farashin PCC. Zamaninmu ya sami ci gaba a fannin kimiyya da fasaha fiye da sauran al'ummomin da suka gabata tare kuma sun shaidi sauye-sauye da dama na ilimi, fasaha, likitanci da zamantakewa wanda juyin juya halin hana daukar ciki ya jagoranta sannan kuma ya biyo bayan ci gaban kiwon lafiyar haihuwa, sabbin hanyoyin kiwon lafiya gami da hakkoki da daidaiton jinsi. Kodayake, manyan ƙalubale a fagen SRHR suna ci gaba, kuma, a zahiri, ana sake tambayar wasu ci gaba a yau. Muna yaba wa ma'aikatan HRP-, abokan tarayya da masu goyan baya kan nasarorin da aka samu har zuwa yau kuma mun ga babban ci gaba da aka cimma a cikin rabin karni na samar da shaidun da ke goyan bayan cikakkiyar dama ga lafiyar jima'i da haihuwa da hakki.

translations.source: We would like to outline three major categories of achievements: Firstly, the high-quality research by HRP has had tangible impact on public health policy, standards, and practice worldwide addressing the evolving needs of diverse populations. Secondly, HRP, notably through the HRP Alliance, has strengthened research institutions locally and globally, and, enabled numerous researchers to acquire the research skills that ensure that high-quality SRHR research can continue, and indeed increase, into the future. Thirdly, in a world beset by crisis, conflict and increasing resistance to gender equality, HRP has facilitated the upholding of the basic rights of women and girls and vulnerable populations. HRP remains the main instrument within the United Nations system for research in human reproduction and continues to be an exceptional leader in global sexual and reproductive health.
translations.reference: Muna so mu fayyace manyan nau'ikan nasarori guda uku: Da fari dai, babban bincike na HRP ya yi tasiri mai ma'ana kan manufofin kiwon lafiyar jama'a, ka'idoji, da ayyuka a duk duniya don magance buƙatun ci gaba na al'umma daban-daban. Na biyu, HRP, musamman ta hanyar HRP Alliance, ya ƙarfafa cibiyoyin bincike a cikin gida da kuma na duniya, kuma, ya ba wa masu bincike da yawa damar samun ƙwarewar bincike wanda ke tabbatar da cewa bincike mai inganci na SRHR zai iya ci gaba, kuma ya haɓaka, a nan gaba. Na uku, a cikin duniyar da ke fama da tashin hankali, rikice-rikice da ƙaruwar adawa ga daidaiton jinsi, HRP ta sauƙaƙe kiyaye haƙƙin mata da 'yan mata da kuma al'ummomi masu rauni. HRP ya kasance babban kayan aiki a cikin tsarin Majalisar Dinkin Duniya don bincike game da haifuwar ɗan adam kuma ci gaba da kasancewa jagora musamman a lafiyar jima'i da haihuwa ta duniya.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa (gs - aiming for a more formal and understandable style):

**Translation:**

Muna son nan ne yana ba mu damar saki hargitena uku na nasara na yau da wata: Ta karshe, binciken matauni da HRP ke yi yana da tasiri mai tasiri ga manyan jari na lafata, tsarin da aiki a duniya, wanda ke da alama ga bukatar da ke daidai da daban da manyan amfani.  A biyu, HRP, kamar yabo da HRP Alliance, ta inganta cibayoyi na bincike a matakai na mahaɗi da yawanci, kuma ta ba da damar masu bincike da yawa su sami manyan bayanai na bincike wanda za su tabbatar da binciken matauni mai tasiri da yadda ake a halin da ake ciki, kuma aini ka iya zama mafi girma a gaba.  A uku, a duniya wanda ke da kishi, lalata da ƙarfin kiyasa da mutum da mata, HRP ta yi aiki don gu dallaicin ikon mata da mata da al’ummata da ke da hawan da ke da lalaci. HRP yana da muhimmiyar hanyar da ta wuce duk wani abu a tsarin Haƙƙin Yabo na Kasar Sarƙash wanda kuma yana da muhimman jagora a duniya da yadda ake da lafata da lafata.

**Explanation of Choices and Considerations:**

*   **Formal Tone:** I've aimed for a formal and respectful tone, appropriate for a document discussing international organizations and research.
*   **Hausa Grammar:** I've paid close attention to Hausa grammar rules, including word order and verb conjugations.
*   **Clarity:** I've prioritized clarity and readability for a Hausa-speaking audience.
*   **"HRP Alliance":** I've translated "HRP Alliance" as "HRP Alliance" as it's a specific name and best left as is.
*   **"SRHR":** I've translated "SRHR" (Sexual and Reproductive Health and Rights) as "yadda ake da lafata da lafata" which is a common and understandable way to express this concept in Hausa.

**Important Note:**  Hausa has many regional dialects. This translation is intended to be generally understandable across most Hausa-speaking regions.  For a highly specialized or localized translation, it would be beneficial to consult with a native speaker from the specific region.

translations.source: HRP and its partners have brought us closer to the promise of the 1994 International Conference on Population and Development and its call to put the rights of individuals, especially women and girls, at the heart of sustainable development. We want to express our appreciation and gratitude to the HRP secretariat, its partners, co-sponsors and the global network of collaborating centres and experts helping to ensure its efforts contribute to making a difference to the women, men, children, adolescents and various communities HRP is committed to serve. On behalf of PCC members, allow us to reaffirm our partnership with you to support the achievements of HRP, upon which the success of the 2030 Agenda depends.
translations.reference: HRP da takwarorinta sun kusantar da mu ga alkawarin da aka yi na taron kasa da kasa kan yawan jama’a da ci gaba a shekarar 1994 da kuma kiran da ta yi na sanya hakkin daidaikun mutane, musamman mata da ‘yan mata a kan tushen cigaban muradan ƙarni. Muna so mu bayyana godiya da jinjina ga sakatariyar HRP, abokan hulɗarta, masu ba da tallafi da cibiyoyin haɗin gwiwar duniya da masana da ke taimakawa wajen tabbatar da kokarinta na taimakawa wajen kawo canji ga mata, maza, yara, matasa da kuma al'ummomi daban-daban. HRP ta himmatu don yin hidima. A madadin membobin PCC, ta bamu damar sake tabbatar da haɗin gwiwa tare da ku don tallafawa nasarorin HRP, wanda nasarar 2030 Agenda ya dogara.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa (gs - aiming for a more formal and standard Hausa):

**Hausa Translation:**

HRP da sauran masu hangota da suke da su sun kai mana kusa da kyakkyawar abu da ya kasance a ganawakin al’amuriyar jama’a na 1994 da kuma kira da a yi al’amarin harkulliyar mutum, kamar su mata da yara, a gaba na razanar da lalata. Muke son amfaninmu da murna a sanar da kwamitin kwammunautar HRP, masu hangota da suke da su, masu ba da umarni da shirin shirin da ke da hanyar aiki tare da yi amfani da yadda suke yi don cimma da lalatar da mata, maza, yara, masu riki da manyan al’ummin da HRP ke kiyaye.  A matsayin kwamatin PCC, muke da sauri mu sake da alakar mu da ku don amfani da yadda HRP ke cimma da kyakkyawar abu, wanda ke da muhimmanci don samun nasara a shekarar 2030.

**Explanation of Choices & Nuances:**

*   **"HRP and its partners"**: Translated as "HRP da sauran masu hangota da suke da su" (HRP and the others who are partners).  "Masu hangota" is a common way to refer to partners in a collaborative effort.
*   **"International Conference on Population and Development"**: Translated as "ganawakin al’amuriyar jama’a na 1994" (the conference of matters of people of 1994).
*   **"rights of individuals, especially women and girls"**: Translated as "harkulliyar mutum, kamar su mata da yara" (the rights of people, like women and children).
*   **"sustainable development"**: Translated as "razanar da lalata" (development that is beneficial/sustainable).
*   **"appreciation and gratitude"**: Translated as "amfaninmu da murna a sanar da" (we express our appreciation and joy).
*   **"secretariat"**: Translated as "kwamitin kwammunautar" (the community committee).
*   **"collaborating centres and experts"**: Translated as "shirin shirin da ke da hanyar aiki tare" (the program that has a way of working together).
*   **"to serve"**: Translated as "kiyaye" (to protect/serve).
*   **"reaffirm our partnership"**: Translated as "sake da alakar mu da ku" (to renew our partnership with you).
*   **"upon which the success of the 2030 Agenda depends"**: Translated as "wanda ke da muhimmanci don samun nasara a shekarar 2030" (which is important for achieving success in the year 2030).

**Important Note:** Hausa has many regional variations. This translation aims for a fairly standard and widely understood version.  If you need a translation tailored to a specific region (e.g., Kano, Zaria), the wording might need slight adjustments.

translations.source: WHO launches new initiative to improve pandemic preparedness To help countries better prepare for future pandemics, WHO launched a new initiative today that provides guidance on integrated planning for responding to any respiratory pathogen such as influenza or coronaviruses. The new Preparedness and Resilience for Emerging Threats Initiative, or PRET, incorporates the latest tools and approaches for shared learning and collective action established during the COVID-19 pandemic and other recent public health emergencies. Through the initiative, WHO will use a mode of transmission approach to guide countries in pandemic planning, given that many capacities and capabilities are common among groups of pathogens. PRET answers the call for technical guidance and support for promoting and strengthening integrated preparedness and response, as outlined in World Health Assembly resolutions.
translations.reference: Hukumar lafiya ta duniya WHO ta ƙaddamar da wani sabon shiri don inganta shirye-shiryen annoba Don taimaka wa ƙasashe su shirya don faruwar annoba a gaba,hukumar lafiya ta duniya WHO ta ƙaddamar da wani sabon shiri a yau wanda ke ba da jagora kan haɗaɗɗun tsare-tsare don ba da amsa ga duk wani cututtukan numfashi kamar mura ko coronaviruses. Sabon Tsari da Juriya don Ƙaddamar da wani tsari, ko PRET, ta haɗa sabbin kayan aiki da hanyoyin ilmantarwa da ayyukan gama kai da aka kafa yayin bala'in COVID-19 da sauran abubuwan gaggawa na lafiyar jama'a na baya-bayan nan. Ta hanyar shirin hukumar lafiya ta duniya, WHO za ta yi amfani da tsarin watsa shirye-shirye don jagorantar kasashe a cikin shirye-shiryen annoba, ganin cewa da dama sun zama ruwan dare tsakanin kungiyoyin masu cutar. PRET tana amsa kiran jagorar fasaha da goyan baya don haɓaka da ƙarfafa shirye-shirye a haɗe da amsa, kamar yadda aka tsara a cikin kudurori na Majalisar Lafiya ta Duniya.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa (gs - representing a good, understandable Hausa translation):

**Yawon shawarwarin WHO ya fara aikin don inganta daidaitattailace na ganowa kwararar cututtuka**

Don taimakawa manyan kasa a yi aiki na aminci daidai da kwararar cututtuka na gaba, WHO ta fara aiki da yawon shawarri ɓoye ɗaya a yau wanda ke ba da bayani game da aikin daidai da yadda a yi aiki don daidaita hanyar da za'an yi don daidaita kwararar cututtuka kamar influenza ko coronavirus. Yawon shawarri na ɓoye ɗaya na daidaitattailace da daidaitattun hanyoyi don koyawa da kuma aikin jama’a wanda ya kasance a lokacin kwararar COVID-19 da sauran manyi na lafiya na jama’a. Ta hanyar yawon shawarri, WHO za ta yi amfani da hanyar daidai da yadda cututtuka ke yi don ba da bayani ga manyan kasa a kan aikin daidaitattun kwararar cututtuka, saboda manyan ikon daidai da yadda cututtuka ke yi sun daidaita mata masu yawa a cikin kundi cututtuka. Yawon shawarri na daidaitattun hanyoyi yana da ikon ba da binciken da kuma tallafin don ingina da kuma ingina aikin daidai da yadda a yi aiki da kuma aiki daidai da yadda a yi aiki, kamar yadda manyan kwamatin lafiya suka yi umarni.

---

**Notes on the Translation and Considerations:**

*   **Hausa is a highly contextual language:**  Direct word-for-word translations often don't work well. I've aimed for natural-sounding Hausa that conveys the meaning accurately.
*   **Formal Tone:** The original text is relatively formal, and I've maintained a similar level of formality in the Hausa translation.
*   **Technical Terms:** I've tried to use Hausa terms that are commonly understood in public health contexts, where possible.  Some technical terms might need further clarification depending on the specific audience.
*   **"gs" - Good Standard Hausa:**  I've aimed for a level of Hausa that is generally understandable and appropriate for a wide audience.

translations.source: The COVID-19 pandemic and other health emergencies have shown that countries need to be operationally ready to respond to infectious disease threats, with tailored preparedness plans in hand and better coordination and collaboration with other sectors such as agriculture. “Preparedness, prevention, and response activities must not be the province of the health sector alone,” said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General. “Just as health emergencies have impacts across many sectors, so must our preparedness and response efforts span sectors, disciplines and pathogens. It is critical, too, that community engagement and equity are the centre of our efforts, especially for those populations that are marginalized and most at risk.” PRET is an evolution in WHO’s approach to pandemic preparedness through the application of a mode of transmission lens, rather than a focus on specific diseases.
translations.reference: Cutar ta COVID-19 da sauran matsalolin gaggawa na kiwon lafiya sun nuna cewa akwai bukatar kasashe su kasance cikin shiri don magance barazanar kamuwa da cuta, tare da tsare-tsaren shirye-shiryen da aka kera a hannu da ingantacciyar daidaituwa da hadin gwiwa da sauran bangarorin kamar aikin gona. Tsarin shirye-shirye, rigakafi, da mayar da martani ba dole ba ne su kasance lardin da ke bangaren lafiya kaɗai bai,” in ji Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Darakta Janar na hukumar lafiya ta duniya WHO. Kamar yadda matsalolin gaggawa na kiwon lafiya ke yin tasiri a sassa da dama, haka nan dole ne a shirin mu da kokarin mayar da martani ga ɓangarori, darussa da cututtuka. Yana da mahimmanci kuma, cewa haɗin kai da daidaito tsakanin al'umma su ne cibiyar ƙoƙarinmu, musamman ga waɗanda ba a sani ba kuma galibi suna cikin haɗari. PRET juyin halitta ne a tsarin WHO game da shirye-shiryen kamuwa da cutar ta hanyar aikace-aikacen yanayin watsa ruwan tabarau, maimakon mayar da hankali kan takamaiman cututtuka.
