translations.source: WHO will continue to develop and disseminate guidance on specific diseases as needed. The launch of the initiative is taking place on the last day of meetings with over 120 individuals representing Member States, partners, and the WHO secretariat, to define the path forward for PRET, including the development of a global implementation roadmap for respiratory pathogen pandemic preparedness. The PRET Initiative’s first module focuses on respiratory pathogens, including influenza, coronaviruses, and respiratory syncytial virus. Given the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic and the possible threat of avian influenza, this module will enable countries to critically review, test, and update their respiratory pandemic planning efforts to ensure they have the functional capacities and capabilities in place. A process is underway to identify the next group of pathogens, such as arboviruses, to be addressed under this initiative.
translations.reference: WHO za ta ci gaba da haɓakawa da yada jagora kan takamaiman cututtuka kamar yadda ake buƙata. Kaddamar da shirin yana gudana ne a rana ta ƙarshe ta tarurruka tare da mutane sama da 120 da ke wakiltar ƙasashe membobin, abokan tarayya, da sakatariyar WHO, don ayyana hanyar ci gaba don PRET, gami da haɓaka taswirar aiwatarwa ta duniya don shirye-shiryen rigakafin cututtukan ƙwayar cuta na numfashi. Tsarin farko na PRET Initiative yana mai da hankali kan ƙwayoyin cuta na numfashi, gami da mura, coronaviruses, da ƙwayar cuta ta syncytial na numfashi. Ganin yadda annobar cutar ta COVID-19 take cigaba da kuma yuwuwar barazanar kamuwa da mura ta jiragen ruwa, wannan tsarin zai baiwa kasashe damar yin nazari sosai, gwadawa, da sabunta yunƙurin shirye-shiryen cutar sankarau don tabbatar da cewa suna da iya aiki da iya aiki a wurin. Ana ci gaba da aiki don gano rukuni na gaba na ƙwayoyin cuta, irin su arboviruses, da za a magance a ƙarƙashin wannan shirin.

translations.source: This will follow priorities identified through the ten proposals to strengthen the global architecture for health emergency preparedness, response, and resilience (HEPR). The PRET Initiative ushers in a new era for pandemic preparedness and represents an evolution of WHO’s core activities to support all Member States in strengthening health emergency preparedness, prevention, and response capacities and capabilities. The initiative can also serve to operationalize the objectives and provisions of the Pandemic Accord, which is currently being negotiated by WHO Member States. Following inputs and discussions among meeting participants, WHO invites stakeholders to this global call to action to advance respiratory pathogen pandemic preparedness. Call to Action
translations.reference: Wannan zai bi manyan abubuwan da aka gano ta hanyar shawarwari goma don ƙarfafa gine-ginen duniya don shirye-shiryen gaggawa na lafiya, amsawa, da juriya (HEPR). Ƙaddamar da PRET ta haifar da sabon zamani don shirye-shiryen cutar sankara kuma tana wakiltar juyin halitta na ainihin ayyukan hukumar lafiya ta duniya WHO don tallafawa duk Membobin Kasashe don ƙarfafa shirye-shiryen gaggawa na kiwon lafiya, rigakafi, da damar amsawa da iyawa. Har ila yau, shirin na iya yin aiki don aiwatar da manufofi da tanade-tanade na Yarjejeniyar Cutar Kwalara, wadda a halin yanzu ƙasashe membobin hukumar lafiya ta duniya WHO ke tattaunawa. Bayan bayanai da tattaunawa tsakanin mahalarta taron, hukumar lafiya ta duniya WHO ta gayyaci masu ruwa da tsaki zuwa wannan kiran na duniya don aiwatar da shirye-shiryen rigakafin cutar sankarau. Kira zuwa ga Aiki

translations.source: WHO, Member States, and partners are working together to identify and implement priority actions to strengthen national, regional, and global preparedness for pandemics and emerging infectious disease threats. We recognize the role of communities and all sectors, and the need for harmonized and sustained momentum to end the cycle of panic and neglect that is all too common in pandemic preparedness and response. We recall lessons from previous epidemics and pandemics, especially those caused by respiratory pathogens. These pathogens have and will continue to pose a significant global threat with the potential to cause tremendous morbidity and mortality, overwhelm health systems, de-stabilize the global economy, and exacerbate inequities, which exist in the access to both the tools to prevent pandemics and health care for all people. This is a Call to Action to accelerate preparedness for pandemics and emerging threats globally.
translations.reference: Hukumar lafiya ta duniya WHO, Membobin Kasashe, da abokan haɗin gwiwa suna aiki tare don ganowa da aiwatar da ayyuka masu fifiko don ƙarfafa shirye-shiryen ƙasa, yanki, da duniya don cututtukan cututtuka da kuma barazanar kamuwa da cuta. Mun fahimci rawar al'ummomi da dukkan sassa, da buƙatar daidaitawa da dorewar ci gaba don kawo ƙarshen firgici da sakaci wanda ya zama ruwan dare a cikin shirye-shiryen annoba da martani. Mun tuna da darussa daga bala'i da annoba da suka gabata, musamman wadanda cututtukan numfashi ke haifar da su. Wadannan cututtukan suna kuma za su ci gaba da haifar da babbar barazana ta duniya tare da yuwuwar haifar da mummunar cututtuka da mace-mace, mamaye tsarin kiwon lafiya, dagula tattalin arzikin duniya, da kuma ta'azzara rashin daidaito, wanda ke wanzuwa a cikin damar yin amfani da kayan aikin biyu don hana kamuwa da cuta kiwon lafiya ga dukan mutane. Wannan Kira ne zuwa Aiki don haɓaka shirye-shiryen annoba da barazanar da ke fitowa a duniya.

translations.source: Effective preparedness relies on robust planning and coordinated action. A collective commitment on the following actions will see progress achieved by December 2025 as will be described in the (Preparedness and Resilience for Emerging Threats (PRET) monitoring framework: Update preparedness plans that affirm priority actions and that have considered learnings from past events. Recognizing the risk posed by respiratory pathogens, planning for a respiratory pathogen pandemic based on the themes identified in the PRET Module #1: Planning for Respiratory Pathogen Pandemics is a priority
translations.reference: Shiri mai inganci ya dogara ne akan ingantaccen tsari da aiki tare. Alƙawarin gamayya kan ayyuka masu zuwa za su kai ga ci gaban da aka samu nan da Disamba 2025 kamar yadda za a bayyana a cikin tsarin sa ido na (Shiri da Juriya don Barazana masu tasowa (PRET): Sabunta shirye-shiryen da ke tabbatar da ayyukan fifiko kuma waɗanda suka yi la'akari da koyo daga abubuwan da suka faru a baya. Gane haɗarin da ƙwayoyin cuta na numfashi ke haifarwa, tsarawa don da annobar cutar numfashi dangane da jigogin da aka gano a cikin Module PRET #1: Abu ne mai muhimmanci zama cikin shirin fuskantar annobar cututtuka masu alaƙa da numfashi.

translations.source: Increase connectivity among stakeholders in pandemic preparedness planning through systematic coordination and cooperation. This includes building equitable systems; conducting joint exercises; and sharing information on good practices, challenges, and opportunities. Dedicate sustained investments, financing and monitoring of pandemic preparedness with a particular focus on addressing the gaps identified during past pandemics and epidemics. The COVID-19 pandemic response has demonstrated what can be achieved with political commitment, community engagement and funding.
translations.reference: Kara haɗin kai tsakanin masu ruwa da tsaki a cikin shirye-shiryen annoba ta hanyar kyakkyawan tsari da haɗin kai. wannan ya haɗa da samar da tsari na daidaito, da gudanar da ayyuka tare da musayar bayanai game da sahihan hanyoyi da ƙalulabe da damarmaki. Ware kuɗi na musamman, ɗaukar nauyi da shirya bibiyar tasirin annobar da kuma ɗaukar mataki ta la'akari da giɓin da aka samu a yayin wata annoba a baya. matakin da aka ɗauka kan Kwabid-19 'yar manuniya ce game irin nasarar da za a samu daga shugabanci da al'umma da tallafi.

translations.source: At the heart of this work is to ensure equity to be ready for the next pandemic together. Whole-of-society action is needed to make the progress outlined in this Call to Action. Implementation should therefore strengthen the resilience of communities; maintain, sustain, and build on routine systems; and leverage broader capacities for emergency preparedness and response. This Call to Action was released at the Preparedness and Resilience for Emerging Threats (PRET): Global Meeting for Future Respiratory Pathogen Pandemics held on 24-26 April 2023 in Geneva, Switzerland.
translations.reference: daidaito cikin wannan aiki na da muhimmanci domin shiryawa annobar. akwai buƙatar al'umma bakiɗaya ta ɗau matakin da zai tabbatar da nasarar ain da aka sa a gaba. ya kamata aiwatarwar ta ƙarfafi guiwar al'umma wajen gina tabbataccen tsari na yau da kullum da cin moriyar ƙarin dama ta ɗaura ɗamarar ko-ta-kwana. An yi wannan kira ne a lokacin zaburarwa da ɗaura ɗamarar tunƙarar duk wata barazana (PRET): Taron Tattaunawa kan Makomar Annobar Cutar Numfashi ta Duniya da aka yi a ranar 24 ga Afirilu a Geneva, Switzerland.

translations.source: WHO urges increased implementation of recommended tools to combat malaria Marking World Malaria Day, the World Health Organization (WHO) is issuing a call for increased implementation of new and existing interventions to save lives from malaria. Nearly 1.5 million children at high risk of illness and death from malaria in Ghana, Kenya and Malawi have now received their first dose of the first malaria vaccine, RTS,S/AS01 (RTS,S), thanks to an ongoing pilot programme coordinated by WHO. The malaria vaccine pilots, launched in 2019, are increasing equity in access to malaria prevention for the most vulnerable and are saving lives. If implemented broadly, WHO estimates that malaria vaccines could save the lives of tens of thousands of children each year.
translations.reference: Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta yi kira da a ƙara yawan yadda ake amfani da abubuawan da za su taimaka wajen yaƙi da zazzaɓin cizon sauro a yayin Ranar Yaƙi da Zazzaɓin Cizon Sauro ta Duniya, Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO) ta yi kira da a ƙara ƙoƙari wajen amfani da sabbi da matakan da ake da su da wajen ceto rayuka daga zazzaɓin cizon sauro. Yara kusan miliyan 1.5 da ke fuskantar barazanar kamuwa ko rasa rai sabili da cutar maleriya daga ƙasashen Ghana, Kenya da Malawi, sun samu kashin farko na allurar rigakafin cutar maleriya RTS,S/AS01 (RTS,S). Godiya ga shirin na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya. kashin farko na rigakafin maleriya wanda aka ƙaddamar a 2019 na cigaba da samar da hanyoyin kariya al'umma da kuma ceton rayuka. idan aka faɗaɗa shirin, Hukumar Lafiya ta duniya na ganin za a iya kai wa ga ceto rayukan dubun nan yara a kowacce shekara.

translations.source: “We have the tools to drive down malaria, a package of interventions that includes vector control, preventive medicines, testing, and treatment,” said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Director-General of WHO. “These are joined by a safe and effective malaria vaccine, which could save the lives of tens of thousands children every year. With sustained investment and scaled-up efforts to reach those most at risk, malaria elimination in many countries is in reach. "World Malaria Day 2023 is being marked under the theme “Time to deliver zero malaria: invest, innovate, implement”. Within this theme, WHO is urging more effective implementation of available tools and strategies to prevent, diagnose and treat malaria, particularly among marginalized populations.
translations.reference: a cewar darakta janar na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO), muna da kayan kai ɗauki da za mu iya rage tasirin cutar maleriya da suka haɗa da: abin magance ƙwayoyin yaɗa cutar da magugunan rigakafi da na gwaje-gwaje da na maganin cutar. waɗannan sun ƙunshi ingantattun rigakafin cutar maleriya da za su kai ga ceton dubun nan yara a kowacce shekara. akwai yuwuwar kawo ƙarshen cutar maleriya a ƙasashe da dama, idan aka ƙara himma wajen cigaba da kai ɗauki ga waɗanda suka fi fuskantar baranaza. An yi wa ranar cutar maleriya ta duniya ta 2023 take da lokacin kawo ƙarshen maleriya bakiɗaya: zuba jari, fikira da ɗaukar mataki. Taken, wata hanya ce da Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ke son yin kira wajen amfani da kayan aiki da sahihan hanyoyi domin hana kamuwa da ba da magungunan magance maleriya musamman a tsakanin talakawa.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided English text into Hausa (gs - aiming for a more formal and understandable style):

“Wannan na nuna cewa muke da hanyar da za mu rage lalata alamar malaria, wanda ke da gama na auna-sauran kamar su: daidai da kula da wuraren da ke da juna, hanyoyin ganowa da kula, binciken jiki, da kuma daidai da kula da alama.  Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, kwamandanmu na kasa da yawansu na WHO, ya ce haka. “Hakan na dogara da karkumari da kuma hanyar da ta dace da kyakkyawan kula da alamar malaria, wanda za mu iya guojin rayuka na yara goma kaɗan ko fi, duk da haka.  Duk da cewa muke da shiri da kuma auna-sauran da za mu yi a kan su don cimma da yanci na alamar malaria a manyan kasashe. “Yau na alamar malaria na duniya 2023 ke auna da kuma a yi a kan shi da hakan: “Yau ne za mu yi aiki don guojin alamar malaria: shiri, harkata, da auna-sauran.”  A canjin hakan, WHO ke bukatar a yi aiki da kakar da ta dace da kuma a yi aiki da hanyoyin da muke da su don guojin, binciken, da kula da alamar malaria, kamar yadda muke da shi da kuma a yi aiki da wadanda ke da matsala da yawa.”

**Explanation of Choices and Considerations:**

* **Formal Tone:** I've aimed for a more formal and respectful tone, appropriate for official statements like this.
* **Hausa Grammar:** I've paid close attention to Hausa grammar rules, including word order and verb conjugations.
* **Clarity:** I've prioritized clarity and ease of understanding for a general Hausa-speaking audience.
* **"WHO" Translation:** I've kept "WHO" as is, as it's a widely recognized acronym.
* **"Marginalized Populations":**  I've translated this as "wadanda ke da matsala da yawa" (those who have many problems/difficulties) – a common and understandable way to express this concept in Hausa.

**Important Note:**  Hausa has many regional dialects. This translation is intended to be generally understandable across most Hausa-speaking regions.  For a highly specific or localized translation, a native speaker from the target region would be ideal.

translations.source: According to the latest World malaria report, published in December 2022, there were an estimated 247 million new cases of malaria in 2021. The WHO African Region continues to shoulder the heaviest burden of the disease – accounting for an estimated 95% of all malaria cases (234 million) and 96% of all deaths (593 000) in 2021. Nearly 80% of malaria deaths in the African Region were among children under the age of five. New strategies and tools Countries have made some progress in expanding access to malaria services for most-at-risk populations.
translations.reference: a cewar wani rahoto na baya-bayan nan na duniya kan maleriya da aka wallafa a watan Disambar 2022, akwai sabbin alƙaluman kamuwa da maleriya da ya kai miliyan 247 a 2021. Reshen Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO) da ke Afirka ne ya fi samun yawan masu fama da cutar, inda aka samu alƙaluman kamuwa da cutar maleriya da kaso 95% (miliyan 234) da kaso 96% na waɗanda suka rasa rayukansu (593000) a 2021. Kaso 80% ne waɗanda suka rasa ransu a yankin Afrika saboda cutar maleriya yara ne da ke ƙasa da shekaru biyar a duniya. Sabbin hanyoyi da kayan aiki Wasu ƙasashe sun yi nasarar kai wa ga faɗaɗa kai ɗauki ga al'ummatan da suka fi fuskantar baranar kamuwa da maleriya.

translations.source: Despite some progress, many people at high risk of malaria still lack access to services that can prevent, detect and treat the disease. Challenges in expanding access to malaria services have been compounded, particularly in sub-Saharan Africa, by the COVID-19 pandemic, converging humanitarian crises, restricted funding, weak surveillance systems, and declines in the effectiveness of core malaria-fighting tools. To address these threats and support countries in building more resilient malaria programmes, WHO recently published new strategies and frameworks, including: a new strategy to contain antimalarial drug resistance in Africa; a new initiative to stop the spread of Anopheles stephensi in urban environments;
translations.reference: Duk da wannan nasara, da yawa daga cikin al'umma na cigaba da fuskantar barazar kamuwa da cutar maleriya saboda rashin samun ɗaukin kariya da gano da magance cutar. Kai tallafi da shafi cutar maleriya ya gamu da tazgaro musamman a yankin Saharar Afirka saboda annobar Kwabid-19 da matsalar jin-ƙai da ƙarancin samun kuɗin ɗaukar nauyi da rashin sa-ido da ƙarancin wadatattun kayan aikin yaƙi da cutar maleriya. A kwanakin baya ne Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta wallafa wasu sabbin dabaru da hanyoyi na magance barazana da kai ɗauki ga ƙasashe domin samar da ingantattun shirye-shirye kan cutar maleriya.: sabbin dabarun da za su ƙunshi magungunan rigakafin maleriya a Afirka; muhalli;

translations.source: a new framework, developed jointly by WHO and UN-Habitat, to guide city leaders in urban malaria control. a new toolkit to help countries assess their malaria surveillance systems and identify areas for investment WHO has also increased the transparency, flexibility and access to its malaria recommendations. The consolidated WHO Guidelines for malaria are now available through two digital platforms: MAGICapp and the “Malaria Toolkit” app. WHO encourages countries to tailor the recommendations to local disease settings for maximum impact.
translations.reference: wani sabon tsari na haɗin guiwa da aka samar tsakanin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya da Sashen Gina Birane na Majalisar Ɗinkin Duniya, zai yi wa shugabanni jagoranci wajen kula da cutar maleriya a birane. a akwai sabbin kayan aikin da za su taimaka wa ƙasashe wajen auna matakin cutar maleriya da gano ɓangarorin da ya kamata a kashe wa kuɗi Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta ƙara faɗaɗa damar kai wa ga shawarwarinta kan cutar maleriya. ana iya zamun ƙunshin shawarwarin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta manhajoji guda biyu: MAGICapp da Malaria Toolkitapp. ƙasashe za su iya magance cututtuka domin ƙara cin moriyar shawarwarin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa (gs - representing a standard Hausa script), aiming for clarity and natural-sounding language:

**Hausa Translation:**

"Wannan kwamitin sabon abu, wanda suka yi tare da WHO da UN-Habitat, yana da manufa don gabatar da masu shirin biranchi a kan kiyaye kwayar lalata a biranchi. Wannan kwamitin sabon abu kuma yana sa arewa na kasa da kasa su yi binciken hanyar su daidai da kwayar lalata, kuma su gaurar da wanda za’an yi aiki a ciki. WHO kuma ta karawa daidai, da yadda za’a yi da kuma yadda za’a samu hanyoyin da ta yi a kan kwayar lalata. Wannan bayani na WHO daidai da kwayar lalata yana da amana a shirin biyu na dijital: MAGICapp da kuma kwamitin “Malaria Toolkit”. WHO ke ba da umarni da a yi amfani da bayanan da ke da shi da yadda za’a yi a kan kwayar lalata don daidai da yadda za’a yi aiki."

**Explanation of Choices & Considerations:**

*   **"Wannan kwamitin sabon abu"** -  This translates to "This new framework."  I've used "kwaminitin" (framework/committee) as it's a common and understandable term.
*   **"wanda suka yi tare da"** - "developed jointly by" –  This conveys the collaborative nature.
*   **"yana da manufa don gabatar da masu shirin biranchi a kan kiyaye kwayar lalata a biranchi"** - This is a more detailed translation of "to guide city leaders in urban malaria control."  It breaks it down for clarity.
*   **"Wannan kwamitin sabon abu kuma yana sa arewa na kasa da kasa su yi binciken hanyar su daidai da kwayar lalata, kuma su gaurar da wanda za’an yi aiki a ciki"** - This translates "a new toolkit to help countries assess their malaria surveillance systems and identify areas for investment."  I've used "binciken hanyar su daidai da kwayar lalata" (assess their malaria surveillance systems) to be more precise.
*   **"WHO kuma ta karawa daidai, da yadda za’a yi da kuma yadda za’a samu hanyoyin da ta yi a kan kwayar lalata"** - This translates "WHO has also increased the transparency, flexibility and access to its malaria recommendations."
*   **"Wannan bayani na WHO daidai da kwayar lalata yana da amana a shirin biyu na dijital"** - This translates "The consolidated WHO Guidelines for malaria are now available through two digital platforms."
*   **"MAGICapp da kuma kwamitin “Malaria Toolkit”"** -  I've kept the app names in English as they are likely known terms.
*   **"WHO ke ba da umarni da a yi amfani da bayanan da ke da shi da yadda za’a yi a kan kwayar lalata don daidai da yadda za’a yi aiki."** - This translates "WHO encourages countries to tailor the recommendations to local disease settings for maximum impact."

**Important Notes for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Key:** Hausa, like many low-resource languages, benefits greatly from understanding the context.  If you can provide more information about the intended audience or purpose of the translation, I can refine it further.
*   **Multiple Interpretations:**  Some English phrases can have multiple Hausa translations. I've aimed for the most common and easily understood options.
*   **Review by a Native Speaker:**  Ideally, this translation should be reviewed by a fluent Hausa speaker to ensure accuracy and naturalness.

translations.source: Prospects for new interventions Continued investment in the development and deployment of new malaria vaccines and next-generation tools will be key to achieving the 2030 global malaria targets. A second malaria vaccine, the R21/Matrix-M (R21) vaccine, if approved, could help close the sizable gap between supply and demand and further reduce child illness and death from malaria. It is a priority for WHO to continue the thorough and efficient expert review of the R21 malaria vaccine once additional key safety and efficacy data from the ongoing R21 phase 3 trial are available and provided to WHO. Phased introductions of the RTS,S malaria vaccine in additional countries in Africa are expected to begin in early 2024.
translations.reference: sabbin hanyoyin kai ɗauki cigaba da tallafawa bunƙasawa da rarraba sabon rigakafin maleriya da sabunta fasahar kayayyaki hanya ce da za kai ga cimma muradan kawo ƙarshen maleriya na 2030. Nau'in rigakafin maleriya na biyu, R21/Matrix-M (R21), zai iya taimakawa wajen wadatuwarsa ga masaya tare da rage yawan yara masu fama da zazzaɓi da ransa rai saboda cutar ta maleriya. abu ne mai muhimmanci ga Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya cigaba da binciken kwakwaf kan nau'in rigakafin maleriya na R21 har sai ta samu rahoton ƙarin tabbaci game da ingancin bayanai kan gwajin R21 karo na uku da ake yi da zarar an kammala. ana sa ran kai rigakafin maleriya na RTSS zuwa wasu ƙasashen Afirka a farkon shekarar 2024.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa (gs - representing a good, understandable Hausa translation):

**Tunanins Asusun Mats yarima Sabuwar Shinge**

Karraman da shiri na shiga daidai da ci gaba da amfani da makalmi masu karfi da hanyoyin daidai da sabuwar shinge na shiri za su yi daidai da cimma dasu kyakkyawar mataki a shekarar 2030.  Mats yarima shiri na biyu, R21/Matrix-M (R21), idan an amince da shi, zai iya taimakawa wajen kawancewa da bambancewar da ke tsakanin samarwa da bukaci, kuma kuma a karancewa da lalata da yawa da shiri a mutanen da ke karkace.  Wani bashi ne ga WHO wajen ci gaba da binciken daidai da kyautasar masu bashi da yadda su yi a R21 mats yarima na shiri lokan ana samu damuffofin daidai da lafiya da yadda su yi daga binciken R21 na shekara uku da ke gudana, kuma an kai su zuwa WHO.  Amsalance-amsalance shiri na RTS,S mats yarima za su fara a areka a areka na Afirqa a farkon shekarar 2024.

**Explanation of Choices and Considerations:**

*   **Formal Tone:** I've aimed for a formal and professional tone, suitable for a document discussing public health interventions.
*   **Clarity:** I've prioritized clarity and ease of understanding for a Hausa-speaking audience.
*   **Technical Terms:**  I've tried to translate technical terms (like "malaria vaccine," "phase 3 trial") in a way that is understandable within the context of the document.  Sometimes, a direct translation isn't the best approach; I've used descriptive phrases.
*   **Grammar and Style:** I've adhered to standard Hausa grammar and sentence structure.

**Important Note:**  Hausa has regional variations. This translation is intended to be generally understandable across many Hausa-speaking regions.  For highly specialized or legal documents, a review by a native Hausa speaker with expertise in the subject matter would be recommended.

translations.source: In the vector control space, there are 28 new products in the R&D pipeline. Tools under evaluation include, for example, new types of insecticide-treated nets, targeted baits that attract mosquitoes, spatial repellents, lethal house lures (eaves tubes) and genetic engineering of mosquitoes. Researchers are prioritizing the development of non-ACT treatments in the field of antimalarial medicines due to the emergence and spread of partial artemisinin resistance. The development of next-generation medicines, such as "triple ACTs," which use a combination of artemisinin and two partner drugs, is underway to reduce the risk of drug resistance. Notes to the editor:For more information on the WHO World Malaria Day campaign, visit: https://www.who.int/campaigns/world-malaria-day/2023
translations.reference: akwai sabbin kayayyaki a fannin bincike a ɓangaren kula da kwayoyin da ke yaɗa cuta. Ga misali, kayayyakin da ake kan nazarinsu sun haɗa da, sabbin nau'o'in gidan sauro mai ɗauke da sinadarin kashe ƙwari, abubuwan yi wa sauro ƙofar-rago, abin kore sauro da gidan kashe sauro da sauya zubin halittar sauro. Masu bincike a ɓangaren samar da rigakafin yaƙi da cutar maleriya sun fi mai da hankali ga cigaban hanyoyin warkarwa da ba na ACT ba saboda ƙarancin tasirin sinadarin atimisinin. ana sa ran cewa cigaba wajen samar da magugunan da za su zama zakaran gwajin dafi a nan gaba kamar "Triaple ACTs" wanda ya ƙunshi sinadarin atimisinin da wasu magunguna biyu, zai rage fargabar rashin tasirin magani. abin lura ga edita: Domin samun ƙarin bayani game da Ranar Hukumasr Lafiya ta Duniya, ziyarci: https://www.who.int/campaigns/world-malaria-day/2023
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa (gs - aiming for a more formal, written style):

**Auwatin cikin makwabi na biwar (vector control), akwai samfuran sabon lantiri 28 a yawansu na nazarin kwamfuta (R&D pipeline). Ayyukan da ke a yi binciken su sun hada da, kamar yadda muka yi aini kuma, ruwan kiyashi na daidai da kwararar kwarfafa cibiya (insecticide-treated nets), kwararfin cibiya da ke jikkata cibbayi (targeted baits), ruwan kiyashi na daidai da yankanci (spatial repellents), kwararfin cibiya mai lalata (lethal house lures – eaves tubes) kuma aikin dafata juyar wasanni na cibbayi (genetic engineering of mosquitoes). Masu binciken na bukatar da a yi aikin yi na hanyoyin da ba ta da ACT a fagen maganin lalata, sabanin karkashin yadda kwayoyin lalata ke raguwar kwararfin kwarfafa kuma ke da yuwarsa ta yi daidai.  Aikin yi na maganin dawo da sabon abu, kamar "triple ACTs," wanda ke amfani da kiyasin artemisinin da biyu na hanyoyin da ke daidai, yana aiki don rage yawan kwararfin kwayoyin lalata. Muhimmin bayani ga masu rikodin: Don ƙarin ƙidayar game da aikin yawansu na rana na duniya na lalata na WHO, ziyartu: https://www.who.int/campaigns/world-malaria-day/2023**

**Explanation of Choices and Considerations:**

*   **Formal Tone:** I've aimed for a formal and precise translation suitable for a document.
*   **Hausa Terminology:** I've used common Hausa terms for technical concepts where possible.  Some terms are transliterated (written in Roman characters) to represent Hausa sounds accurately.
*   **Clarity:** I've prioritized clarity and readability in Hausa.
*   **"Vector Control":**  Translated as "makwabi na biwar" (second level of control) – this is a reasonable approximation of the concept.
*   **"R&D Pipeline":** Translated as "yawansu na nazarin kwamfuta" (their computer research pipeline).
*   **"ACT":**  I've kept "ACT" as is, as it's a recognized abbreviation in the field.
*   **"Notes to the Editor":** Translated as "Muhimmin bayani ga masu rikodin" (Important information to editors).

**Important Note:**  Hausa has many regional variations. This translation is intended to be generally understandable across many Hausa-speaking regions.  For highly specialized contexts, a local expert would be needed to refine the terminology.

translations.source: mRNA Technology Transfer Programme moves to the next phase of its development Inauguration of the mRNA technology Hub facility at Afrigen, South Africa. Partners gather in Cape Town to discuss the next phase of the mRNA vaccine development and knowledge sharing. Over 200 international participants working with the mRNA Technology Transfer Programme met in Cape Town this week for their first face-to-face meeting. Joined by World Health Organization (WHO) Director General, Dr. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus and Dr. Joe Phaahla, Minister of Health and Minister of Trade and Industry, Mr. Ebrahim Patel of South Africa together with high-level officials from funding countries, this unique meeting reviewed the progress since WHO and Medicines Patent Pool (MPP) launched it in June 2021.
translations.reference: Shirin Kamfanin Musayar Fasaha ta mRNA ya shiga mataki na biyu a cigaban da yake samu. za a ƙaddamar da Kamfanin Fasaha na mRNA a Afrigen, a Afrika ta Kudu. abokan haɗin guiwar za su haɗu ne a garin Cape Town domin tattauna mataki na gaba na cigaba da musayar ilimi game da rigakafin mRNA. sama da mutane 200 masu ba da gudumuwa daga faɗin duniya da ke aiki da Kamfanin Musayar Fasaha ta mRNA ne za su haɗu a wannan sati a Cape Town domin ganawa kai tsaye da juna. darakta-janar na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO), Dr. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus da Ministan Lafiya, Dr. Joe Phaahla, da Ministan Kasuwanci da Masana'antu, Mr. Ebrahim Patel na Afirka ta Kudu tare da manyan jami'ai daga ƙasashen da ke ba da tallafi; duk sun haɗu a wurin taron domin sake duba irin cigaban da aka samu tun bayan da Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya da Kanfanin Haɗa Magungunan suka ƙaddamar da ita a 2021.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa (gs - aiming for a more formal, written style):

**Yawutakemawa:**

Tsarin Shiri Mai Sadarwa (mRNA) na taya na zuwa mataki na kwamuntace.  Gwanon wasan shiri na mRNA na kammala daɗa a Afrigen, Afirka ta Kudu.  Masu hakan suka taru a Cape Town don tattauna mataki na kwamuntace na amfani da wasan shiri na mRNA da kuma yaba da manyan sana’antar.  Ko da masu gwamnatanci sama da 200 daga kasashe biyu da dama da ke aiki da Tsarin Shiri Mai Sadarwa na mRNA sun yi tashi na farkin wasanninsu na karni a Cape Town a wasan nan.  Wasu masu bashi da kyakkyawar sana’a daga Turuwanci, kamar Dr. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, kwamawa na Janarewa na Kasauniya (WHO), da Dr. Joe Phaahla, kwamanda na lauyan kasa da kwamanda na sana’a, Mr. Ebrahim Patel na Afirka ta Kudu, suka shiga cikin wannan tashi na musamman.  Wannan tashi ya yi binciken yadda suka yi a nan da WHO da Kamarfin Hafta na Hafta (MPP) suka fara shi a watan Yuni na shekara ta 2021.

---

**Notes on the Translation and Choices Made:**

*   **Formal Tone:** I've aimed for a more formal and official tone, suitable for a document about a program.
*   **Hausa Terminology:** I've used Hausa terms for concepts like "technology transfer program" (Tsarin Shiri Mai Sadarwa), "mRNA vaccine" (wasan shiri na mRNA), and "World Health Organization" (Turuwanci, kwamawa na Janarewa na Kasauniya).
*   **Clarity:** I've prioritized clarity and readability in Hausa.
*   **Cultural Context:** I've tried to maintain the meaning and significance of the original English text.

translations.source: “I am delighted to be here in Cape Town with our partners to support a sustainable model for mRNA technology transfer to give low- and middle-income countries equitable access to vaccines and other lifesaving health products,” said WHO Director-General Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. “I am immensely proud of the achievement of all those involved in this project; in less than two years we have shown that when we work collaboratively, we succeed collectively.” The meeting participants include biomanufacturing partners from 15 countries in the Programme, leading experts, industry, civil society representatives, and funders. During the five-day meeting, participants will share progress and discuss critical enablers for the sustainability of the Programme such as intellectual property issues and regulatory aspects, as well as the science of mRNA technologies and key applications relevant to LMICs in other disease areas such as HIV and tuberculosis. The COVID-19 pandemic has underscored that gross inequity exists in access to health products, especially vaccines.
translations.reference: Na yi farin cikin kasancewa a nan Cape Town tare da abokan haɗin guiwa na samar da shiri mai ɗorewa na Kamfanin Musayar Fasaha ta mRNA domin tallafawa ƙasashe masu ƙaramin ƙarfi wajen samun rigafi da sauran magunguna inganta lafiya kamar kowa; a cewar darakta-janar na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. Ina alfahari da duk waɗanda suka ba da gudunmuwa a wannan aiki wajen samun nasara cikin abin da bai wuce shekara biyu ba wanda hakan ke tabbatar da cewa idan aka yi aiki bakiɗaya, za mu samu nasara tare. taron ya haɗa da masu haɗin guiwa daga kamfanin kimiyya daga ƙasashe 15 da ke cikin shirin, da ƙwararru da masana'antu da wakilan al'umma da masu zuba hannun jari. Ana sa ran a yayin wannan taro na kwanaki biyar, mahalarta taron za su yi musayar hanyoyin samar da cigaba ɗorawar shirin kamar batu na haƙƙin mallaka da dokokin gudanarwa da fasahar mRNA da muhimman hanyoyin LMICs da suka shafi wasu cututtuka kamar cuta mai karya garkuwar jiki da kuma tarin fuka. Annobar Kwabid-19 ta yi matuƙar fallasa mummunan rashin daidaito na neman lafiya, musamman game da rigakafi.

translations.source: As of March 2023, more than three years after WHO declared COVID-19 a Public Health Emergency of International Concern (PHEIC), 69.7% of the global population had received at least one dose of a COVID-19 vaccine. Notably, this proportion still remains below 30% in low-income countries (LICs) . This Programme aims to contribute to equitable access to mRNA vaccines by increasing the distribution of sustainable manufacturing capacity across LMICs, enhancing regional and inter-regional collaborations, and developing and empowering a local workforce through tailored and inclusive training and expert support. What is unique in the mRNA Technology Transfer model is the multilateral process that allows sharing of technologies to multiple recipients so that through local and regional production those in need can be reached rapidly. Dr Phaahla, Minister of Health South Africa, said: “What we see here today, is a moment in history, a Programme that is aimed at empowering LMICs through a global collaborative network.
translations.reference: Tun bayan ayyana Kwabid-19 a matsayin lamarin da ya shafi lafiya da ke buƙata kulawar gaggawa a duniya a watan Maris ɗin 2023, kawo 69.7 cikin ɗari na al'umma ne a faɗin duniya suka kai ga samun aƙalla ƙunshi ɗaya na rigakafin Kwabid-19. Abin lura shi ne kaso 30% na wancan adadi sun fito ne daga ƙasashe masu ƙaramin ƙarfi (LICs). Manufar wannan shiri shi ne ba da gudunmawa ta baiɗaya wajen samun rigakafin nRNA ta hanyar ninƙa samar da rigakafin a tsakankanin LMICs da ƙarfafa haɗin guiwa a tsakanin yanki da sauran yankuna da bunƙasawa da ƙarfafa wa masu aiki na ƙasa ta hanyar ba su horo da tallafi. Abin burgewa game da Tsarin Musayar Fasaha shi ne tsarin sanya kowa cikin samun damar musayar fasaha ga mutane daban-daban wajen iya samar da rigakafin domin isa ga masu buƙata cikin sauri. A cewar dakta Phaahla, ministan Lafiya na Afirka ta Kudu; abin da muke gani a yau abu ne na tarihi, shiri ne da manufarsa karfafa wa LMICs da ke faɗin Duniya ta hanyar haɗin guiwa.

**Hausa Translation:**

A bisa shekara uku da karfin 2023, bayan da WHO ya sanadiyyar COVID-19 a mataki na Muhimmar Haƙƙin Isowa ta Al’amara (PHEIC), 69.7% na mazaunin duniya sun karba karkumamar kwaskace na mabi’an COVID-19.  Yana da wuya, haka nan, cewa kashi na ci gaba haka ya koma ƙasa da 30% a arewacin ƙasashe masu tasune-tasune (LICs). Wannan Asusauwar ke nufin ka karu da yadda ake amfani da sana’ar cin zarafi na mRNA ta hanyar ƙara da yadda aiyasha na aikin sana’a da yawa a cikin kasashe masu tasune-tasune (LMICs), kuma a ingina da kuma ingina da yadda aikin lantiri na kasa da kasa da kasa wata ya yi, kuma a yi aikin haɗawa da koyawa da tallafin masu bashi. translations.source: I am thrilled to see the progress made in such a relatively short time and welcome the support from so many different countries - countries like South Africa that have a strong vibrant biomanufacturing capacity and that are willing to work together, learn from and share with each other.” Minister Blade Nzimande of Higher Education and Science, said: “Ours is the vision of the mRNA Technology Transfer Hub beyond just COVID-19. The capabilities we are building are looking to empower us to deal with other future pandemics whose vaccines could use the same mRNA technology platform. It is a vision that has set its eyes on diseases that are prevalent in our environments such as Malaria, Tuberculosis and HIV and AIDS.” This occasion also marks an important milestone for the Programme with the inauguration of the mRNA technology Hub facility at Afrigen in Cape Town in the presence of Dr. Tedros and Dr. Matshidiso Moeti WHO Regional Director for Africa, Charles Gore Executive Director of MPP and the Honorable Ministers who took part in a ribbon cutting ceremony at Afrigen.
translations.reference: Na yi matuƙar farin cikin ganin cigaban da aka samu a ƙankanin lokaci tare da yin maraba da tallafi da aka samu daga ƙasashe da dama kamar Afirka ta Kudu da ke da Kanfanin Kimiyyar Halittu da kuma ƙoƙarinta na ganin ta koya tare da musayar ilimi a kowa. a cewar ministan Ilimi Mai Zurfi da Kimiyya, Blade Nzimande, mafarkinmu game da Shirin Musayar Fasaha ta mRNA shi ne ta zarce batun Kwabid-19 kaɗai. Muna ƙoƙarin samar da yanayi ne da zai ba mu dama a nan gaba mu iya fuskantar kowacce annoba ta hanyar samar da rigakafinta daga fasahar mRNA. Wannan hangen nesa ne da aka yi kan cututtukan da suka zama gama-gari ga al'ummarmu kamar maleriya da tarin fuka da cuta mai karya garkuwar jiki (HIV da AIDS). Haka kuma wannan taro ya fito da muhimmancin shirin da aka ƙaddamar na Fasahar mRNA da aka yi a Afrigen da ke Cape Town a idon Dakta Tedros da Dakta Matshidiso Moeti wanda darakta ne na Yankin Afirka a Majalisar Ɗinkin Duniya da Charles Gore, babban darkta na MPP da kuma ministoci waɗanda suka sa hannu wajen yanka ribon na bikin kaddamarwar.

“Ina ameen soni da yadda suka yi mana tashe-tashe a makwancin makwanci kuma ina kyamata da goyan bayantata daga manyan kasashe – kasashe kamar Sasai da ke da kuma ikon samar da kayayyaki mai daɗi da ƙarfi kuma ke nufiyar aiki tare, koyawa daga juna, kuma dafatacciyar da juna.” Minista Blade Nzimande na Ilimi da Kimiyata, ya ce: “Wannan shine ra’ayin kwamitin Shiri na Teknoloji na mRNA kamar yabo, kamar yabo ba kawai ga COVID-19 ba. Akwabin abin da muke yi yana nuna cewa muke iya maganin lalata da lalata na ci gaba wanda hotsunsu zai yi amfani da kwamitin mRNA na wannan platform. Wannan ra’ayin yana nuna kwararron yi mata hanyoyi don maganin kasashen da suka yi daɗi a arewacinmu kamar Malaria, Tudani, da HIV da AIDS.” Wannan yabo kuma yana nuna miki martani mai muhimmanci ga Barka da Barka da kwamitin Teknoloji na mRNA a Afrigen a Cape Town, inda suka kasance Dr. Tedros da Dr. Matshidiso Moeti, kwamarran WHO na Arewa, Charles Gore, kwamarran MPP, kuma minista na da yawa da suka yi auna a wani tashi na kammala a Afrigen.”

**Explanation of Choices and Considerations:**

*   **Formal Tone:** I've aimed for a formal tone suitable for official announcements and reports, reflecting the context of the original text.
*   **Hausa Grammar:** I've paid close attention to Hausa grammar rules, including word order and verb conjugations.
*   **Vocabulary:** I've used vocabulary that is commonly understood and appropriate for the subject matter (biomanufacturing, pandemics, health technology).
*   **Cultural Sensitivity:** I've tried to convey the meaning accurately while respecting Hausa cultural norms.
*   **"gs" (Formal Style):**  I've leaned towards a more polished and formal style, suitable for official documents.

translations.source: Professor Petro Terblanche, Executive Director of Afrigen said: “The entire Afrigen team are thrilled to reach this important milestone with the completion of the mRNA technology platform. This platform is housed within the end-to-end mRNA vaccine development and production facility where the mRNA Hub Covid 19 vaccine candidate AfriVac 2121 is currently in scale-up phase. Over the last 18 months, Afrigen has undergone an incredible transformation with the support of a network of partners and mentors enabled by this Programme. We have grown our capability and capacity to meet the highest quality standards of mRNA vaccine development, serving the objective to build sustainable capacity in LMICs to produce mRNA vaccines”. Afrigen has successfully established a COVID-19 vaccine manufacturing process at a laboratory scale and is currently scaling up that process to a level suitable for manufacturing vaccine batches to be used in Phase I/ II clinical trials to GMP standards.
translations.reference: Babban Darkta na Afrigen, farfesa Petro Terblanche cewa ya yi, ɗaukacin ma'aikatan Afrigen sun yi farin ciki na cimma wannan gagarumin mataki na kammala tsarin shirin Fasahar mRNA. wannan wuri yana ɗauke da kayayyakin samar da rigakafin mRNA na Kwabid-19 samfurin AfriVac 2121 wanda ake matakin dab da kammala haɗa shi. Sama da watanni 18 Afrigen ke samun cigaba ta hanyar tallafi daga masu haɗin guiwa da mashawarta na wannan shiri. Ƙoƙarinmu na ƙaruwa domin kai wa ga ƙolokuwar mataki na inganci na rigakafin mRNA wanda ginshiƙi ga LMICs mai ɗorewa wajen samar da rigakafin mRNA. Afrigen ta samu nasarar samar da ɗakin gwajin rigakafin Kwabid-19 kuma a yanzu tare da samar da ingantattun ƙananan cibiyoyin samar da rigakafin da za a yi amfani da su a mataki na I da na II na gwaji domin kai wa ga ingancin GMP.

translations.source: In a parallel process, Afrigen will continue to carry out training and technology transfer to the network partners. The funders play a crucial role in supporting the Programme with total funding to date at US$ 117 million and France being the first to fund the mRNA technology transfer work. Present at the meeting were representatives from the European Commission, Belgium, Germany, as well as Norway, Canada, African Union, South Africa, and the ELMA Foundation. Caroline Delany, GlobalAffairs Canada’s Director General for Southern and Eastern Africa said: “Canada reaffirms its continued support of the mRNA Technology Transfer Programme and we are delighted to announce a further contribution of 15 million Canadian dollars at the meeting today. This brings Canada’s total contribution to the Programme up to 45 million Canadian dollars.
translations.reference: Ban da wannan, Afrigen za ta cigaba da ba da horaswa da musayar fasaha ga 'yan abokan haɗin guiwarsu. Msu ba da tallafi sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen taimaka wa shirin da tallafin da ya kai Dala 117 zuwa yanzu kuma Faransa ce ta farko wajen fara ba da tallafin ga shirin musayar na mRNA. A wajen taron akwai wakilan Ƙungiyar Tarayyar Turai da suka haɗa da Belgium da Germany da Norway da Canada da Kungiyar Tarayyar Afirka da Afirka ta Kudu da Gidauniyar ELMA. Darakta-janar ta Al'amuran Yau da Kullum ta ƙasa Kanada a Kudanci da Gabashin Afirka, Caroline Delany ta ce; Kanada na ba da tabbacin cigaba da tallafawa shirin Musayar Fasaha ta mRNA, kuma a yau muna farin cikin sanar da ƙarin gudunmowa ta miliyan 15 na kuɗin ƙasar. Da haka jumular gudunmowar da Canada ta ba wa shirin ya kai Dalar Canada miliyan 45.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa (gs - aiming for a more formal, written style):

**Auwatar da kwancen abu, Afrigen za ta ci gaba da yin aikin hori da kuma shiri da zinin zamantawar da ke tare da yuwatawa shiyyar da dama. Malfundin yana da muhimmanci sosai a kan goyan bayan Kwiyamin da ya kammala har zuwa kashi 117 million USD, kuma France ta fara goyan bayanta da aikin shiri da zinin zamantawar mRNA. A ganawarin, akwai kwamari daga kwamaren European Commission, Belgium, Germany, Norway, Canada, Gabas da Arewar Afirqa, Afrika da kuma ELMA Foundation. Caroline Delany, mai jagowa GlobalAffairs Canada don Arewa da Kasashen Yamma ta ce: “Canada ta sake gaurar da goyan bayantata da Kwiyamin shiri da zinin zamantawar mRNA kuma muke da damara a ganawarin na nan da kake, a sanar da kashi 15 million dala na Canada. Hakan yana dawo da kashi 45 million dala na Canada da ke da yabo da ke a Kwiyamin.”**

**Explanation of some choices and considerations:**

*   **Formal Tone:** I've aimed for a more formal and precise translation suitable for official documents.
*   **Hausa Terminology:** I've used common Hausa words and phrases for concepts like "funding," "technology transfer," "programme," and "representatives."
*   **Sentence Structure:** Hausa sentence structure can differ from English. I've adjusted the sentence structure to sound natural in Hausa.
*   **"gs" (Formal Style):**  The "gs" designation indicates a preference for a more polished and written style, avoiding overly colloquial language.

**Important Note:**  Hausa has regional variations. This translation is based on a fairly standard form of Hausa, but slight variations might exist depending on the specific region.

translations.source: These funds support the running of the Hub in South Africa as well as network partners around the world. We firmly believe in the importance of building capacity at local and regional level”. Mr Martin Seychell, Deputy Executive Director European Commission, said. “The EC has already contributed €40 million to the establishment of the mRNA technology transfer Hub and has recently signed another grant with the EIB for €15,5 million to facilitate the expansion of vaccines manufacturing capacity. This is part of the overall investment under the EU Global Gateway strategy, where more than €1 Billion have been mobilised under the Team Europe Initiative on Manufacturing health products. It is now particularly important to also address possible regulatory and demand bottlenecks, to ensure not only production of vaccines of the highest standard in all regions of the world, but also rapid and equitable access to those vaccines.”
translations.reference: Waɗannan kuɗaɗe ana amfani da su ne wajen kula da cibiyar a ƙasar Afirka Kudu da kuma sauran masu haɗin guiwa a faɗin duniya. a cewar mataimakin babban darkta na Ƙungiyar Tarayyar Turai, Mr. Martin Seychell, mun yarda da muhimmancin nuna ƙoƙarinmu a matakin gida zuwa sauran yankuna. EC ta riga ta bayar da gudunmawar miliyan 40 domin samar da Cibiyar Musayar Fasaha ta mRNA kuma ta sanya hannun ba da wani tallafin tare da EIB na miliyan 155 domin taimaka wa yunƙurin faɗaɗa ƙarfin samar da rigakafin. Wannan na daga cikin jumular hannun jari a ƙarƙashin Shirin ba da Tallafin Samar da Abubuwan More Rayuwa na Kungiyar Tarayya Turai, inda aka tattara biliyan 1 bisa jagorancin Shirin Samar da Kayayyakin Lafiya. A yanzu, ba kawai iya buƙatar ɗaukar mataki na kula da samar da mafi ingancin rigakafi ga kowanne yanki na duniya ne kaɗai abin damuwa ba, face ƙoƙarin tabbatar da cewa kowa na iya samun rigakafin daidai-wa-daida.

translations.source: Key leadership appointments made to drive WHO strategic direction and initiatives The World Health Organization (WHO) has appointed five new senior figures to its headquarters leadership team in Geneva. The new appointments follow the reappointment of Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus to his second five-year term as Director-General. The overall leadership team has been consolidated to align with the Organization’s priorities for the next five years and will work closely with the Director-General to drive forward these priorities and WHO’s ambitious transformation agenda. To accelerate progress on implementation of WHO’s 13th General Programme of Work (GPW13), and achievement of its “triple billion” targets and the health-related Sustainable Development Goals, WHO’s work for the coming five years is focused on five priorities:
translations.reference: an naɗa muƙamai 143 domin jan ragamar ayyukan Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya. Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO) ta naɗa sabbin manyan jami'an biyar zuwa shalkwatarta da ke Geneva. Sabbin naɗe-naɗen sun biyo bayan sake naɗa Dakta Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus a matsayin darakta-janar, inda zai yi shekaru 5 ƙari kan wa'adinsa na farko. An buƙaci ɗaukacin shuwagabannin da aka naɗa da su sanya muradun hukumar a gaba a cikin shekaru biyar da za su yi masu zuwa da kuma yin aiki tare da darakta-janar wajen cimma waɗannan muradu da burin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya na kawo sauye-sauye. Domin tabbatar da cimma aiwatar da Tsararrun Manufofin Ayyukanta Karo na 13(GPW13) da ta ware wa biliyoyin kuɗi da cimma Muradun Raya Ƙasa Mai Ɗorewa da suka shafi lafiya, Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya za ta kula da wasu muhimman abubuwan guda biyar:

**Tunaninsashi da zaɓaɓen shugaban kwamando da akay yi don dafyattace hanyar aiki na WHO da ayyukan ta. Kamfanin Lafiya na Duniya (WHO) ta bada shawanni kan wata hukuma huɗu da sabuwar mai hori don kwamandanmu a birnin Geneva. Wannan zaɓaɓen shugaban kwamando ya jikkasu daidai da sauran shugaban kwamando da Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus ya karba shekarar biyu da na haifu a matsayin Janashen Gabatarwa. translations.source: making a paradigm shift towards promoting health and preventing disease by addressing its root causes; radically reorienting health systems towards primary health care; strengthening the systems for health emergency preparedness and response; harnessing the power of science, innovation, data and technologies to advance health; and strengthening WHO as the leading authority on global health and to achieve impact in countries.
translations.reference: Sauya dabarun fuskantar abin da ya shafi haɓaka lafiya da kare afkuwar cututtuka ta hanyar magance musabbabansu daga tushe. sauya tsarin lafiya zuwa ba wa cibiyoyin lafiya matakin farko muhimmanci; Ƙarfafa tsarin zama ciki shirin ko-ta-kwana domin kai agajin gaggawa a fannin lafiya. Amfani da tasirin kimiyya da ƙere-ƙere da rahotanni da fasahohi wajen ciyar da lafiya gaba, da ƙarfafa tasirin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO) a matsayin jagoran kan duk abin da ya shafi lafiya a duniya domin cimma muradunta a ƙasashe.

translations.source: The headquarters leadership team, comprising equal numbers of women and men, will work jointly with WHO regional and country offices. New members of the headquarters leadership team: Dr Jeremy Farrar will become WHO’s Chief Scientist as of 8 May 2023. The appointment of Dr Farrar was previously announced in December 2022. In this role Dr Farrar will oversee the Science Division, bringing together the best experts and networks in science and innovation from around the world to guide, develop and deliver high quality health policies and services to the people who need them most. Prior to joining WHO Dr Farrar was Director of the Wellcome Trust.
translations.reference: shugabannin shalkwatar da suka haɗa adadi kai ɗaya tsakanin maza da mata, za su yi aiki tare sauran ofisoshin hukumar da ke yankuna da ƙasashe. Cikin sabbin jagororin da ke shalkwatar, Dakta Jeremy Farrar ne zai zama babban jami'in kimiyya na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya daga 8 ga watan Mayun 2023. A baya an sanar da naɗin Dakta Farrar a cikin Disamba 2022. A cikin wannan aikin, Dakta Farrar zai kula da dukkanin sashen Kimiyya tare da tattaro kan ƙwararrun masana da hanyoyin sadarwa na kimiyya da ƙere-ƙere daga ko ina a faɗin duniya ya jagoranta, ya tabbatar da ci gaba da isar da ingantattun manufofi da ayyuka na kiwon lafiya ga mutanen da suke buƙatar su. Kafin Dakta Farrar ya fara aikin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya wato WHO, ya kasance Darakta ne a Wellcome Trust.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa (gs - representing a standard Hausa script):

**Translation:**

Masu shiri na kwamitin shiri na kamfen na gaba, wato masu mata da miji da yawa, za su yi aiki tare da ofisin yawansu na kasa da na yankin WHO. Mafi sabon aikin kwamitin shiri na kamfen na gaba: Dr Jeremy Farrar zai zama mai Girma na Masanin Sana’a na WHO daga 8 ga Yuni 2023. Matsayin Dr Farrar da ya kammala ne a wata sanarwa da ta yi a ranar Disamba 2022. A wannan muhimman, Dr Farrar zai yi marubiyanci da kwamfutar Sana’a, wanda za ta gabatar da mafi kyawun masu bashi da shinge na sana’a da bunkasar sana’a daga kowace alama don gabatar da, da amfani da, da ba da manyan manufofin lafatawa da aikin lafatawa ga wadanda ke bukatar su da kansa.  Bashi da karkara zuwa WHO, Dr Farrar ya kasance Darakta na Trust na Wellcome.

**Explanation of some choices and considerations:**

*   **"Headquarters leadership team"**: Translated as "Masu shiri na kwamitin shiri na kamfen na gaba" (Leaders of the forward-facing committee).  This aims to capture the hierarchical and decision-making aspect.
*   **"Comprising equal numbers of women and men"**: Translated as "wato masu mata da miji da yawa" (that is, equal numbers of men and women).
*   **"WHO regional and country offices"**: Translated as "ofisin yawansu na kasa da na yankin WHO" (their regional and country offices of WHO).
*   **"Chief Scientist"**: Translated as "Mai Girma na Masanin Sana’a" (Senior Scientist).
*   **"Oversee the Science Division"**: Translated as "yi marubiyanci da kwamfutar Sana’a" (to be in charge of the Science Division).
*   **"Bringing together the best experts and networks"**: Translated as "wanda za ta gabatar da mafi kyawun masu bashi da shinge na sana’a da bunkasar sana’a" (which will present the best experts and networks of science and innovation).
*   **"Guide, develop and deliver"**: Translated as "gabatar da, da amfani da, da ba da" (to present, to use, and to provide).
*   **"Prior to joining WHO"**: Translated as "Bashi da karkara zuwa WHO" (Before joining WHO).

**Important Note:** Hausa is a very context-dependent language.  A more nuanced translation might be possible with more information about the specific purpose of the document and the intended audience.  This translation prioritizes accuracy and clarity while using relatively common Hausa vocabulary.

translations.source: Before joining Wellcome in 2013 Dr Farrar spent 17 years as Director of the Clinical Research Unit at the Hospital for Tropical Diseases in Vietnam where his research interests were in global health with a focus on emerging infectious diseases. Dr Farrar is a clinician researcher with a medical degree and a PhD. Dr Ailan Li will become Assistant Director-General for Universal Health Coverage, Healthier Populations as of 8 May 2023. In this role Dr Li will oversee the Organization’s efforts to promote better health and well-being through interventions relating to the environmental, social, and economic determinants of health, including climate change, tobacco control, chemical safety, road safety, food systems and nutrition, physical activity, air pollution and radiation, through a One Health approach. Dr Li has been serving as the WHO Representative to the Kingdom of Cambodia since 15 July 2019.
translations.reference: Kafin shigarsa Wellcome a shekarar 2013, Dakta Farrar ya shafe shekaru 17 a matsayin Daraktan Sashin Bincike gwaje-gwaje a Asibitin cututtuka masu saurin yaɗuwa ta ƙasar Vietnam inda yafi mayar da hankalin bincikensa kan kiwon lafiyar duniya tare da bincike kan sabbin cututtukan da ke tasowa. Dakta Farrar mai bincike ne wanda ke da digiri na farko har zuwa na uku wato PhD a fannin likitanci. Dakta Ailan Li zai zama Mataimakin Darakta-Janar na hukumar Universal Health Coverage Healthier Populations tun daga ranar 8 ga Mayu 2023. A cikin wannan mataki, Dakta Li zai kula da ƙoƙarin ƙungiyar don tabbatar da ingantacciyar lafiya da walwala ta hanyar tsoma baki akan al'amuran da suka shafi muhalli, zamantakewa, da tattalin arziki na kiwon lafiya, gami da sauyin yanayi, sarrafa sigari, amincin sinadarai, kula da hanyoyi, abinci, tsarin abinci mai gina jiki, motsa jiki, gurɓatacciyar iska da radiation, ta hanyar One Health. Dr Li yana aiki a matsayin wakilin Hukumar WHO a Masarautar Cambodia tun daga ranar 15 ga Yuli 2019.
translations.hypothesis:

**Yawancin Bayani:**

Baya ga shirin Wellcome a shekara ta 2013, Dr Farrar ya yi zamanance 17 shehu kamar Director na Clinical Research Unit a Asibitinu don Al'adar Kasrawa a Vietnam inda keɓaɓen koyan kiɗa daɗɗiyar shi ne a kan lafarin duniya da daidai da lalata al'adarin cututtuka da ke raguwar shi. Dr Farrar shine mai koyawa da binciken kiɗa da digiri na iyawa da PhD. Dr Ailan Li zata zama Mai-kumbashi na biyu na Haƙƙin Al'adu da Amintattaccen Al'adu, Al'ummati Mai Sauki a 8 ga Yuni 2023. A wannan muhimman, Dr Li zata yi aiki don gwamanti da aikin da suka yi don ingina lafiyata da lafiyar jama'a ta hanyoyin da ke da alaƙa da manyan hanyoyi na lafata, kamar su canjin jita-jita, da kare kwayoyin lafata, da aminci na kimiyata, da lafarin hanyoyin tafiya, da taro, da kwaskwa, da kwari, da aikin yawensa, da lalata al'adarin cututtuka da lalata al'adarin cututtuka, ta hanyar shiri na daya. Dr Li ya kasance mai kula da maƙerin WHO a Kingdom of Cambodia tun 15 ga Yuli 2019.

**Notes on the Translation:**

*   **Hausa Script (gs):** I've used the standard Hausa script.
*   **Formal Language:** I've aimed for a formal and professional tone, suitable for official documents.
*   **Contextualization:** I've tried to capture the meaning accurately while using Hausa phrasing that would be understood in a similar context.
*   **One Health Approach:**  "Shiri na daya" (One Health approach) is used to convey the integrated approach.

**Disclaimer:**  As a language model, my translation is based on my training data.  For critical documents, it's always recommended to have a native Hausa speaker review and refine the translation.

translations.source: Prior to this role, Dr Li served as Regional Emergency Director for the WHO Health Emergencies Programme in the WHO Regional Office for the Western Pacific. Dr Li holds a medical degree and degree in health social sciences. Dr Yukiko Nakatani will become Assistant Director-General for Access to Medicines and Health Products as of 2 May 2023. In this role Dr Nakatani will oversee the development and implementation of WHO’s norms and policies to ensure equitable access to quality medicines, vaccines and diagnostics for all populations everywhere, including for preventing and responding to epidemics. Dr Nakatani has been serving as the Director of the Cancer and Disease Control Division of the Japanese Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare and as the Technical Advisor to the Minister of State for the COVID-19 Vaccination Task Force in Japan.
translations.reference: Kafin wannan rawar, Dakta Li ya kasance Daraktan Gaggawa na Shirin Agajin Lafiya na Hukumar WHO a Ofishin Yanki na WHO na Yammacin Pacific. Dakta Li yana da digiri na likitanci da digiri a fannin kimiyyar zamantakewar lafiya. Dakta Yukiko Nakatani zai zama Mataimakin Darakta-Janar na Samumar da Magunguna da Kayayyakin Lafiya tun daga ranar 2 ga watan Mayu 2023. A wannan muƙamin, Dakta Nakatani zai sa ido kan ci gaba da aiwatar da ƙa'idoji da manufofin Hukumar WHO don tabbatar da samun daidaiton damar samun ingantattun magunguna, alluran rigakafi da binciken lafiya ga dukkan al'ummomi a ko'ina, gami da rigakafi annoba. Dakta Nakatani ya kasance Daraktan Sashin Kula da Cututtukan Daji na Ma'aikatar Lafiya, Ƙwadago da Jin Daɗin Jama'a ta Ƙasar Japan kuma a matsayin mai ba da shawara na fasaha ga Karamin Ministan Kula da Rigakafin Cutar COVID-19 a Ƙasar Japan.

translations.source: Dr Nakatani holds a medical degree and a PhD in public health. Dr Razia Pendse will become the Chef de Cabinet as of 4 May 2023. In this role Dr Pendse will head the Director-General’s Office, helping to drive the Organization’s priorities and initiatives, and will ensure alignment within the WHO leadership team and across the three levels of WHO. Dr Pendse has been serving as the Director of Healthier Populations and Noncommunicable Diseases in the WHO Regional Office for South-East Asia and was previously the WHO Representative to Sri Lanka. Dr Pendse holds a medical degree and master's degree in public health.
translations.reference: Dakta Nakatani yana da digirin farko a ɓangaren likitanci da digirin digirgir a fannin kiwon lafiyar jama'a. Dakta Razia Pendse za ta karɓi matsayin Chef de Cabinet har zuwa 4 ga watan Mayu 2023. A wannan muƙamin, Dakta Pendse zai jagoranci ofishin Darakta-Janar, wanda zai taimaka wajen fitar da fifiko da tsare-tsare na kungiyar, kuma zai tabbatar da daidaito a cikin tawagar shugabannin Hukumar WHO da kuma a cikin matakai uku na WHO. Dakta Pendse ya kasance Daraktan Kula da Lafiyar Jama'a da Cututtukan da ba sa yaɗuwa a Ofishin Hukumar WHO na yankin Kudu maso Gabashin Asiya kuma a baya shi ne Wakilin Hukumar WHO a Sri Lanka. Dakta Pendse yana da digirin farko a ɓangaren likitanci da digirin digirgir a fannin kiwon lafiyar jama'a.

translations.source: Dr Jérôme Salomon will become Assistant Director-General for Universal Health Coverage, Communicable and Noncommunicable Diseases as of 17 April 2023. In this role Dr Salomon will oversee a broad portfolio of technical programmes covering HIV, viral hepatitis, sexually-transmitted infections, tuberculosis, malaria, neglected tropical diseases, mental health, substance use disorders, and noncommunicable diseases such as cardiovascular disease, diabetes, chronic respiratory diseases and cancer. Dr Salomon has been serving as the Director-General for Health at the Ministry of Health and Prevention of France. He was a Member of the WHO Executive Board prior to his appointment and has extensive experience in health systems management, communicable diseases and international public health. Dr Salomon holds a medical degree, a master’s degree in public health and a PhD in epidemiology.
translations.reference: Dakta JÃ©rÃ'me Salomon zai zama Mataimakin Darakta-Janar na Kula da Lafiya ta Duniya, Cututtuka masu Yaɗuwa da Marasa Yaɗuwa daga ranar 17 ga Afrilu 2023. A wannan muƙamin, Dakta Salomon zai kula da babban fayil na shirye-shiryen fasaha wanda ya shafi cutar ƙanjamau, hepatitis viral, cututtukan da ake kamuwa da su ta hanyar jima'i, tarin fuka, zazzaɓin cizon sauro, cututtuka na wurare masu zafi da ba a kula da su, lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa, rashin amfani da abubuwa, da cututtukan da ba a iya kamuwa da su kamar cututtukan zuciya da jijiyoyin jini, ciwon sukari, na yau da kullun, cututtuka da suka shafi numfashi da ciwon daji. Dakta Salomon ya kasance babban darakta mai kula da lafiya a ma’aikatar lafiya da rigakafin ƙasar Faransa. Ya kasance memba a hukumar ta WHO kafin naɗin nasa, kuma yana da gogewa a fannin kula da tsarin kiwon lafiya, cututtuka masu yaɗuwa da kuma lafiyar al'ummar duniya. Dokta Salomon yana da digiri na likitanci, digiri na biyu a fannin kula da lafiyar jama'a da kuma digiri na uku a fannin ilimin cututtuka.

translations.source: The portfolios of existing members of the headquarters leadership team: Dr Samira Asma will continue as the Assistant Director-General for Data, Analytics and Delivery for Impact. Dr Asma oversees a portfolio which ensures that health data are reliable and accessible, and are used to improve health outcomes worldwide, including tracking and accelerating progress towards the triple billion targets and the health-related Sustainable Development Goals. Prior to joining WHO in 2018, Dr Asma held leadership positions at the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) for over two decades. She holds a doctorate degree in dental surgery and a master's degree in public health. Dr Bruce Aylward has been appointed Assistant Director-General of the Universal Health Coverage, Life Course Division as of 4 May 2023.
translations.reference: Takaddun mambobi na ƙungiyar jagoranci na hedkwatar sun haɗa da: Dr Samira Asma wacce za ta ci gaba da zama mataimakiyar Darakta-Janar kan Bayanai, Bincike da Bayarwa don Tasiri. Dokta Asma tana kula da fayil ɗin da ke tabbatar da cewa bayanan kiwon lafiya amintattu ne kuma ana iya samun su, kuma ana amfani da su don haɓaka sakamakon kiwon lafiya a duk duniya, gami da bin diddigin ci gaba da haɓaka ci gaba zuwa buƙatun biliyan uku da maƙasudin ci gaba mai dorewa masu alaƙa da lafiya. Kafin ta fara aikin da Hukumar WHO a shekarar 2018, Dakta Asma ta riƙe muƙaman jagoranci a Cibiyar Kula da Cututtuka ta Ƙasar Amurka (CDC) na sama da shekaru ashirin. Ta yi digirin digirgir a fannin aikin tiyatar haƙori da kuma digiri na biyu a fannin kiwon lafiyar jama'a. An nada Dakta Bruce Aylward a matsayin Mataimakin Darakta-Janar na Kula da Lafiya ta Duniya, Sashen Koyarwa da Rayuwar zamantakewa har zuwa 4 ga watan Mayun 2023.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa (gs - representing a good, understandable translation):

**Translation:**

“Matakan da ke akwai na kwamofofin kwamari na kwamaren shiri na gaba: Dr Samira Asma za ta ci gaba a matsayin Mai Nauniya na Biye da Analytics da Amsa don Yaduwa. Dr Asma ke amana matakan da ke da yawa wanda ke tabbatar da cewa bayanai na lafata suna da gaskiya kuma suna da aiki, kuma ana amfani da su don ingina halaka da yaduwa a duniya, kamar su yi nasara da kuma saurin yi nasara a wuraren biki uku da hangenai na yawansu na lafata wanda ke da alaike da lafata.  Baya ga haka, kafin shiga WHO a shekarar 2018, Dr Asma ta riki mukamai na shirin shirin a U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) don fiye da makwanciya biyar. Ta kammala digiri na biye da tsarki da digiri na biye da lafata. Dr Bruce Aylward an nada shi Mai Nauniya na Biye da Analytics da Amsa na Universal Health Coverage, Life Course Division a ranar 4 Yuni 2023.”

**Explanation of Choices & Notes:**

*   **Formal Language:** Hausa often uses a more formal tone than English, especially in official contexts. I've aimed for a respectful and clear style.
*   **Word Choice:** I've tried to use Hausa words that convey the precise meaning of the English terms.
*   **Sentence Structure:**  Hausa sentence structure can differ from English. I've adjusted the sentence flow to sound natural in Hausa.
*   **"Triple Billion Targets" & "Sustainable Development Goals":**  I've translated these as "wuren biki uku" (targets of the three billion) and "hangenai na yawansu na lafata" (their related goals of health) – these are common ways to express these concepts in Hausa.

**Disclaimer:**  As a language model, my translation is based on my understanding of Hausa and English. A native Hausa speaker could potentially offer a slightly more nuanced or idiomatic translation.

translations.source: Dr Aylward has been leading WHO’s Transformation Agenda and the Organization’s work on the multi-agency Access to COVID-19 Tools Accelerator (ACT-A) Hub. In his new role, Dr Aylward will drive the Organization’s agenda to transform primary health care as central to universal health coverage, as well as overseeing WHO’s work on health systems, immunization and reproductive, maternal and child health. Dr Aylward holds a medical degree and a master’s degree in public health.Dr Hanan Balkhy will continue as Assistant Director-General for Antimicrobial Resistance. Dr Balkhy provides technical and political leadership to curb the health and economic burdens of drug resistance, including through multi-sectoral collaboration with the Food and Agriculture Organization, the World Organization for Animal Health, and the United Nations Environment Programme. Prior to joining WHO, Dr Balkhy was Executive Director for Infection Prevention and Control at Saudi Arabia’s Ministry of National Guard.
translations.reference: Dakta Aylward ya kasance yana jagorantar Ajandar Sauye-sauye ta Hukumar WHO da kuma ayyukan Ƙungiyar kan Samar da Ma'aikatu da yawa zuwa Cibiyar Haɓaka Kayan aikin cutar COVID-19 (ACT. A wannan sabon muƙamin, Dakta Aylward zai jagoranci ajandar ƙungiyar don canza tsarin kiwon lafiya a matakin farko zuwa matakin gamagari, da kuma tabbatar da tsarin kiwon lafiya na duniya, da kuma kula da ayyukan WHO kan tsarin kiwon lafiya, rigakafi da haihuwa, lafiyar mata. Dakta Aylward yana da digirin likitanci da kuma digiri na biyu a fannin kiwon lafiyar jama'a. Dakta Hanan Balkhy za ta ci gaba da zama mataimakiyar Darakta-Janar ta Antimicrobial Resistance. Dakta Balkhy yana ba da jagoranci na fasaha da siyasa don magance matsalolin lafiya da kuma tsadar magungunan magance ta'ammuli da ƙwayoyi, ciki har da ta hanyar haɗin gwiwar ɓangarori da yawa tare da Hukumar Abinci da Aikin Noma, Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya, da Hukumar Kula da Muhalli ta Majalisar Ɗinkin Duniya. Kafin shigarsa Hukumar WHO, Da Balkhy ya kasance Babban Darakta na Kariya da Kula da Cututtuka a Ma'aikatar Tsaro ta Ƙasar Saudi Arabiya.

translations.source: Dr Balkhy holds a medical degree with specialization in paediatric infectious diseases. Dr Catharina Boehme will become Assistant Director-General, External Relations and Governance as of 4 May 2023. In this role Dr Boehme will lead WHO’s strategic engagement in the areas of governance, resource mobilization and partner relations. Her portfolio will include critical Member States processes, such as their negotiation of a pandemic accord, the reform of WHO’s governance and the implementation of recommendations on sustainable financing. Dr Boehme has been serving as the Director-General’s Chef de Cabinet during which time she drove the leadership’s strategic vision, ensuring alignment across the Organization and with Member States and partners.
translations.reference: Dakta Balkhy yana da digiri a ɓangaren likitanci tare da ƙwarewa a cututtuka masu yaɗuwa a ƙananan yara. Dakta Catharina Boehme za ta zama mataimakiyar Darakta-Janar, Harkokin Ƙetare da Jagoranci tun daga 4 ga watan Mayun 2023. A wannan muƙamin, Dakta Boehme zai jagoranci dabarun Hukumar WHO a fannonin gudanar da mulki, tattara albarkatu da dangantakar abokantaka. Shugabancin nata zai haɗa da kula da matakai masu mahimmanci na ƙasashe membobin, kamar tattaunawarsu game da yarjejeniyar annoba, sake fasalin shugabancin Hukumar WHO da aiwatar da shawarwari kan samar da kuɗaɗe mai ɗorewa. Dokta Boehme ta kasance tana aiki a matsayin Babban Daraktan Chef de Cabinet a lokacin da ta jagoranci dabarun jagoranci, tare da tabbatar da daidaito a cikin Ƙungiyar da tare da Membobin Ƙasashe da abokan tarayya.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the document into Hausa (gs - representing a standard Hausa script), aiming for accuracy and readability:

**Translation:**

Dr Balkhy yana da digiri na kimiyyar lantiri da binciken lalata na yara. Dr Catharina Boehme za ta zama Mai Naibakin Sufuri, Muharbi Hujja da Gwanon, daga nan mai 4 ga Yuni 2023. A wannan muhimman, Dr Boehme za ta jaganta harkullolin WHO na tattalin wasan kwamfuta, da kuma cimma da kyakkyawar hanyar daidashiwa, da kuma alwashe da lafagangan da ke da alaiki.  Matakan membobin da ke da muhimmanci, kamar su tattaunakin zaman lantarki, da sake gyawar gwanon WHO, da kuma aiki da manyan bukatar da ke da yadda daidai da yadda a yi da kyakkyawar daidashawa. Dr Boehme ta yi aiki kamar Mai Gudun Taron Janas na Janas-Janas, inda ta yi aiki na gaba na kyakkyawar hanyar daidashiwa, ta tabbatar da daidai da duk wani abu da ke da alaiki da membobin da ke da muhimmanci da yadda daidai da yadda a yi da kyakkyawar hanyar daidashiwa.

**Explanation of Choices & Notes:**

*   **"Dr Balkhy holds a medical degree..."**:  "Dr Balkhy yana da digiri na kimiyyar lantiri da binciken lalata na yara." (Dr Balkhy has a degree in medicine and infectious diseases of children.) - I've used "digiri" (degree) and "binciken lalata na yara" (infectious diseases of children) for clarity.
*   **"Assistant Director-General, External Relations and Governance"**: "Mai Naibakin Sufuri, Muharbi Hujja da Gwanon" (Deputy Director-General, External Relations and Governance).  "Mai Naibakin Sufuri" is a common translation for Deputy Director-General.
*   **"strategic engagement"**: "harkullolin WHO na tattalin wasan kwamfuta" (WHO's strategic activities/engagement).
*   **"Member States processes"**: "Matakan membobin da ke da muhimmanci" (Important processes of the member states).
*   **"pandemic accord"**: "tattaunakin zaman lantarki" (pandemic negotiations/agreements).
*   **"reform of WHO’s governance"**: "sake gyawar gwanon WHO" (reform of WHO’s governance).
*   **"sustainable financing"**: "yadda daidai da yadda a yi da kyakkyawar daidashawa" (sustainable financing -  I've tried to capture the meaning of long-term, sustainable funding).
*   **"Chef de Cabinet"**: "Mai Gudun Taron Janas na Janas-Janas" (Chief of Staff/Cabinet).

**Important Considerations for Hausa Translation:**

*   **Context is Key:** Hausa is a very context-dependent language.  Some phrases can have multiple interpretations.
*   **Formal vs. Informal:**  I've aimed for a relatively formal tone, suitable for official documents.
*   **Word Order:** Hausa word order can be flexible, but I've followed a structure that is common and natural.

Would you like me to:

*   Adjust the translation for a specific audience (e.g., a more general audience)?
*   Expand on any particular section?
*   Provide alternative phrasing for certain terms?

translations.source: She joined WHO in 2021, having been the Chief Executive Officer of FIND, the international alliance for diagnostics. Dr Boehme holds a medical degree and diplomas in public health and management. Dr Chikwe Ihekweazu will continue as Assistant Director-General for the Division of Health Emergency Intelligence and Surveillance Systems in the Emergencies Programme. As part of his portfolio, Dr Ihekweazu leads the WHO Hub for Pandemic and Epidemic Intelligence, bringing together partners to address future pandemic and epidemic risks with better access to data, analytical capacities, and tools for decision-making. Prior to joining WHO, Dr Ihekweazu was the first Director General of the Nigeria Centre for Disease Control (NCDC), from 2016 to 2021.
translations.reference: Ta fara aiki da Hukumar WHO a shekarar 2021, kasancewar ta Babban Jami'ar Gudanarwa na FIND, ƙawancen ƙasa da ƙasa don binciken cututtuka. Dakta Boehme tana da digiri a likitaci da difloma a fannin kiwon lafiyar jama'a da gudanarwa. Dakta Chikwe Ihekweazu zai ci gaba da zama Mataimakin Darakta-Janar na Sashen Nazarin Gaggawa na Lafiya a cikin shirin Tsarin Sa ido na Gaggawa. A matsayin wani ɓangare na aikace-aikace n sa, Dakta Ihekweazu yana jagorantar Cibiyar Hukumar WHO don Cututtuka da haɗo kan masu ruwa da tsaki da abokan haɗin gwiwa don magance annoba da bala'in annoba a nan gaba tare da ingantacciyar damar samun bayanai, damar tantancewa, da kayan aikin da suka dace domin yanke shawarwari. Kafin ya koma Hukumar WHO, Dakta Ihekweazu ya kasance Darakta-Janar na Cibiyar Kula da Cututtuka ta Najeriya (NCDC), daga 2016 zuwa 2021.

translations.source: Dr Ihekweazu holds a medical degree, with specialization as an infectious disease epidemiologist, and a master’s degree in public health. Dr Michael Ryan will continue as Executive Director of WHO’s Health Emergencies Programme. Dr Ryan has been managing health emergencies in WHO for the past 25 years and most recently led WHO’s emergency response to the COVID-19 pandemic. He leads WHO’s response to disease outbreaks, humanitarian crises and other public health emergencies. Dr Ryan is a founding member of the Global Outbreak Alert and Response Network (GOARN), which has aided the response to hundreds of disease outbreaks around the world.
translations.reference: Dakta Ihekweazu yana da digirin likitanci, tare da ƙwarewa a matsayin likita mai bincike n cututtuka, da kuma digiri na biyu a fannin lafiyar jama'a. Dakta Michael Ryan zai ci gaba da zama Babban Darakta na Shirin Agajin Lafiya na Hukumar WHO. Dakta Ryan yana gudanar da ayyukan gaggawa na lafiya a Hukumar WHO na kimanin shekaru 25 da suka gabata kuma kwanan nan ya jagoranci matakin gaggawa na Hukumar WHO game da cutar mashaƙon numfashi wato COVID-19. Yana jagorantar martanin Hukumar WHO game da ɓarkewar cututtuka, rikice-rikicen jin ƙai da sauran abubuwan gaggawa na lafiyar jama'a. Dakta Ryan na ɗaya daga cikin mambobin farko na ƙungiyar da ta kafa wata ƙungiya mai suna Global Outbreak Alert and Response Network (GOARN), wacce ta taimaka wajen mayar da martani ga ɗaruruwan ɓullar cututtuka a duniya.

translations.source: Dr Ryan holds a degree in medicine and a master’s degree in public health. Mr Raul Thomas will continue as Assistant Director-General for Business Operations. Mr Thomas has overall responsibility for WHO’s business functions, including budget, finance, human resources, administration, audit, risk management, accountability and compliance, and general management. He is responsible for implementing many of the initiatives under the Organization’s transformation agenda and creating a respectful, inclusive workplace. During his 20 years of employment with WHO, Mr Thomas has served in the regions of Africa, the Americas, the Eastern Mediterranean and the Western Pacific, as well as with the International Agency for Research on Cancer (IARC).
translations.reference: Dakta Ryan yana da digirin farko a fannin likitanci da kuma digiri na biyu a fannin lafiyar jama'a. Mista Raul Thomas zai ci gaba da zama Mataimakin Darakta Janar na Ayyukan Kasuwanci. Mista Thomas yana da cikakken alhakin ayyukan kasuwanci na Hukumar WHO, gami da kasafin kuɗi, yawan ma'aikata, gudanarwa, binciken gujewa haɗari, lissafi da bin doka, da gudanarwa gabaɗaya. Shi ne ke da alhakin aiwatar da yawancin tsare-tsare a ƙarƙashin ajandar canji na Ƙungiya da ƙirƙirar wurin aiki mai mutuntawa da kuma haɗin kan aiki. A tsawon shekaru 20 da ya yi yana aiki tare da Hukumar WHO, Mista Thomas ya yi aiki a yankunan Afirka, Amurka, Gabashin Bahar Rum da Yammacin Pacific, da kuma Hukumar Bincike kan cutar daji(IARC).
